items.secondaryText: ثُمَّ أَوْرَثْنَا ٱلْكِتَٰبَ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱصْطَفَيْنَا مِنْ عِبَادِنَا ۖ فَمِنْهُمْ ظَالِمٌۭ لِّنَفْسِهِۦ وَمِنْهُم مُّقْتَصِدٌۭ وَمِنْهُمْ سَابِقٌۢ بِٱلْخَيْرَٰتِ بِإِذْنِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلْفَضْلُ ٱلْكَبِيرُ

items.text: 'Adn (Eden) Paradise (everlasting Gardens) will they enter, therein will they be adorned with bracelets of gold and pearls, and their garments there will be of silk (i.e. in Paradise).
items.secondaryText: جَنَّٰتُ عَدْنٍۢ يَدْخُلُونَهَا يُحَلَّوْنَ فِيهَا مِنْ أَسَاوِرَ مِن ذَهَبٍۢ وَلُؤْلُؤًۭا ۖ وَلِبَاسُهُمْ فِيهَا حَرِيرٌۭ

items.text: And they will say: "All the praises and thanks be to Allah, Who has removed from us (all) grief. Verily, our Lord is indeed OftForgiving, Most Ready to appreciate (good deeds and to recompense).
items.secondaryText: وَقَالُوا۟ ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَذْهَبَ عَنَّا ٱلْحَزَنَ ۖ إِنَّ رَبَّنَا لَغَفُورٌۭ شَكُورٌ

items.text: Who, out of His Grace, has lodged us in a home that will last forever; there, toil will touch us not, nor weariness will touch us."
items.secondaryText: ٱلَّذِىٓ أَحَلَّنَا دَارَ ٱلْمُقَامَةِ مِن فَضْلِهِۦ لَا يَمَسُّنَا فِيهَا نَصَبٌۭ وَلَا يَمَسُّنَا فِيهَا لُغُوبٌۭ

items.text: But those who disbelieve, (in the Oneness of Allah - Islamic Monotheism) for them will be the Fire of Hell. Neither it will have a complete killing effect on them so that they die, nor shall its torment be lightened for them. Thus do We requite every disbeliever!
items.secondaryText: وَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لَهُمْ نَارُ جَهَنَّمَ لَا يُقْضَىٰ عَلَيْهِمْ فَيَمُوتُوا۟ وَلَا يُخَفَّفُ عَنْهُم مِّنْ عَذَابِهَا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى كُلَّ كَفُورٍۢ

items.text: Therein they will cry: "Our Lord! Bring us out, we shall do righteous good deeds, not (the evil deeds) that we used to do." (Allah will reply): "Did We not give you lives long enough, so that whosoever would receive admonition, - could receive it? And the warner came to you. So taste you (the evil of your deeds). For the Zalimun (polytheists and wrongdoers, etc.) there is no helper."
items.secondaryText: وَهُمْ يَصْطَرِخُونَ فِيهَا رَبَّنَآ أَخْرِجْنَا نَعْمَلْ صَٰلِحًا غَيْرَ ٱلَّذِى كُنَّا نَعْمَلُ ۚ أَوَلَمْ نُعَمِّرْكُم مَّا يَتَذَكَّرُ فِيهِ مَن تَذَكَّرَ وَجَآءَكُمُ ٱلنَّذِيرُ ۖ فَذُوقُوا۟ فَمَا لِلظَّٰلِمِينَ مِن نَّصِيرٍ

items.text: Verily, Allah is the AllKnower of the unseen of the heavens and the earth. Verily! He is the AllKnower of that is in the breasts.
items.secondaryText: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَٰلِمُ غَيْبِ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ عَلِيمٌۢ بِذَاتِ ٱلصُّدُورِ

items.text: He it is Who has made you successors generations after generations in the earth, so whosoever disbelieves (in Islamic Monotheism) on him will be his disbelief. And the disbelief of the disbelievers adds nothing but hatred with their Lord. And the disbelief of the disbelievers adds nothing but loss.
items.secondaryText: هُوَ ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَكُمْ خَلَٰٓئِفَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ فَمَن كَفَرَ فَعَلَيْهِ كُفْرُهُۥ ۖ وَلَا يَزِيدُ ٱلْكَٰفِرِينَ كُفْرُهُمْ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ إِلَّا مَقْتًۭا ۖ وَلَا يَزِيدُ ٱلْكَٰفِرِينَ كُفْرُهُمْ إِلَّا خَسَارًۭا

items.text: Say (O Muhammad SAW): "Tell me or inform me (what) do you think about your (socalled) partnergods to whom you call upon besides Allah, show me, what they have created of the earth? Or have they any share in the heavens? Or have We given them a Book, so that they act on clear proof therefrom? Nay, the Zalimun (polytheists and wrongdoers, etc.) promise one another nothing but delusions."
items.secondaryText: قُلْ أَرَءَيْتُمْ شُرَكَآءَكُمُ ٱلَّذِينَ تَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ أَرُونِى مَاذَا خَلَقُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ أَمْ لَهُمْ شِرْكٌۭ فِى ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ أَمْ ءَاتَيْنَٰهُمْ كِتَٰبًۭا فَهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَيِّنَتٍۢ مِّنْهُ ۚ بَلْ إِن يَعِدُ ٱلظَّٰلِمُونَ بَعْضُهُم بَعْضًا إِلَّا غُرُورًا

items.text: Verily! Allah grasps the heavens and the earth lest they move away from their places, and if they were to move away from their places, there is not one that could grasp them after Him. Truly, He is Ever Most Forbearing, OftForgiving.
items.secondaryText: ۞ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُمْسِكُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ أَن تَزُولَا ۚ وَلَئِن زَالَتَآ إِنْ أَمْسَكَهُمَا مِنْ أَحَدٍۢ مِّنۢ بَعْدِهِۦٓ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ حَلِيمًا غَفُورًۭا

items.text: And they swore by Allah their most binding oath, that if a warner came to them, they would be more guided than any of the nations (before them), yet when a warner (Muhammad SAW) came to them, it increased in them nothing but flight (from the truth),
items.secondaryText: وَأَقْسَمُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ جَهْدَ أَيْمَٰنِهِمْ لَئِن جَآءَهُمْ نَذِيرٌۭ لَّيَكُونُنَّ أَهْدَىٰ مِنْ إِحْدَى ٱلْأُمَمِ ۖ فَلَمَّا جَآءَهُمْ نَذِيرٌۭ مَّا زَادَهُمْ إِلَّا نُفُورًا

items.text: (They took to flight because of their) arrogance in the land and their plotting of evil. But the evil plot encompasses only him who makes it. Then, can they expect anything (else), but the Sunnah (way of dealing) of the peoples of old? So no change will you find in Allah's Sunnah (way of dealing), and no turning off will you find in Allah's Sunnah (way of dealing).
items.secondaryText: ٱسْتِكْبَارًۭا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَكْرَ ٱلسَّيِّئِ ۚ وَلَا يَحِيقُ ٱلْمَكْرُ ٱلسَّيِّئُ إِلَّا بِأَهْلِهِۦ ۚ فَهَلْ يَنظُرُونَ إِلَّا سُنَّتَ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ ۚ فَلَن تَجِدَ لِسُنَّتِ ٱللَّهِ تَبْدِيلًۭا ۖ وَلَن تَجِدَ لِسُنَّتِ ٱللَّهِ تَحْوِيلًا

items.text: Have they not travelled in the land, and seen what was the end of those before them, and they were superior to them in power? Allah is not such that anything in the heavens or in the earth escapes Him. Verily, He is AllKnowing, AllOmnipotent.
items.secondaryText: أَوَلَمْ يَسِيرُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ فَيَنظُرُوا۟ كَيْفَ كَانَ عَٰقِبَةُ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ وَكَانُوٓا۟ أَشَدَّ مِنْهُمْ قُوَّةًۭ ۚ وَمَا كَانَ ٱللَّهُ لِيُعْجِزَهُۥ مِن شَىْءٍۢ فِى ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَلَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ عَلِيمًۭا قَدِيرًۭا

items.text: And if Allah were to punish men for that which they earned, He would not leave a moving (living) creature on the surface of the earth, but He gives them respite to an appointed term, and when their term comes, then verily, Allah is Ever AllSeer of His slaves.
items.secondaryText: وَلَوْ يُؤَاخِذُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلنَّاسَ بِمَا كَسَبُوا۟ مَا تَرَكَ عَلَىٰ ظَهْرِهَا مِن دَآبَّةٍۢ وَلَٰكِن يُؤَخِّرُهُمْ إِلَىٰٓ أَجَلٍۢ مُّسَمًّۭى ۖ فَإِذَا جَآءَ أَجَلُهُمْ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ بِعِبَادِهِۦ بَصِيرًۢا

items.text: Ya-Sin. [These letters are one of the miracles of the Quran, and none but Allah (Alone) knows their meanings.]
items.secondaryText: يسٓ

items.text: By the Quran, full of wisdom (i.e. full of laws, evidences, and proofs),
items.secondaryText: وَٱلْقُرْءَانِ ٱلْحَكِيمِ

items.text: Truly, you (O Muhammad SAW) are one of the Messengers,
items.secondaryText: إِنَّكَ لَمِنَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ

items.text: On a Straight Path (i.e. on Allah's religion of Islamic Monotheism).
items.secondaryText: عَلَىٰ صِرَٰطٍۢ مُّسْتَقِيمٍۢ

items.text: (This is) a Revelation sent down by the AllMighty, the Most Merciful,
items.secondaryText: تَنزِيلَ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ

items.text: In order that you may warn a people whose forefathers were not warned, so they are heedless.
items.secondaryText: لِتُنذِرَ قَوْمًۭا مَّآ أُنذِرَ ءَابَآؤُهُمْ فَهُمْ غَٰفِلُونَ

items.text: Indeed the Word (of punishment) has proved true against most of them, so they will not believe.
items.secondaryText: لَقَدْ حَقَّ ٱلْقَوْلُ عَلَىٰٓ أَكْثَرِهِمْ فَهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ

items.text: Verily! We have put on their necks iron collars reaching to chins, so that their heads are forced up.
items.secondaryText: إِنَّا جَعَلْنَا فِىٓ أَعْنَٰقِهِمْ أَغْلَٰلًۭا فَهِىَ إِلَى ٱلْأَذْقَانِ فَهُم مُّقْمَحُونَ

items.text: And We have put a barrier before them, and a barrier behind them, and We have covered them up, so that they cannot see.
items.secondaryText: وَجَعَلْنَا مِنۢ بَيْنِ أَيْدِيهِمْ سَدًّۭا وَمِنْ خَلْفِهِمْ سَدًّۭا فَأَغْشَيْنَٰهُمْ فَهُمْ لَا يُبْصِرُونَ

items.text: It is the same to them whether you warn them or you warn them not, they will not believe.
items.secondaryText: وَسَوَآءٌ عَلَيْهِمْ ءَأَنذَرْتَهُمْ أَمْ لَمْ تُنذِرْهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ

items.text: You can only warn him who follows the Reminder (the Quran), and fears the Most Beneficent (Allah) unseen. Bear you to such one the glad tidings of forgiveness, and a generous reward (i.e. Paradise).
items.secondaryText: إِنَّمَا تُنذِرُ مَنِ ٱتَّبَعَ ٱلذِّكْرَ وَخَشِىَ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنَ بِٱلْغَيْبِ ۖ فَبَشِّرْهُ بِمَغْفِرَةٍۢ وَأَجْرٍۢ كَرِيمٍ

items.text: Verily, We give life to the dead, and We record that which they send before (them), and their traces [their footsteps and walking on the earth with their legs to the mosques for the five compulsory congregational prayers, Jihad (holy fighting in Allah's Cause) and all other good and evil they did, and that which they leave behind], and all things We have recorded with numbers (as a record) in a Clear Book.
items.secondaryText: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نُحْىِ ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ وَنَكْتُبُ مَا قَدَّمُوا۟ وَءَاثَٰرَهُمْ ۚ وَكُلَّ شَىْءٍ أَحْصَيْنَٰهُ فِىٓ إِمَامٍۢ مُّبِينٍۢ

items.text: And put forward to them a similitude; the (story of the) dwellers of the town, [It is said that the town was Antioch (Antakiya)], when there came Messengers to them.
items.secondaryText: وَٱضْرِبْ لَهُم مَّثَلًا أَصْحَٰبَ ٱلْقَرْيَةِ إِذْ جَآءَهَا ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ

items.text: When We sent to them two Messengers, they belied them both, so We reinforced them with a third, and they said: "Verily! We have been sent to you as Messengers."
items.secondaryText: إِذْ أَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَيْهِمُ ٱثْنَيْنِ فَكَذَّبُوهُمَا فَعَزَّزْنَا بِثَالِثٍۢ فَقَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّآ إِلَيْكُم مُّرْسَلُونَ

items.text: They (people of the town) said: "You are only human beings like ourselves, and the Most Beneficent (Allah) has revealed nothing, you are only telling lies."
items.secondaryText: قَالُوا۟ مَآ أَنتُمْ إِلَّا بَشَرٌۭ مِّثْلُنَا وَمَآ أَنزَلَ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنُ مِن شَىْءٍ إِنْ أَنتُمْ إِلَّا تَكْذِبُونَ

items.text: The Messengers said: "Our Lord knows that we have been sent as Messengers to you,
items.secondaryText: قَالُوا۟ رَبُّنَا يَعْلَمُ إِنَّآ إِلَيْكُمْ لَمُرْسَلُونَ

items.text: "And our duty is only to convey plainly (the Message)."
items.secondaryText: وَمَا عَلَيْنَآ إِلَّا ٱلْبَلَٰغُ ٱلْمُبِينُ

items.text: They (people) said: "For us, we see an evil omen from you, if you cease not, we will surely stone you, and a painful torment will touch you from us."
items.secondaryText: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا تَطَيَّرْنَا بِكُمْ ۖ لَئِن لَّمْ تَنتَهُوا۟ لَنَرْجُمَنَّكُمْ وَلَيَمَسَّنَّكُم مِّنَّا عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌۭ

items.text: They (Messengers) said: "Your evil omens be with you! (Do you call it "evil omen") because you are admonished? Nay, but you are a people Musrifun (transgressing all bounds by committing all kinds of great sins, and by disobeying Allah).
items.secondaryText: قَالُوا۟ طَٰٓئِرُكُم مَّعَكُمْ ۚ أَئِن ذُكِّرْتُم ۚ بَلْ أَنتُمْ قَوْمٌۭ مُّسْرِفُونَ

items.text: And there came running from the farthest part of the town, a man, saying: "O my people! Obey the Messengers;
items.secondaryText: وَجَآءَ مِنْ أَقْصَا ٱلْمَدِينَةِ رَجُلٌۭ يَسْعَىٰ قَالَ يَٰقَوْمِ ٱتَّبِعُوا۟ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ

items.text: "Obey those who ask no wages of you (for themselves), and who are rightly guided.
items.secondaryText: ٱتَّبِعُوا۟ مَن لَّا يَسْـَٔلُكُمْ أَجْرًۭا وَهُم مُّهْتَدُونَ

items.text: "And why should I not worship Him (Allah Alone) Who has created me and to Whom you shall be returned.
items.secondaryText: وَمَا لِىَ لَآ أَعْبُدُ ٱلَّذِى فَطَرَنِى وَإِلَيْهِ تُرْجَعُونَ

items.text: "Shall I take besides Him aliha (gods), if the Most Beneficent (Allah) intends me any harm, their intercession will be of no use for me whatsoever, nor can they save me?
items.secondaryText: ءَأَتَّخِذُ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ ءَالِهَةً إِن يُرِدْنِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنُ بِضُرٍّۢ لَّا تُغْنِ عَنِّى شَفَٰعَتُهُمْ شَيْـًۭٔا وَلَا يُنقِذُونِ

items.text: "Then verily, I should be in plain error.
items.secondaryText: إِنِّىٓ إِذًۭا لَّفِى ضَلَٰلٍۢ مُّبِينٍ

items.text: Verily! I have believed in your Lord, so listen to me!"
items.secondaryText: إِنِّىٓ ءَامَنتُ بِرَبِّكُمْ فَٱسْمَعُونِ

items.text: It was said (to him when the disbelievers killed him): "Enter Paradise." He said: "Would that my people knew!
items.secondaryText: قِيلَ ٱدْخُلِ ٱلْجَنَّةَ ۖ قَالَ يَٰلَيْتَ قَوْمِى يَعْلَمُونَ

items.text: "That my Lord (Allah) has forgiven me, and made me of the honoured ones!"
items.secondaryText: بِمَا غَفَرَ لِى رَبِّى وَجَعَلَنِى مِنَ ٱلْمُكْرَمِينَ

items.text: And We sent not against his people after him a host from heaven, nor do We send (such a thing).
items.secondaryText: ۞ وَمَآ أَنزَلْنَا عَلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦ مِنۢ بَعْدِهِۦ مِن جُندٍۢ مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَمَا كُنَّا مُنزِلِينَ

items.text: It was but one Saihah (shout, etc.) and lo! They (all) were silent (dead-destroyed).
items.secondaryText: إِن كَانَتْ إِلَّا صَيْحَةًۭ وَٰحِدَةًۭ فَإِذَا هُمْ خَٰمِدُونَ

items.text: Alas for mankind! There never came a Messenger to them but they used to mock at him.
items.secondaryText: يَٰحَسْرَةً عَلَى ٱلْعِبَادِ ۚ مَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ

items.text: Do they not see how many of the generations We have destroyed before them? Verily, they will not return to them.
items.secondaryText: أَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ كَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْقُرُونِ أَنَّهُمْ إِلَيْهِمْ لَا يَرْجِعُونَ

items.text: And surely, all, everyone of them will be brought before Us.
items.secondaryText: وَإِن كُلٌّۭ لَّمَّا جَمِيعٌۭ لَّدَيْنَا مُحْضَرُونَ

items.text: And a sign for them is the dead land. We gave it life, and We brought forth from it grains, so that they eat thereof.
items.secondaryText: وَءَايَةٌۭ لَّهُمُ ٱلْأَرْضُ ٱلْمَيْتَةُ أَحْيَيْنَٰهَا وَأَخْرَجْنَا مِنْهَا حَبًّۭا فَمِنْهُ يَأْكُلُونَ

items.text: And We have made therein gardens of date-palms and grapes, and We have caused springs of water to gush forth therein.
items.secondaryText: وَجَعَلْنَا فِيهَا جَنَّٰتٍۢ مِّن نَّخِيلٍۢ وَأَعْنَٰبٍۢ وَفَجَّرْنَا فِيهَا مِنَ ٱلْعُيُونِ

items.text: So that they may eat of the fruit thereof, and their hands made it not. Will they not, then, give thanks?
items.secondaryText: لِيَأْكُلُوا۟ مِن ثَمَرِهِۦ وَمَا عَمِلَتْهُ أَيْدِيهِمْ ۖ أَفَلَا يَشْكُرُونَ

items.text: Glory be to Him, Who has created all the pairs of that which the earth produces, as well as of their own (human) kind (male and female), and of that which they know not.
items.secondaryText: سُبْحَٰنَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلْأَزْوَٰجَ كُلَّهَا مِمَّا تُنۢبِتُ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَمِنْ أَنفُسِهِمْ وَمِمَّا لَا يَعْلَمُونَ

items.text: And a sign for them is the night, We withdraw therefrom the day, and behold, they are in darkness.
items.secondaryText: وَءَايَةٌۭ لَّهُمُ ٱلَّيْلُ نَسْلَخُ مِنْهُ ٱلنَّهَارَ فَإِذَا هُم مُّظْلِمُونَ

items.text: And the sun runs on its fixed course for a term (appointed). That is the Decree of the All-Mighty, the All-Knowing.
items.secondaryText: وَٱلشَّمْسُ تَجْرِى لِمُسْتَقَرٍّۢ لَّهَا ۚ ذَٰلِكَ تَقْدِيرُ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْعَلِيمِ

items.text: And the moon, We have measured for it mansions (to traverse) till it returns like the old dried curved date stalk.
items.secondaryText: وَٱلْقَمَرَ قَدَّرْنَٰهُ مَنَازِلَ حَتَّىٰ عَادَ كَٱلْعُرْجُونِ ٱلْقَدِيمِ

items.text: It is not for the sun to overtake the moon, nor does the night outstrip the day. They all float, each in an orbit.
items.secondaryText: لَا ٱلشَّمْسُ يَنۢبَغِى لَهَآ أَن تُدْرِكَ ٱلْقَمَرَ وَلَا ٱلَّيْلُ سَابِقُ ٱلنَّهَارِ ۚ وَكُلٌّۭ فِى فَلَكٍۢ يَسْبَحُونَ

items.text: And an Ayah (sign) for them is that We bore their offspring in the laden ship [of Nuh (Noah)].
items.secondaryText: وَءَايَةٌۭ لَّهُمْ أَنَّا حَمَلْنَا ذُرِّيَّتَهُمْ فِى ٱلْفُلْكِ ٱلْمَشْحُونِ

items.text: And We have created for them of the like thereunto, so on them they ride.
items.secondaryText: وَخَلَقْنَا لَهُم مِّن مِّثْلِهِۦ مَا يَرْكَبُونَ

items.text: And if We will, We shall drown them, and there will be no shout (or helper) for them (to hear their cry for help) nor will they be saved.
items.secondaryText: وَإِن نَّشَأْ نُغْرِقْهُمْ فَلَا صَرِيخَ لَهُمْ وَلَا هُمْ يُنقَذُونَ

items.text: Unless it be a mercy from Us, and as an enjoyment for a while.
items.secondaryText: إِلَّا رَحْمَةًۭ مِّنَّا وَمَتَٰعًا إِلَىٰ حِينٍۢ

items.text: And when it is said to them: "Beware of that which is before you (worldly torments), and that which is behind you (torments in the Hereafter), in order that you may receive Mercy (i.e. if you believe in Allah's Religion Islamic Monotheism, and avoid polytheism, and obey Allah with righteous deeds).
items.secondaryText: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمُ ٱتَّقُوا۟ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيكُمْ وَمَا خَلْفَكُمْ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُرْحَمُونَ

items.text: And never came an Ayah from among the Ayat (proofs, evidences, verses, lessons, signs, revelations, etc.) of their Lord to them, but they did turn away from it.
items.secondaryText: وَمَا تَأْتِيهِم مِّنْ ءَايَةٍۢ مِّنْ ءَايَٰتِ رَبِّهِمْ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ عَنْهَا مُعْرِضِينَ

items.text: And when it is said to them: "Spend of that with which Allah has provided you," those who disbelieve say to those who believe: "Shall we feed those whom, if Allah willed, He (Himself) would have fed? You are only in a plain error."
items.secondaryText: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ أَنفِقُوا۟ مِمَّا رَزَقَكُمُ ٱللَّهُ قَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ أَنُطْعِمُ مَن لَّوْ يَشَآءُ ٱللَّهُ أَطْعَمَهُۥٓ إِنْ أَنتُمْ إِلَّا فِى ضَلَٰلٍۢ مُّبِينٍۢ

items.text: And they say: "When will this promise (i.e. Resurrection) be fulfilled, if you are truthful?"
items.secondaryText: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هَٰذَا ٱلْوَعْدُ إِن كُنتُمْ صَٰدِقِينَ

items.text: They await only but a single Saihah (shout, etc.), which will seize them while they are disputing!
items.secondaryText: مَا يَنظُرُونَ إِلَّا صَيْحَةًۭ وَٰحِدَةًۭ تَأْخُذُهُمْ وَهُمْ يَخِصِّمُونَ

items.text: Then they will not be able to make bequest, nor they will return to their family.
items.secondaryText: فَلَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ تَوْصِيَةًۭ وَلَآ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِمْ يَرْجِعُونَ

items.text: And the Trumpet will be blown (i.e. the second blowing) and behold! From the graves they will come out quickly to their Lord.
items.secondaryText: وَنُفِخَ فِى ٱلصُّورِ فَإِذَا هُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَجْدَاثِ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِمْ يَنسِلُونَ

items.text: They will say: "Woe to us! Who has raised us up from our place of sleep." (It will be said to them): "This is what the Most Beneficent (Allah) had promised, and the Messengers spoke truth!"
items.secondaryText: قَالُوا۟ يَٰوَيْلَنَا مَنۢ بَعَثَنَا مِن مَّرْقَدِنَا ۜ ۗ هَٰذَا مَا وَعَدَ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنُ وَصَدَقَ ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ

items.text: It will be but a single Saihah (shout, etc.), so behold! They will all be brought up before Us!
items.secondaryText: إِن كَانَتْ إِلَّا صَيْحَةًۭ وَٰحِدَةًۭ فَإِذَا هُمْ جَمِيعٌۭ لَّدَيْنَا مُحْضَرُونَ

items.text: This Day (Day of Resurrection), none will be wronged in anything, nor will you be requited anything except that which you used to do.
items.secondaryText: فَٱلْيَوْمَ لَا تُظْلَمُ نَفْسٌۭ شَيْـًۭٔا وَلَا تُجْزَوْنَ إِلَّا مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ

items.text: Verily, the dwellers of the Paradise, that Day, will be busy in joyful things.
items.secondaryText: إِنَّ أَصْحَٰبَ ٱلْجَنَّةِ ٱلْيَوْمَ فِى شُغُلٍۢ فَٰكِهُونَ

items.text: They and their wives will be in pleasant shade, reclining on thrones.
items.secondaryText: هُمْ وَأَزْوَٰجُهُمْ فِى ظِلَٰلٍ عَلَى ٱلْأَرَآئِكِ مُتَّكِـُٔونَ

items.text: They will have therein fruits (of all kinds) and all that they ask for.
items.secondaryText: لَهُمْ فِيهَا فَٰكِهَةٌۭ وَلَهُم مَّا يَدَّعُونَ

items.text: (It will be said to them): Salamun (peace be on you), a Word from the Lord (Allah), Most Merciful.
items.secondaryText: سَلَٰمٌۭ قَوْلًۭا مِّن رَّبٍّۢ رَّحِيمٍۢ

items.text: (It will be said): "And O you Al-Mujrimun (criminals, polytheists, sinners, disbelievers in the Islamic Monotheism, wicked evil ones, etc.)! Get you apart this Day (from the believers).
items.secondaryText: وَٱمْتَٰزُوا۟ ٱلْيَوْمَ أَيُّهَا ٱلْمُجْرِمُونَ

items.text: Did I not ordain for you, O Children of Adam, that you should not worship Shaitan (Satan). Verily, he is a plain enemy to you.
items.secondaryText: ۞ أَلَمْ أَعْهَدْ إِلَيْكُمْ يَٰبَنِىٓ ءَادَمَ أَن لَّا تَعْبُدُوا۟ ٱلشَّيْطَٰنَ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ لَكُمْ عَدُوٌّۭ مُّبِينٌۭ

items.text: And that you should worship Me [Alone Islamic Monotheism, and set up not rivals, associate-gods with Me]. That is a Straight Path.
items.secondaryText: وَأَنِ ٱعْبُدُونِى ۚ هَٰذَا صِرَٰطٌۭ مُّسْتَقِيمٌۭ

items.text: And indeed he (Satan) did lead astray a great multitude of you. Did you not, then, understand?
items.secondaryText: وَلَقَدْ أَضَلَّ مِنكُمْ جِبِلًّۭا كَثِيرًا ۖ أَفَلَمْ تَكُونُوا۟ تَعْقِلُونَ

items.text: This is Hell which you were promised!
items.secondaryText: هَٰذِهِۦ جَهَنَّمُ ٱلَّتِى كُنتُمْ تُوعَدُونَ

items.text: Burn therein this Day, for that you used to disbelieve.
items.secondaryText: ٱصْلَوْهَا ٱلْيَوْمَ بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَكْفُرُونَ

items.text: This Day, We shall seal up their mouths, and their hands will speak to Us, and their legs will bear witness to what they used to earn. (It is said that one's left thigh will be the first to bear the witness). [Tafsir At-Tabari, Vol. 22, Page 24]
items.secondaryText: ٱلْيَوْمَ نَخْتِمُ عَلَىٰٓ أَفْوَٰهِهِمْ وَتُكَلِّمُنَآ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَتَشْهَدُ أَرْجُلُهُم بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ

items.text: And if it had been Our Will, We would surely have wiped out (blinded) their eyes, so that they would struggle for the Path, how then would they see?
items.secondaryText: وَلَوْ نَشَآءُ لَطَمَسْنَا عَلَىٰٓ أَعْيُنِهِمْ فَٱسْتَبَقُوا۟ ٱلصِّرَٰطَ فَأَنَّىٰ يُبْصِرُونَ

items.text: And if it had been Our Will, We could have transformed them (into animals or lifeless objects) in their places. Then they should have been unable to go forward (move about) nor they could have turned back. [As it happened with the Jews see Verse 7:166 The Quran].
items.secondaryText: وَلَوْ نَشَآءُ لَمَسَخْنَٰهُمْ عَلَىٰ مَكَانَتِهِمْ فَمَا ٱسْتَطَٰعُوا۟ مُضِيًّۭا وَلَا يَرْجِعُونَ

items.text: And he whom We grant long life, We reverse him in creation (weakness after strength). Will they not then understand?
items.secondaryText: وَمَن نُّعَمِّرْهُ نُنَكِّسْهُ فِى ٱلْخَلْقِ ۖ أَفَلَا يَعْقِلُونَ

items.text: And We have not taught him (Muhammad SAW) poetry, nor is it meet for him. This is only a Reminder and a plain Quran.
items.secondaryText: وَمَا عَلَّمْنَٰهُ ٱلشِّعْرَ وَمَا يَنۢبَغِى لَهُۥٓ ۚ إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكْرٌۭ وَقُرْءَانٌۭ مُّبِينٌۭ

items.text: That he or it (Muhammad SAW or the Quran) may give warning to him who is living (a healthy minded the believer), and that Word (charge) may be justified against the disbelievers (dead, as they reject the warnings).
items.secondaryText: لِّيُنذِرَ مَن كَانَ حَيًّۭا وَيَحِقَّ ٱلْقَوْلُ عَلَى ٱلْكَٰفِرِينَ

items.text: Do they not see that We have created for them of what Our Hands have created, the cattle, so that they are their owners.
items.secondaryText: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ أَنَّا خَلَقْنَا لَهُم مِّمَّا عَمِلَتْ أَيْدِينَآ أَنْعَٰمًۭا فَهُمْ لَهَا مَٰلِكُونَ

items.text: And We have subdued them unto them so that some of them they have for riding and some they eat.
items.secondaryText: وَذَلَّلْنَٰهَا لَهُمْ فَمِنْهَا رَكُوبُهُمْ وَمِنْهَا يَأْكُلُونَ

items.text: And they have (other) benefits from them (besides), and they get (milk) to drink, will they not then be grateful?
items.secondaryText: وَلَهُمْ فِيهَا مَنَٰفِعُ وَمَشَارِبُ ۖ أَفَلَا يَشْكُرُونَ

items.text: And they have taken besides Allah aliha (gods), hoping that they might be helped (by those so called gods).
items.secondaryText: وَٱتَّخَذُوا۟ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ ءَالِهَةًۭ لَّعَلَّهُمْ يُنصَرُونَ

items.text: They cannot help them, but they will be brought forward as a troop against those who worshipped them (at the time of Reckoning).
items.secondaryText: لَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ نَصْرَهُمْ وَهُمْ لَهُمْ جُندٌۭ مُّحْضَرُونَ

items.text: So let not their speech, then, grieve you (O Muhammad SAW). Verily, We know what they conceal and what they reveal.
items.secondaryText: فَلَا يَحْزُنكَ قَوْلُهُمْ ۘ إِنَّا نَعْلَمُ مَا يُسِرُّونَ وَمَا يُعْلِنُونَ

items.text: Does not man see that We have created him from Nutfah (mixed male and female discharge semen drops). Yet behold! He (stands forth) as an open opponent.
items.secondaryText: أَوَلَمْ يَرَ ٱلْإِنسَٰنُ أَنَّا خَلَقْنَٰهُ مِن نُّطْفَةٍۢ فَإِذَا هُوَ خَصِيمٌۭ مُّبِينٌۭ

items.text: And he puts forth for Us a parable, and forgets his own creation. He says: "Who will give life to these bones when they have rotted away and became dust?"
items.secondaryText: وَضَرَبَ لَنَا مَثَلًۭا وَنَسِىَ خَلْقَهُۥ ۖ قَالَ مَن يُحْىِ ٱلْعِظَٰمَ وَهِىَ رَمِيمٌۭ

items.text: Say: (O Muhammad SAW) "He will give life to them Who created them for the first time! And He is the All-Knower of every creation!"
items.secondaryText: قُلْ يُحْيِيهَا ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنشَأَهَآ أَوَّلَ مَرَّةٍۢ ۖ وَهُوَ بِكُلِّ خَلْقٍ عَلِيمٌ

items.text: He, Who produces for you fire out of the green tree, when behold! You kindle therewith.
items.secondaryText: ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُم مِّنَ ٱلشَّجَرِ ٱلْأَخْضَرِ نَارًۭا فَإِذَآ أَنتُم مِّنْهُ تُوقِدُونَ

items.text: Is not He, Who created the heavens and the earth Able to create the like of them? Yes, indeed! He is the All-Knowing Supreme Creator.
items.secondaryText: أَوَلَيْسَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ بِقَٰدِرٍ عَلَىٰٓ أَن يَخْلُقَ مِثْلَهُم ۚ بَلَىٰ وَهُوَ ٱلْخَلَّٰقُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ

items.text: Verily, His Command, when He intends a thing, is only that He says to it, "Be!" and it is!
items.secondaryText: إِنَّمَآ أَمْرُهُۥٓ إِذَآ أَرَادَ شَيْـًٔا أَن يَقُولَ لَهُۥ كُن فَيَكُونُ

items.text: So Glorified is He and Exalted above all that they associate with Him, and in Whose Hands is the dominion of all things, and to Him you shall be returned.
items.secondaryText: فَسُبْحَٰنَ ٱلَّذِى بِيَدِهِۦ مَلَكُوتُ كُلِّ شَىْءٍۢ وَإِلَيْهِ تُرْجَعُونَ

items.text: By those (angels) ranged in ranks (or rows).
items.secondaryText: وَٱلصَّٰٓفَّٰتِ صَفًّۭا

items.text: By those (angels) who drive the clouds in a good way.
items.secondaryText: فَٱلزَّٰجِرَٰتِ زَجْرًۭا

items.text: By those (angels) who bring the Book and the Quran from Allah to mankind [Tafsir Ibn Kathir].
items.secondaryText: فَٱلتَّٰلِيَٰتِ ذِكْرًا

items.text: Verily your Ilah (God) is indeed One (i.e. Allah);
items.secondaryText: إِنَّ إِلَٰهَكُمْ لَوَٰحِدٌۭ

items.text: Lord of the heavens and of the earth, and all that is between them, and Lord of every point of the sun's risings. (None has the right to be worshipped but Allah).
items.secondaryText: رَّبُّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا وَرَبُّ ٱلْمَشَٰرِقِ

items.text: Verily! We have adorned the near heaven with the stars (for beauty).
items.secondaryText: إِنَّا زَيَّنَّا ٱلسَّمَآءَ ٱلدُّنْيَا بِزِينَةٍ ٱلْكَوَاكِبِ

items.text: And to guard against every rebellious devil.
items.secondaryText: وَحِفْظًۭا مِّن كُلِّ شَيْطَٰنٍۢ مَّارِدٍۢ

items.text: They cannot listen to the higher group (angels) for they are pelted from every side.
items.secondaryText: لَّا يَسَّمَّعُونَ إِلَى ٱلْمَلَإِ ٱلْأَعْلَىٰ وَيُقْذَفُونَ مِن كُلِّ جَانِبٍۢ

items.text: Outcast, and theirs is a constant (or painful) torment.
items.secondaryText: دُحُورًۭا ۖ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌۭ وَاصِبٌ

items.text: Except such as snatch away something by stealing and they are pursued by a flaming fire of piercing brightness.
items.secondaryText: إِلَّا مَنْ خَطِفَ ٱلْخَطْفَةَ فَأَتْبَعَهُۥ شِهَابٌۭ ثَاقِبٌۭ

items.text: Then ask them (i.e. these polytheists, O Muhammad SAW): "Are they stronger as creation, or those (others like the heavens and the earth and the mountains, etc.) whom We have created?" Verily, We created them of a sticky clay.
items.secondaryText: فَٱسْتَفْتِهِمْ أَهُمْ أَشَدُّ خَلْقًا أَم مَّنْ خَلَقْنَآ ۚ إِنَّا خَلَقْنَٰهُم مِّن طِينٍۢ لَّازِبٍۭ

items.text: Nay, you (O Muhammad SAW) wondered (at their insolence) while they mock (at you and at the Quran).
items.secondaryText: بَلْ عَجِبْتَ وَيَسْخَرُونَ

items.text: And when they are reminded, they pay no attention.
items.secondaryText: وَإِذَا ذُكِّرُوا۟ لَا يَذْكُرُونَ

items.text: And when they see an Ayah (a sign, a proof, or an evidence) from Allah, they mock at it.
items.secondaryText: وَإِذَا رَأَوْا۟ ءَايَةًۭ يَسْتَسْخِرُونَ

items.text: And they say: "This is nothing but evident magic!
items.secondaryText: وَقَالُوٓا۟ إِنْ هَٰذَآ إِلَّا سِحْرٌۭ مُّبِينٌ

items.text: "When we are dead and have become dust and bones, shall we (then) verily be resurrected?
items.secondaryText: أَءِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًۭا وَعِظَٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَبْعُوثُونَ

items.text: "And also our fathers of old?"
items.secondaryText: أَوَءَابَآؤُنَا ٱلْأَوَّلُونَ

items.text: Say (O Muhammad SAW): "Yes, and you shall then be humiliated."
items.secondaryText: قُلْ نَعَمْ وَأَنتُمْ دَٰخِرُونَ

items.text: It will be a single Zajrah [shout (i.e. the second blowing of the Trumpet)], and behold, they will be staring!
items.secondaryText: فَإِنَّمَا هِىَ زَجْرَةٌۭ وَٰحِدَةٌۭ فَإِذَا هُمْ يَنظُرُونَ

items.text: They will say: "Woe to us! This is the Day of Recompense!"
items.secondaryText: وَقَالُوا۟ يَٰوَيْلَنَا هَٰذَا يَوْمُ ٱلدِّينِ

items.text: (It will be said): "This is the Day of Judgement which you used to deny."
items.secondaryText: هَٰذَا يَوْمُ ٱلْفَصْلِ ٱلَّذِى كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ

items.text: (It will be said to the angels): "Assemble those who did wrong, together with their companions (from the devils) and what they used to worship.
items.secondaryText: ۞ ٱحْشُرُوا۟ ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ وَأَزْوَٰجَهُمْ وَمَا كَانُوا۟ يَعْبُدُونَ

items.text: "Instead of Allah, and lead them on to the way of flaming Fire (Hell);
items.secondaryText: مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ فَٱهْدُوهُمْ إِلَىٰ صِرَٰطِ ٱلْجَحِيمِ

items.text: "But stop them, verily they are to be questioned.
items.secondaryText: وَقِفُوهُمْ ۖ إِنَّهُم مَّسْـُٔولُونَ

items.text: "What is the matter with you? Why do you not help one another (as you used to do in the world)?"
items.secondaryText: مَا لَكُمْ لَا تَنَاصَرُونَ

items.text: Nay, but that Day they shall surrender,
items.secondaryText: بَلْ هُمُ ٱلْيَوْمَ مُسْتَسْلِمُونَ

items.text: And they will turn to one another and question one another.
items.secondaryText: وَأَقْبَلَ بَعْضُهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍۢ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ

items.text: They will say: "It was you who used to come to us from the right side [i.e. from the right side of one of us and beautify for us every evil, order us for polytheism, and stop us from the truth i.e. Islamic Monotheism and from every good deed]."
items.secondaryText: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّكُمْ كُنتُمْ تَأْتُونَنَا عَنِ ٱلْيَمِينِ

items.text: They will reply: "Nay, you yourselves were not believers.
items.secondaryText: قَالُوا۟ بَل لَّمْ تَكُونُوا۟ مُؤْمِنِينَ

items.text: "And we had no authority over you. Nay! But you were transgressing people (disobedient, polytheists, and disbelievers).
items.secondaryText: وَمَا كَانَ لَنَا عَلَيْكُم مِّن سُلْطَٰنٍۭ ۖ بَلْ كُنتُمْ قَوْمًۭا طَٰغِينَ

items.text: "So now the Word of our Lord has been justified against us, that we shall certainly (have to) taste (the torment).
items.secondaryText: فَحَقَّ عَلَيْنَا قَوْلُ رَبِّنَآ ۖ إِنَّا لَذَآئِقُونَ

items.text: "So we led you astray because we were ourselves astray."
items.secondaryText: فَأَغْوَيْنَٰكُمْ إِنَّا كُنَّا غَٰوِينَ

items.text: Then verily, that Day, they will (all) share in the torment.
items.secondaryText: فَإِنَّهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍۢ فِى ٱلْعَذَابِ مُشْتَرِكُونَ

items.text: Certainly, that is how We deal with Al-Mujrimun (polytheists, sinners, criminals, the disobedient to Allah, etc.).
items.secondaryText: إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَفْعَلُ بِٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ

items.text: Truly, when it was said to them: La ilaha ill-Allah "(none has the right to be worshipped but Allah)," they puffed themselves up with pride (i.e. denied it).
items.secondaryText: إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوٓا۟ إِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ يَسْتَكْبِرُونَ

items.text: And (they) said: "Are we going to abandon our aliha (gods) for the sake of a mad poet?
items.secondaryText: وَيَقُولُونَ أَئِنَّا لَتَارِكُوٓا۟ ءَالِهَتِنَا لِشَاعِرٍۢ مَّجْنُونٍۭ

items.text: Nay! he (Muhammad SAW) has come with the truth (i.e. Allah's Religion - Islamic Monotheism and this Quran) and he confirms the Messengers (before him who brought Allah's religion - Islamic Monotheism).
items.secondaryText: بَلْ جَآءَ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَصَدَّقَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ

items.text: Verily, you (pagans of Makkah) are going to taste the painful torment;
items.secondaryText: إِنَّكُمْ لَذَآئِقُوا۟ ٱلْعَذَابِ ٱلْأَلِيمِ

items.text: And you will be requited nothing except for what you used to do (evil deeds, sins, and Allah's disobedience which you used to do in this world);
items.secondaryText: وَمَا تُجْزَوْنَ إِلَّا مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ

items.text: Save the chosen slaves of Allah (faithful, obedient, true believers of Islamic Monotheism).
items.secondaryText: إِلَّا عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْمُخْلَصِينَ

items.text: For them there will be a known provision (in Paradise).
items.secondaryText: أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ لَهُمْ رِزْقٌۭ مَّعْلُومٌۭ

items.text: Fruits; and they shall be honoured,
items.secondaryText: فَوَٰكِهُ ۖ وَهُم مُّكْرَمُونَ

items.text: In the Gardens of delight (Paradise),
items.secondaryText: فِى جَنَّٰتِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ

items.text: Facing one another on thrones,
items.secondaryText: عَلَىٰ سُرُرٍۢ مُّتَقَٰبِلِينَ

items.text: Round them will be passed a cup of pure wine;
items.secondaryText: يُطَافُ عَلَيْهِم بِكَأْسٍۢ مِّن مَّعِينٍۭ

items.text: White, delicious to the drinkers,
items.secondaryText: بَيْضَآءَ لَذَّةٍۢ لِّلشَّٰرِبِينَ

items.text: Neither they will have Ghoul (any kind of hurt, abdominal pain, headache, a sin, etc.) from that, nor will they suffer intoxication therefrom.
items.secondaryText: لَا فِيهَا غَوْلٌۭ وَلَا هُمْ عَنْهَا يُنزَفُونَ

items.text: And with them will be chaste females, restraining their glances (desiring none except their husbands), with wide and beautiful eyes.
items.secondaryText: وَعِندَهُمْ قَٰصِرَٰتُ ٱلطَّرْفِ عِينٌۭ

items.text: (Delicate and pure) as if they were (hidden) eggs (well) preserved.
items.secondaryText: كَأَنَّهُنَّ بَيْضٌۭ مَّكْنُونٌۭ

items.text: Then they will turn to one another, mutually questioning.
items.secondaryText: فَأَقْبَلَ بَعْضُهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍۢ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ

items.text: A speaker of them will say: "Verily, I had a companion (in the world),
items.secondaryText: قَالَ قَآئِلٌۭ مِّنْهُمْ إِنِّى كَانَ لِى قَرِينٌۭ

items.text: Who used to say: "Are you among those who believe (in resurrection after death).
items.secondaryText: يَقُولُ أَءِنَّكَ لَمِنَ ٱلْمُصَدِّقِينَ

items.text: "(That) when we die and become dust and bones, shall we indeed (be raised up) to receive reward or punishment (according to our deeds)?"
items.secondaryText: أَءِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًۭا وَعِظَٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَدِينُونَ

items.text: (The man) said: "Will you look down?"
items.secondaryText: قَالَ هَلْ أَنتُم مُّطَّلِعُونَ

items.text: So he looked down and saw him in the midst of the Fire.
items.secondaryText: فَٱطَّلَعَ فَرَءَاهُ فِى سَوَآءِ ٱلْجَحِيمِ

items.text: He said: "By Allah! You have nearly ruined me.
items.secondaryText: قَالَ تَٱللَّهِ إِن كِدتَّ لَتُرْدِينِ

items.text: "Had it not been for the Grace of my Lord, I would certainly have been among those brought forth (to Hell)."
items.secondaryText: وَلَوْلَا نِعْمَةُ رَبِّى لَكُنتُ مِنَ ٱلْمُحْضَرِينَ

items.text: (Allah informs about that true believer that he said): "Are we then not to die (any more)?
items.secondaryText: أَفَمَا نَحْنُ بِمَيِّتِينَ

items.text: "Except our first death, and we shall not be punished? (after we have entered Paradise)."
items.secondaryText: إِلَّا مَوْتَتَنَا ٱلْأُولَىٰ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمُعَذَّبِينَ

items.text: Truly, this is the supreme success!
items.secondaryText: إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَهُوَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْعَظِيمُ

items.text: For the like of this let the workers work.
items.secondaryText: لِمِثْلِ هَٰذَا فَلْيَعْمَلِ ٱلْعَٰمِلُونَ

items.text: Is that (Paradise) better entertainment or the tree of Zaqqum (a horrible tree in Hell)?
items.secondaryText: أَذَٰلِكَ خَيْرٌۭ نُّزُلًا أَمْ شَجَرَةُ ٱلزَّقُّومِ

items.text: Truly We have made it (as) a trail for the Zalimun (polytheists, disbelievers, wrong-doers, etc.).
items.secondaryText: إِنَّا جَعَلْنَٰهَا فِتْنَةًۭ لِّلظَّٰلِمِينَ

items.text: Verily, it is a tree that springs out of the bottom of Hell-fire,
items.secondaryText: إِنَّهَا شَجَرَةٌۭ تَخْرُجُ فِىٓ أَصْلِ ٱلْجَحِيمِ

items.text: The shoots of its fruit-stalks are like the heads of Shayatin (devils);
items.secondaryText: طَلْعُهَا كَأَنَّهُۥ رُءُوسُ ٱلشَّيَٰطِينِ

items.text: Truly, they will eat thereof and fill their bellies therewith.
items.secondaryText: فَإِنَّهُمْ لَءَاكِلُونَ مِنْهَا فَمَالِـُٔونَ مِنْهَا ٱلْبُطُونَ

items.text: Then on the top of that they will be given boiling water to drink so that it becomes a mixture (of boiling water and Zaqqum in their bellies).
items.secondaryText: ثُمَّ إِنَّ لَهُمْ عَلَيْهَا لَشَوْبًۭا مِّنْ حَمِيمٍۢ

items.text: Then thereafter, verily, their return is to the flaming fire of Hell.
items.secondaryText: ثُمَّ إِنَّ مَرْجِعَهُمْ لَإِلَى ٱلْجَحِيمِ

items.text: Verily, they found their fathers on the wrong path;
items.secondaryText: إِنَّهُمْ أَلْفَوْا۟ ءَابَآءَهُمْ ضَآلِّينَ

items.text: So they (too) made haste to follow in their footsteps!
items.secondaryText: فَهُمْ عَلَىٰٓ ءَاثَٰرِهِمْ يُهْرَعُونَ

items.text: And indeed most of the men of old went astray before them;
items.secondaryText: وَلَقَدْ ضَلَّ قَبْلَهُمْ أَكْثَرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ

items.text: And indeed We sent among them warners (Messengers);
items.secondaryText: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا فِيهِم مُّنذِرِينَ

items.text: Then see what was the end of those who were warned (but heeded not).
items.secondaryText: فَٱنظُرْ كَيْفَ كَانَ عَٰقِبَةُ ٱلْمُنذَرِينَ

items.text: Except the chosen slaves of Allah (faithful, obedient, and true believers of Islamic Monotheism).
items.secondaryText: إِلَّا عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْمُخْلَصِينَ

items.text: And indeed Nuh (Noah) invoked Us, and We are the Best of those who answer (the request).
items.secondaryText: وَلَقَدْ نَادَىٰنَا نُوحٌۭ فَلَنِعْمَ ٱلْمُجِيبُونَ

items.text: And We rescued him and his family from the great distress (i.e. drowning),
items.secondaryText: وَنَجَّيْنَٰهُ وَأَهْلَهُۥ مِنَ ٱلْكَرْبِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ

items.text: And, his progeny, them We made the survivors (i.e. Shem, Ham and Japheth).
items.secondaryText: وَجَعَلْنَا ذُرِّيَّتَهُۥ هُمُ ٱلْبَاقِينَ

items.text: And left for him (a goodly remembrance) among generations to come in later times:
items.secondaryText: وَتَرَكْنَا عَلَيْهِ فِى ٱلْءَاخِرِينَ

items.text: Salamun (peace) be upon Nuh (Noah) (from Us) among the 'Alamin (mankind, jinns and all that exists)!"
items.secondaryText: سَلَٰمٌ عَلَىٰ نُوحٍۢ فِى ٱلْعَٰلَمِينَ

items.text: Verily, thus We reward the Muhsinun (good-doers - see V. 2:112).
items.secondaryText: إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ

items.text: Verily, he [Nuh (Noah)] was one of Our believing slaves.
items.secondaryText: إِنَّهُۥ مِنْ عِبَادِنَا ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

items.text: Then We drowned the other (disbelievers and polytheists, etc.).
items.secondaryText: ثُمَّ أَغْرَقْنَا ٱلْءَاخَرِينَ

items.text: And, verily, among those who followed his [Nuh's (Noah)] way (Islamic Monotheism) was Ibrahim (Abraham).
items.secondaryText: ۞ وَإِنَّ مِن شِيعَتِهِۦ لَإِبْرَٰهِيمَ

items.text: When he came to his Lord with a pure heart [attached to Allah Alone and none else, worshipping none but Allah Alone true Islamic Monotheism, pure from the filth of polytheism].
items.secondaryText: إِذْ جَآءَ رَبَّهُۥ بِقَلْبٍۢ سَلِيمٍ

items.text: When he said to his father and to his people: "What is it that which you worship?
items.secondaryText: إِذْ قَالَ لِأَبِيهِ وَقَوْمِهِۦ مَاذَا تَعْبُدُونَ

items.text: "Is it a falsehood aliha (gods) other than Allah that you seek?
items.secondaryText: أَئِفْكًا ءَالِهَةًۭ دُونَ ٱللَّهِ تُرِيدُونَ

items.text: "Then what do you think about the Lord of the 'Alamin (mankind, jinns, and all that exists)?"
items.secondaryText: فَمَا ظَنُّكُم بِرَبِّ ٱلْعَٰلَمِينَ

items.text: Then he cast a glance at the stars (to deceive them),
items.secondaryText: فَنَظَرَ نَظْرَةًۭ فِى ٱلنُّجُومِ

items.text: And he said: "Verily, I am sick (with plague. He did this trick to remain in their temple of idols to destroy them and not to accompany them to the pagan's feast)."
items.secondaryText: فَقَالَ إِنِّى سَقِيمٌۭ

items.text: So they turned away from him, and departed (for fear of the disease).
items.secondaryText: فَتَوَلَّوْا۟ عَنْهُ مُدْبِرِينَ

items.text: Then he turned to their aliha (gods) and said: "Will you not eat (of the offering before you)?
items.secondaryText: فَرَاغَ إِلَىٰٓ ءَالِهَتِهِمْ فَقَالَ أَلَا تَأْكُلُونَ

items.text: "What is the matter with you that you speak not?"
items.secondaryText: مَا لَكُمْ لَا تَنطِقُونَ

items.text: Then he turned upon them, striking (them) with (his) right hand.
items.secondaryText: فَرَاغَ عَلَيْهِمْ ضَرْبًۢا بِٱلْيَمِينِ

items.text: Then they (the worshippers of idols) came, towards him, hastening.
items.secondaryText: فَأَقْبَلُوٓا۟ إِلَيْهِ يَزِفُّونَ

items.text: He said: "Worship you that which you (yourselves) carve?
items.secondaryText: قَالَ أَتَعْبُدُونَ مَا تَنْحِتُونَ

items.text: "While Allah has created you and what you make!"
items.secondaryText: وَٱللَّهُ خَلَقَكُمْ وَمَا تَعْمَلُونَ

items.text: They said: "Build for him a building (it is said that the building was like a furnace) and throw him into the blazing fire!"
items.secondaryText: قَالُوا۟ ٱبْنُوا۟ لَهُۥ بُنْيَٰنًۭا فَأَلْقُوهُ فِى ٱلْجَحِيمِ

items.text: So they plotted a plot against him, but We made them the lowest.
items.secondaryText: فَأَرَادُوا۟ بِهِۦ كَيْدًۭا فَجَعَلْنَٰهُمُ ٱلْأَسْفَلِينَ

items.text: And he said (after his rescue from the fire): "Verily, I am going to my Lord. He will guide me!"
items.secondaryText: وَقَالَ إِنِّى ذَاهِبٌ إِلَىٰ رَبِّى سَيَهْدِينِ

items.text: "My Lord! Grant me (offspring) from the righteous."
items.secondaryText: رَبِّ هَبْ لِى مِنَ ٱلصَّٰلِحِينَ

items.text: So We gave him the glad tidings of a forbearing boy.
items.secondaryText: فَبَشَّرْنَٰهُ بِغُلَٰمٍ حَلِيمٍۢ

items.text: And, when he (his son) was old enough to walk with him, he said: "O my son! I have seen in a dream that I am slaughtering you (offer you in sacrifice to Allah), so look what you think!" He said: "O my father! Do that which you are commanded, Insha' Allah (if Allah will), you shall find me of As-Sabirin (the patient ones, etc.)."
items.secondaryText: فَلَمَّا بَلَغَ مَعَهُ ٱلسَّعْىَ قَالَ يَٰبُنَىَّ إِنِّىٓ أَرَىٰ فِى ٱلْمَنَامِ أَنِّىٓ أَذْبَحُكَ فَٱنظُرْ مَاذَا تَرَىٰ ۚ قَالَ يَٰٓأَبَتِ ٱفْعَلْ مَا تُؤْمَرُ ۖ سَتَجِدُنِىٓ إِن شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ مِنَ ٱلصَّٰبِرِينَ

items.text: Then, when they had both submitted themselves (to the Will of Allah), and he had laid him prostrate on his forehead (or on the side of his forehead for slaughtering);
items.secondaryText: فَلَمَّآ أَسْلَمَا وَتَلَّهُۥ لِلْجَبِينِ

items.text: And We called out to him: "O Abraham!
items.secondaryText: وَنَٰدَيْنَٰهُ أَن يَٰٓإِبْرَٰهِيمُ

items.text: You have fulfilled the dream (vision)!" Verily! Thus do We reward the Muhsinun (good-doers - see V. 2:112).
items.secondaryText: قَدْ صَدَّقْتَ ٱلرُّءْيَآ ۚ إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ

items.text: Verily, that indeed was a manifest trial
items.secondaryText: إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَهُوَ ٱلْبَلَٰٓؤُا۟ ٱلْمُبِينُ

items.text: And We ransomed him with a great sacrifice (i.e. a ram);
items.secondaryText: وَفَدَيْنَٰهُ بِذِبْحٍ عَظِيمٍۢ

items.text: And We left for him (a goodly remembrance) among generations (to come) in later times.
items.secondaryText: وَتَرَكْنَا عَلَيْهِ فِى ٱلْءَاخِرِينَ

items.text: Salamun (peace) be upon Ibrahim (Abraham)!"
items.secondaryText: سَلَٰمٌ عَلَىٰٓ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ

items.text: Thus indeed do We reward the Muhsinun (good-doers - see V. 2:112).
items.secondaryText: كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ

items.text: Verily, he was one of Our believing slaves.
items.secondaryText: إِنَّهُۥ مِنْ عِبَادِنَا ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

items.text: And We gave him the glad tidings of Ishaque (Isaac) a Prophet from the righteous.
items.secondaryText: وَبَشَّرْنَٰهُ بِإِسْحَٰقَ نَبِيًّۭا مِّنَ ٱلصَّٰلِحِينَ

items.text: We blessed him and Ishaque (Isaac), and of their progeny are (some) that do right, and some that plainly wrong themselves.
items.secondaryText: وَبَٰرَكْنَا عَلَيْهِ وَعَلَىٰٓ إِسْحَٰقَ ۚ وَمِن ذُرِّيَّتِهِمَا مُحْسِنٌۭ وَظَالِمٌۭ لِّنَفْسِهِۦ مُبِينٌۭ

items.text: And, indeed We gave Our Grace to Musa (Moses) and Harun (Aaron).
items.secondaryText: وَلَقَدْ مَنَنَّا عَلَىٰ مُوسَىٰ وَهَٰرُونَ

items.text: And We saved them and their people from the great distress;
items.secondaryText: وَنَجَّيْنَٰهُمَا وَقَوْمَهُمَا مِنَ ٱلْكَرْبِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ

items.text: And helped them, so that they became the victors;
items.secondaryText: وَنَصَرْنَٰهُمْ فَكَانُوا۟ هُمُ ٱلْغَٰلِبِينَ

items.text: And We gave them the clear Scripture;
items.secondaryText: وَءَاتَيْنَٰهُمَا ٱلْكِتَٰبَ ٱلْمُسْتَبِينَ

items.text: And guided them to the Right Path;
items.secondaryText: وَهَدَيْنَٰهُمَا ٱلصِّرَٰطَ ٱلْمُسْتَقِيمَ

items.text: And We left for them (a goodly remembrance) among generations (to come) in later times;
items.secondaryText: وَتَرَكْنَا عَلَيْهِمَا فِى ٱلْءَاخِرِينَ

items.text: Salamun (peace) be upon Musa (Moses) and Harun (Aaron)!"
items.secondaryText: سَلَٰمٌ عَلَىٰ مُوسَىٰ وَهَٰرُونَ

items.text: Verily, thus do We reward the Muhsinun (good-doers - see V. 2:112).
items.secondaryText: إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ

items.text: Verily! They were two of Our believing slaves.
items.secondaryText: إِنَّهُمَا مِنْ عِبَادِنَا ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

items.text: And verily, Iliyas (Elias) was one of the Messengers.
items.secondaryText: وَإِنَّ إِلْيَاسَ لَمِنَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ

items.text: When he said to his people: "Will you not fear Allah?
items.secondaryText: إِذْ قَالَ لِقَوْمِهِۦٓ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ

items.text: "Will you call upon Ba'l (a well- known idol of his nation whom they used to worship) and forsake the Best of creators,
items.secondaryText: أَتَدْعُونَ بَعْلًۭا وَتَذَرُونَ أَحْسَنَ ٱلْخَٰلِقِينَ

items.text: "Allah, your Lord and the Lord of your forefathers?"
items.secondaryText: ٱللَّهَ رَبَّكُمْ وَرَبَّ ءَابَآئِكُمُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ

items.text: But they denied him [Iliyas (Elias)], so they will certainly be brought forth (to the punishment),
items.secondaryText: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَإِنَّهُمْ لَمُحْضَرُونَ

items.text: Except the chosen slaves of Allah.
items.secondaryText: إِلَّا عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْمُخْلَصِينَ

items.text: And We left for him (a goodly remembrance) among generations (to come) in later times;
items.secondaryText: وَتَرَكْنَا عَلَيْهِ فِى ٱلْءَاخِرِينَ

items.text: Salamun (peace) be upon Ilyasin (Elias)!"
items.secondaryText: سَلَٰمٌ عَلَىٰٓ إِلْ يَاسِينَ

items.text: Verily, thus do We reward the Muhsinun (good-doers, who perform good deeds totally for Allah's sake only - see V. 2:112).
items.secondaryText: إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ

items.text: Verily, he was one of Our believing slaves.
items.secondaryText: إِنَّهُۥ مِنْ عِبَادِنَا ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

items.text: And verily, Lout (Lot) was one of the Messengers.
items.secondaryText: وَإِنَّ لُوطًۭا لَّمِنَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ

items.text: When We saved him and his family, all,
items.secondaryText: إِذْ نَجَّيْنَٰهُ وَأَهْلَهُۥٓ أَجْمَعِينَ

items.text: Except an old woman (his wife) who was among those who remained behind.
items.secondaryText: إِلَّا عَجُوزًۭا فِى ٱلْغَٰبِرِينَ

items.text: Then We destroyed the rest [i.e. the towns of Sodom at the place of the Dead Sea (now) in Palestine]. [See the "Book of History" by Ibn Kathir].
items.secondaryText: ثُمَّ دَمَّرْنَا ٱلْءَاخَرِينَ

items.text: Verily, you pass by them in the morning.
items.secondaryText: وَإِنَّكُمْ لَتَمُرُّونَ عَلَيْهِم مُّصْبِحِينَ

items.text: And at night; will you not then reflect?
items.secondaryText: وَبِٱلَّيْلِ ۗ أَفَلَا تَعْقِلُونَ

items.text: And, verily, Yunus (Jonah) was one of the Messengers.
items.secondaryText: وَإِنَّ يُونُسَ لَمِنَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ

items.text: When he ran to the laden ship,
items.secondaryText: إِذْ أَبَقَ إِلَى ٱلْفُلْكِ ٱلْمَشْحُونِ

items.text: He (agreed to) cast lots, and he was among the losers,
items.secondaryText: فَسَاهَمَ فَكَانَ مِنَ ٱلْمُدْحَضِينَ

items.text: Then a (big) fish swallowed him and he had done an act worthy of blame.
items.secondaryText: فَٱلْتَقَمَهُ ٱلْحُوتُ وَهُوَ مُلِيمٌۭ

items.text: Had he not been of them who glorify Allah,
items.secondaryText: فَلَوْلَآ أَنَّهُۥ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلْمُسَبِّحِينَ

items.text: He would have indeed remained inside its belly (the fish) till the Day of Resurrection.
items.secondaryText: لَلَبِثَ فِى بَطْنِهِۦٓ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ يُبْعَثُونَ

items.text: But We cast him forth on the naked shore while he was sick,
items.secondaryText: ۞ فَنَبَذْنَٰهُ بِٱلْعَرَآءِ وَهُوَ سَقِيمٌۭ

items.text: And We caused a plant of gourd to grow over him.
items.secondaryText: وَأَنۢبَتْنَا عَلَيْهِ شَجَرَةًۭ مِّن يَقْطِينٍۢ

items.text: And We sent him to a hundred thousand (people) or even more.
items.secondaryText: وَأَرْسَلْنَٰهُ إِلَىٰ مِا۟ئَةِ أَلْفٍ أَوْ يَزِيدُونَ

items.text: And they believed; so We gave them enjoyment for a while.
items.secondaryText: فَـَٔامَنُوا۟ فَمَتَّعْنَٰهُمْ إِلَىٰ حِينٍۢ

items.text: Now ask them (O Muhammad SAW): "Are there (only) daughters for your Lord and sons for them?"
items.secondaryText: فَٱسْتَفْتِهِمْ أَلِرَبِّكَ ٱلْبَنَاتُ وَلَهُمُ ٱلْبَنُونَ

items.text: Or did We create the angels females while they were witnesses?
items.secondaryText: أَمْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْمَلَٰٓئِكَةَ إِنَٰثًۭا وَهُمْ شَٰهِدُونَ

items.text: Verily, it is of their falsehood that they (Quraish pagans) say:
items.secondaryText: أَلَآ إِنَّهُم مِّنْ إِفْكِهِمْ لَيَقُولُونَ

items.text: "Allah has begotten off spring or children (i.e. angels are the daughters of Allah)?" And, verily, they are liars!
items.secondaryText: وَلَدَ ٱللَّهُ وَإِنَّهُمْ لَكَٰذِبُونَ

items.text: Has He (then) chosen daughters rather than sons?
items.secondaryText: أَصْطَفَى ٱلْبَنَاتِ عَلَى ٱلْبَنِينَ

items.text: What is the matter with you? How do you decide?
items.secondaryText: مَا لَكُمْ كَيْفَ تَحْكُمُونَ

items.text: Will you not then remember?
items.secondaryText: أَفَلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ

items.text: Or is there for you a plain authority?
items.secondaryText: أَمْ لَكُمْ سُلْطَٰنٌۭ مُّبِينٌۭ

items.text: Then bring your Book if you are truthful!
items.secondaryText: فَأْتُوا۟ بِكِتَٰبِكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ صَٰدِقِينَ

items.text: And they have invented a kinship between Him and the jinns, but the jinns know well that they have indeed to appear (before Him) (i.e. they will be brought for accounts).
items.secondaryText: وَجَعَلُوا۟ بَيْنَهُۥ وَبَيْنَ ٱلْجِنَّةِ نَسَبًۭا ۚ وَلَقَدْ عَلِمَتِ ٱلْجِنَّةُ إِنَّهُمْ لَمُحْضَرُونَ

items.text: Glorified is Allah! (He is Free) from what they attribute unto Him!
items.secondaryText: سُبْحَٰنَ ٱللَّهِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ

items.text: Except the slaves of Allah, whom He choses (for His Mercy i.e. true believers of Islamic Monotheism who do not attribute false things unto Allah).
items.secondaryText: إِلَّا عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْمُخْلَصِينَ

items.text: So, verily you (pagans) and those whom you worship (idols).
items.secondaryText: فَإِنَّكُمْ وَمَا تَعْبُدُونَ

items.text: Cannot lead astray [turn away from Him (Allah) anyone of the believers],
items.secondaryText: مَآ أَنتُمْ عَلَيْهِ بِفَٰتِنِينَ

items.text: Except those who are predestined to burn in Hell!
items.secondaryText: إِلَّا مَنْ هُوَ صَالِ ٱلْجَحِيمِ

items.text: There is not one of us (angels) but has his known place (or position);
items.secondaryText: وَمَا مِنَّآ إِلَّا لَهُۥ مَقَامٌۭ مَّعْلُومٌۭ

items.text: Verily, we (angels), we stand in rows for the prayers (as you Muslims stand in rows for your prayers);
items.secondaryText: وَإِنَّا لَنَحْنُ ٱلصَّآفُّونَ

items.text: Verily, we (angels), we are they who glorify (Allah's Praises i.e. perform prayers).
items.secondaryText: وَإِنَّا لَنَحْنُ ٱلْمُسَبِّحُونَ

items.text: And indeed they (Arab pagans) used to say;
items.secondaryText: وَإِن كَانُوا۟ لَيَقُولُونَ

items.text: "If we had a reminder as had the men of old (before the coming of Prophet Muhammad SAW as a Messenger of Allah).
items.secondaryText: لَوْ أَنَّ عِندَنَا ذِكْرًۭا مِّنَ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ

items.text: "We would have indeed been the chosen slaves of Allah (true believers of Islamic Monotheism)!"
items.secondaryText: لَكُنَّا عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْمُخْلَصِينَ

items.text: But (now that the Quran has come) they disbelieve therein (i.e. in the Quran and in Prophet Muhammad SAW, and all that which he brought, the Divine Revelation), so they will come to know!
items.secondaryText: فَكَفَرُوا۟ بِهِۦ ۖ فَسَوْفَ يَعْلَمُونَ

items.text: And, verily, Our Word has gone forth of old for Our slaves, the Messengers,
items.secondaryText: وَلَقَدْ سَبَقَتْ كَلِمَتُنَا لِعِبَادِنَا ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ

items.text: That they verily would be made triumphant.
items.secondaryText: إِنَّهُمْ لَهُمُ ٱلْمَنصُورُونَ

items.text: And that Our hosts, they verily would be the victors.
items.secondaryText: وَإِنَّ جُندَنَا لَهُمُ ٱلْغَٰلِبُونَ

items.text: So turn away (O Muhammad SAW) from them for a while,
items.secondaryText: فَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ حَتَّىٰ حِينٍۢ

items.text: And watch them and they shall see (the punishment)!
items.secondaryText: وَأَبْصِرْهُمْ فَسَوْفَ يُبْصِرُونَ

items.text: Do they seek to hasten on Our Torment?
items.secondaryText: أَفَبِعَذَابِنَا يَسْتَعْجِلُونَ

items.text: Then, when it descends into their courtyard (i.e. near to them), evil will be the morning for those who had been warned!
items.secondaryText: فَإِذَا نَزَلَ بِسَاحَتِهِمْ فَسَآءَ صَبَاحُ ٱلْمُنذَرِينَ

items.text: So turn (O Muhammad SAW) away from them for a while,
items.secondaryText: وَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ حَتَّىٰ حِينٍۢ

items.text: And watch and they shall see (the torment)!
items.secondaryText: وَأَبْصِرْ فَسَوْفَ يُبْصِرُونَ

items.text: Glorified be your Lord, the Lord of Honour and Power! (He is free) from what they attribute unto Him!
items.secondaryText: سُبْحَٰنَ رَبِّكَ رَبِّ ٱلْعِزَّةِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ

items.text: And peace be on the Messengers!
items.secondaryText: وَسَلَٰمٌ عَلَى ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ

items.text: And all the praise and thanks be to Allah, Lord of the 'Alamin (mankind, jinns and all that exists).
items.secondaryText: وَٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ ٱلْعَٰلَمِينَ

items.text: Sad [These letters (Sad etc.) are one of the miracles of the Quran and none but Allah (Alone) knows their meanings]. By the Quran full of reminding.
items.secondaryText: صٓ ۚ وَٱلْقُرْءَانِ ذِى ٱلذِّكْرِ

items.text: Nay, those who desbelieve are in false pride and opposition.
items.secondaryText: بَلِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ فِى عِزَّةٍۢ وَشِقَاقٍۢ

items.text: How many a generation We have destroyed before them, and they cried out when there was no longer time for escape!
items.secondaryText: كَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا مِن قَبْلِهِم مِّن قَرْنٍۢ فَنَادَوا۟ وَّلَاتَ حِينَ مَنَاصٍۢ

items.text: And they (Arab pagans) wonder that a warner (Prophet Muhammad SAW) has come to them from among themselves! And the disbelievers say: "This (Prophet Muhammad SAW) is a sorcerer, a liar.
items.secondaryText: وَعَجِبُوٓا۟ أَن جَآءَهُم مُّنذِرٌۭ مِّنْهُمْ ۖ وَقَالَ ٱلْكَٰفِرُونَ هَٰذَا سَٰحِرٌۭ كَذَّابٌ

items.text: "Has he made the aliha (gods) (all) into One Ilah (God - Allah). Verily, this is a curious thing!"
items.secondaryText: أَجَعَلَ ٱلْءَالِهَةَ إِلَٰهًۭا وَٰحِدًا ۖ إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَشَىْءٌ عُجَابٌۭ

items.text: And the leaders among them went about (saying): "Go on, and remain constant to your aliha (gods)! Verily, This is a thing designed (against you)!
items.secondaryText: وَٱنطَلَقَ ٱلْمَلَأُ مِنْهُمْ أَنِ ٱمْشُوا۟ وَٱصْبِرُوا۟ عَلَىٰٓ ءَالِهَتِكُمْ ۖ إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَشَىْءٌۭ يُرَادُ

items.text: "We have not heard (the like) of this among the people of these later days. This is nothing but an invention!
items.secondaryText: مَا سَمِعْنَا بِهَٰذَا فِى ٱلْمِلَّةِ ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ إِنْ هَٰذَآ إِلَّا ٱخْتِلَٰقٌ

items.text: "Has the Reminder been sent down to him (alone) from among us?" Nay! but they are in doubt about My Reminder (this Quran)! Nay, but they have not tasted (My) Torment!
items.secondaryText: أَءُنزِلَ عَلَيْهِ ٱلذِّكْرُ مِنۢ بَيْنِنَا ۚ بَلْ هُمْ فِى شَكٍّۢ مِّن ذِكْرِى ۖ بَل لَّمَّا يَذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابِ

items.text: Or have they the treasures of the Mercy of your Lord, the All-Mighty, the Real Bestower?
items.secondaryText: أَمْ عِندَهُمْ خَزَآئِنُ رَحْمَةِ رَبِّكَ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْوَهَّابِ

items.text: Or is it that the dominion of the heavens and the earth and all that is between them is theirs? If so, let them ascend up with means (to the heavens)!
items.secondaryText: أَمْ لَهُم مُّلْكُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا ۖ فَلْيَرْتَقُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَسْبَٰبِ

items.text: (As they denied Allah's Message) they will be a defeated host like the confederates of the old times (who were defeated).
items.secondaryText: جُندٌۭ مَّا هُنَالِكَ مَهْزُومٌۭ مِّنَ ٱلْأَحْزَابِ

items.text: Before them (were many who) belied Messengers, the people of Nuh (Noah); and 'Ad; and Fir'aun (Pharaoh) the man of stakes (with which he used to punish the people),
items.secondaryText: كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍۢ وَعَادٌۭ وَفِرْعَوْنُ ذُو ٱلْأَوْتَادِ

items.text: And Thamud, and the people of Lout (Lot), and the dwellers of the wood; such were the confederates.
items.secondaryText: وَثَمُودُ وَقَوْمُ لُوطٍۢ وَأَصْحَٰبُ لْـَٔيْكَةِ ۚ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ ٱلْأَحْزَابُ

items.text: Not one of them but belied the Messengers, therefore My Torment was justified,
items.secondaryText: إِن كُلٌّ إِلَّا كَذَّبَ ٱلرُّسُلَ فَحَقَّ عِقَابِ

items.text: And these only wait for a single Saihah [shout (i.e. the blowing of the Trumpet by the angel Israfil Sarafil)] there will be no pause or ending thereto [till everything will perish except Allah (the only God full of Majesty, Bounty and Honour)].
items.secondaryText: وَمَا يَنظُرُ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ إِلَّا صَيْحَةًۭ وَٰحِدَةًۭ مَّا لَهَا مِن فَوَاقٍۢ

items.text: They say: "Our Lord! Hasten to us Qittana (i.e. our Record of good and bad deeds so that we see it) before the Day of Reckoning!"
items.secondaryText: وَقَالُوا۟ رَبَّنَا عَجِّل لَّنَا قِطَّنَا قَبْلَ يَوْمِ ٱلْحِسَابِ

items.text: Be patient (O Muhammad SAW) of what they say, and remember Our slave Dawud (David), endued with power. Verily, he was ever oft-returning in all matters and in repentance (toward Allah).
items.secondaryText: ٱصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَٱذْكُرْ عَبْدَنَا دَاوُۥدَ ذَا ٱلْأَيْدِ ۖ إِنَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابٌ

items.text: Verily, We made the mountains to glorify Our Praises with him [Dawud (David)] in the 'Ashi (i.e. after the mid-day till sunset) and Ishraq (i.e. after the sunrise till mid-day).
items.secondaryText: إِنَّا سَخَّرْنَا ٱلْجِبَالَ مَعَهُۥ يُسَبِّحْنَ بِٱلْعَشِىِّ وَٱلْإِشْرَاقِ

items.text: And (so did) the birds assembled: all with him [Dawud (David)] did turn (to Allah i.e. glorified His Praises).
items.secondaryText: وَٱلطَّيْرَ مَحْشُورَةًۭ ۖ كُلٌّۭ لَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابٌۭ

items.text: We made his kingdom strong and gave him Al-Hikmah (Prophethood, etc.) and sound judgement in speech and decision.
items.secondaryText: وَشَدَدْنَا مُلْكَهُۥ وَءَاتَيْنَٰهُ ٱلْحِكْمَةَ وَفَصْلَ ٱلْخِطَابِ

items.text: And has the news of the litigants reached you? When they climbed over the wall into (his) Mihrab (a praying place or a private room,).
items.secondaryText: ۞ وَهَلْ أَتَىٰكَ نَبَؤُا۟ ٱلْخَصْمِ إِذْ تَسَوَّرُوا۟ ٱلْمِحْرَابَ

items.text: When they entered in upon Dawud (David), he was terrified of them, they said: "Fear not! (We are) two litigants, one of whom has wronged the other, therefore judge between us with truth, and treat us not with injustice, and guide us to the Right Way.
items.secondaryText: إِذْ دَخَلُوا۟ عَلَىٰ دَاوُۥدَ فَفَزِعَ مِنْهُمْ ۖ قَالُوا۟ لَا تَخَفْ ۖ خَصْمَانِ بَغَىٰ بَعْضُنَا عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍۢ فَٱحْكُم بَيْنَنَا بِٱلْحَقِّ وَلَا تُشْطِطْ وَٱهْدِنَآ إِلَىٰ سَوَآءِ ٱلصِّرَٰطِ

items.text: Verily, this my brother (in religion) has ninety nine ewes, while I have (only) one ewe, and he says: "Hand it over to me, and he overpowered me in speech."
items.secondaryText: إِنَّ هَٰذَآ أَخِى لَهُۥ تِسْعٌۭ وَتِسْعُونَ نَعْجَةًۭ وَلِىَ نَعْجَةٌۭ وَٰحِدَةٌۭ فَقَالَ أَكْفِلْنِيهَا وَعَزَّنِى فِى ٱلْخِطَابِ

items.text: [Dawud (David)] said (immediately without listening to the opponent): "He has wronged you in demanding your ewe in addition to his ewes. And, verily, many partners oppress one another, except those who believe and do righteous good deeds, and they are few." And Dawud (David) guessed that We have tried him and he sought Forgiveness of his Lord, and he fell down prostrate and turned (to Allah) in repentance.
items.secondaryText: قَالَ لَقَدْ ظَلَمَكَ بِسُؤَالِ نَعْجَتِكَ إِلَىٰ نِعَاجِهِۦ ۖ وَإِنَّ كَثِيرًۭا مِّنَ ٱلْخُلَطَآءِ لَيَبْغِى بَعْضُهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍ إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ وَقَلِيلٌۭ مَّا هُمْ ۗ وَظَنَّ دَاوُۥدُ أَنَّمَا فَتَنَّٰهُ فَٱسْتَغْفَرَ رَبَّهُۥ وَخَرَّ رَاكِعًۭا وَأَنَابَ ۩

items.text: So We forgave him that, and verily, for him is a near access to Us, and a good place of (final) return (Paradise).
items.secondaryText: فَغَفَرْنَا لَهُۥ ذَٰلِكَ ۖ وَإِنَّ لَهُۥ عِندَنَا لَزُلْفَىٰ وَحُسْنَ مَـَٔابٍۢ

items.text: O Dawud (David)! Verily! We have placed you as a successor on earth, so judge you between men in truth (and justice) and follow not your desire for it will mislead you from the Path of Allah. Verily! Those who wander astray from the Path of Allah (shall) have a severe torment, because they forgot the Day of Reckoning.
items.secondaryText: يَٰدَاوُۥدُ إِنَّا جَعَلْنَٰكَ خَلِيفَةًۭ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ فَٱحْكُم بَيْنَ ٱلنَّاسِ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَلَا تَتَّبِعِ ٱلْهَوَىٰ فَيُضِلَّكَ عَن سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يَضِلُّونَ عَن سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ لَهُمْ عَذَابٌۭ شَدِيدٌۢ بِمَا نَسُوا۟ يَوْمَ ٱلْحِسَابِ

items.text: And We created not the heaven and the earth and all that is between them without purpose! That is the consideration of those who disbelieve! Then woe to those who disbelieve (in Islamic Monotheism) from the Fire!
items.secondaryText: وَمَا خَلَقْنَا ٱلسَّمَآءَ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا بَٰطِلًۭا ۚ ذَٰلِكَ ظَنُّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ ۚ فَوَيْلٌۭ لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلنَّارِ

items.text: Shall We treat those who believe (in the Oneness of Allah Islamic Monotheism) and do righteous good deeds, as Mufsidun (those who associate partners in worship with Allah and commit crimes) on earth? Or shall We treat the Muttaqun (pious - see V. 2:2), as the Fujjar (criminals, disbelievers, wicked, etc)?
items.secondaryText: أَمْ نَجْعَلُ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ كَٱلْمُفْسِدِينَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ أَمْ نَجْعَلُ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ كَٱلْفُجَّارِ

items.text: (This is) a Book (the Quran) which We have sent down to you, full of blessings that they may ponder over its Verses, and that men of understanding may remember.
items.secondaryText: كِتَٰبٌ أَنزَلْنَٰهُ إِلَيْكَ مُبَٰرَكٌۭ لِّيَدَّبَّرُوٓا۟ ءَايَٰتِهِۦ وَلِيَتَذَكَّرَ أُو۟لُوا۟ ٱلْأَلْبَٰبِ

items.text: And to Dawud (David) We gave Sulaiman (Solomon). How excellent (a) slave! Verily, he was ever oft-returning in repentance (to Us)!
items.secondaryText: وَوَهَبْنَا لِدَاوُۥدَ سُلَيْمَٰنَ ۚ نِعْمَ ٱلْعَبْدُ ۖ إِنَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابٌ

items.text: When there were displayed before him, in the afternoon, well trained horses of the highest breed [for Jihad (holy fighting in Allah's Cause)].
items.secondaryText: إِذْ عُرِضَ عَلَيْهِ بِٱلْعَشِىِّ ٱلصَّٰفِنَٰتُ ٱلْجِيَادُ

items.text: And he said: "Alas! I did love the good (these horses) instead of remembering my Lord (in my 'Asr prayer)" till the time was over, and (the sun) had hidden in the veil (of night).
items.secondaryText: فَقَالَ إِنِّىٓ أَحْبَبْتُ حُبَّ ٱلْخَيْرِ عَن ذِكْرِ رَبِّى حَتَّىٰ تَوَارَتْ بِٱلْحِجَابِ

items.text: Then he said "Bring them (horses) back to me." Then he began to pass his hand over their legs and their necks (till the end of the display).
items.secondaryText: رُدُّوهَا عَلَىَّ ۖ فَطَفِقَ مَسْحًۢا بِٱلسُّوقِ وَٱلْأَعْنَاقِ

items.text: And, indeed We did try Sulaiman (Solomon) and We placed on his throne Jasadan (a devil, so he lost his kingdom for a while) but he did return (to his throne and kingdom by the Grace of Allah and he did return) to Allah with obedience and in repentance.
items.secondaryText: وَلَقَدْ فَتَنَّا سُلَيْمَٰنَ وَأَلْقَيْنَا عَلَىٰ كُرْسِيِّهِۦ جَسَدًۭا ثُمَّ أَنَابَ

items.text: He said: "My Lord! Forgive me, and bestow upon me a kingdom such as shall not belong to any other after me: Verily, You are the Bestower."
items.secondaryText: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱغْفِرْ لِى وَهَبْ لِى مُلْكًۭا لَّا يَنۢبَغِى لِأَحَدٍۢ مِّنۢ بَعْدِىٓ ۖ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلْوَهَّابُ

items.text: So, We subjected to him the wind, it blew gently to his order whithersoever he willed,
items.secondaryText: فَسَخَّرْنَا لَهُ ٱلرِّيحَ تَجْرِى بِأَمْرِهِۦ رُخَآءً حَيْثُ أَصَابَ

items.text: And also the Shayatin (devils) from the jinns (including) every kind of builder and diver,
items.secondaryText: وَٱلشَّيَٰطِينَ كُلَّ بَنَّآءٍۢ وَغَوَّاصٍۢ

items.text: And also others bound in fetters.
items.secondaryText: وَءَاخَرِينَ مُقَرَّنِينَ فِى ٱلْأَصْفَادِ

items.text: [Saying of Allah to Sulaiman (Solomon)]: "This is Our gift, so spend you or withhold, no account will be asked."
items.secondaryText: هَٰذَا عَطَآؤُنَا فَٱمْنُنْ أَوْ أَمْسِكْ بِغَيْرِ حِسَابٍۢ

items.text: And verily, he enjoyed a near access to Us, and a good final return (Paradise).
items.secondaryText: وَإِنَّ لَهُۥ عِندَنَا لَزُلْفَىٰ وَحُسْنَ مَـَٔابٍۢ

items.text: And remember Our slave Ayub (Job), when he invoked his Lord (saying): "Verily! Shaitan (Satan) has touched me with distress (by losing my health) and torment (by losing my wealth)!
items.secondaryText: وَٱذْكُرْ عَبْدَنَآ أَيُّوبَ إِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّى مَسَّنِىَ ٱلشَّيْطَٰنُ بِنُصْبٍۢ وَعَذَابٍ

items.text: (Allah said to him): "Strike the ground with your foot: This is a spring of water to wash in, cool and a (refreshing) drink."
items.secondaryText: ٱرْكُضْ بِرِجْلِكَ ۖ هَٰذَا مُغْتَسَلٌۢ بَارِدٌۭ وَشَرَابٌۭ

items.text: And We gave him (back) his family, and along with them the like thereof, as a Mercy from Us, and a Reminder for those who understand.
items.secondaryText: وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُۥٓ أَهْلَهُۥ وَمِثْلَهُم مَّعَهُمْ رَحْمَةًۭ مِّنَّا وَذِكْرَىٰ لِأُو۟لِى ٱلْأَلْبَٰبِ

items.text: "And take in your hand a bundle of thin grass and strike therewith (your wife), and break not your oath. Truly! We found him patient. How excellent (a) slave! Verily, he was ever oft-returning in repentance (to Us)!
items.secondaryText: وَخُذْ بِيَدِكَ ضِغْثًۭا فَٱضْرِب بِّهِۦ وَلَا تَحْنَثْ ۗ إِنَّا وَجَدْنَٰهُ صَابِرًۭا ۚ نِّعْمَ ٱلْعَبْدُ ۖ إِنَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابٌۭ

items.text: And remember Our slaves, Ibrahim (Abraham), Ishaque (Isaac), and Ya'qub (Jacob), (all) owners of strength (in worshipping Us) and (also) of religious understanding.
items.secondaryText: وَٱذْكُرْ عِبَٰدَنَآ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ وَإِسْحَٰقَ وَيَعْقُوبَ أُو۟لِى ٱلْأَيْدِى وَٱلْأَبْصَٰرِ

items.text: Verily, We did choose them by granting them (a good thing, i.e.) the remembrance of the home [in the Hereafter and they used to make the people remember it, and also they used to invite the people to obey Allah and to do good deeds for the Hereafter].
items.secondaryText: إِنَّآ أَخْلَصْنَٰهُم بِخَالِصَةٍۢ ذِكْرَى ٱلدَّارِ

items.text: And they are with Us, verily, of the chosen and the best!
items.secondaryText: وَإِنَّهُمْ عِندَنَا لَمِنَ ٱلْمُصْطَفَيْنَ ٱلْأَخْيَارِ

items.text: And remember Isma'il (Ishmael), Al-Yasa'a (Elisha), and Dhul-Kifl (Isaiah), all are among the best.
items.secondaryText: وَٱذْكُرْ إِسْمَٰعِيلَ وَٱلْيَسَعَ وَذَا ٱلْكِفْلِ ۖ وَكُلٌّۭ مِّنَ ٱلْأَخْيَارِ

items.text: This is a Reminder, and verily, for the Muttaqun (pious and righteous persons - see V. 2:2) is a good final return (Paradise),
items.secondaryText: هَٰذَا ذِكْرٌۭ ۚ وَإِنَّ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ لَحُسْنَ مَـَٔابٍۢ

items.text: 'Adn (Edn) Paradise (everlasting Gardens), whose doors will be open for them, [It is said (in Tafsir At-Tabari, Part 23, Page 174) that one can speak to the doors, just one tells it to open and close, and it will open or close as it is ordered].
items.secondaryText: جَنَّٰتِ عَدْنٍۢ مُّفَتَّحَةًۭ لَّهُمُ ٱلْأَبْوَٰبُ

items.text: Therein they will recline; therein they will call for fruits in abundance and drinks;
items.secondaryText: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ فِيهَا يَدْعُونَ فِيهَا بِفَٰكِهَةٍۢ كَثِيرَةٍۢ وَشَرَابٍۢ

items.text: And beside them will be chaste females (virgins) restraining their glances only for their husbands, (and) of equal ages.
items.secondaryText: ۞ وَعِندَهُمْ قَٰصِرَٰتُ ٱلطَّرْفِ أَتْرَابٌ

items.text: This it is what you (Al-Muttaqun - the pious) are promised for the Day of Reckoning!
items.secondaryText: هَٰذَا مَا تُوعَدُونَ لِيَوْمِ ٱلْحِسَابِ

items.text: (It will be said to them)! Verily, this is Our Provision which will never finish;
items.secondaryText: إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَرِزْقُنَا مَا لَهُۥ مِن نَّفَادٍ

items.text: This is so! And for the Taghun (transgressors, disobedient to Allah and His Messenger - disbelievers in the Oneness of Allah, criminals, etc.), will be an evil final return (Fire),
items.secondaryText: هَٰذَا ۚ وَإِنَّ لِلطَّٰغِينَ لَشَرَّ مَـَٔابٍۢ

items.text: Hell! Where they will burn, and worst (indeed) is that place to rest!
items.secondaryText: جَهَنَّمَ يَصْلَوْنَهَا فَبِئْسَ ٱلْمِهَادُ

items.text: This is so! Then let them taste it, a boiling fluid and dirty wound discharges.
items.secondaryText: هَٰذَا فَلْيَذُوقُوهُ حَمِيمٌۭ وَغَسَّاقٌۭ

items.text: And other torments of similar kind, all together!
items.secondaryText: وَءَاخَرُ مِن شَكْلِهِۦٓ أَزْوَٰجٌ

items.text: This is a troop entering with you (in Hell), no welcome for them! Verily, they shall burn in the Fire!
items.secondaryText: هَٰذَا فَوْجٌۭ مُّقْتَحِمٌۭ مَّعَكُمْ ۖ لَا مَرْحَبًۢا بِهِمْ ۚ إِنَّهُمْ صَالُوا۟ ٱلنَّارِ

items.text: (The followers of the misleaders will say): "Nay, you (too)! No welcome for you! It is you (misleaders) who brought this upon us (because you misled us in the world), so evil is this place to stay in!"
items.secondaryText: قَالُوا۟ بَلْ أَنتُمْ لَا مَرْحَبًۢا بِكُمْ ۖ أَنتُمْ قَدَّمْتُمُوهُ لَنَا ۖ فَبِئْسَ ٱلْقَرَارُ

items.text: They will say: "Our Lord! Whoever brought this upon us, add to him a double torment in the Fire!"
items.secondaryText: قَالُوا۟ رَبَّنَا مَن قَدَّمَ لَنَا هَٰذَا فَزِدْهُ عَذَابًۭا ضِعْفًۭا فِى ٱلنَّارِ

items.text: And they will say: "What is the matter with us that we see not men whom we used to count among the bad ones?"
items.secondaryText: وَقَالُوا۟ مَا لَنَا لَا نَرَىٰ رِجَالًۭا كُنَّا نَعُدُّهُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَشْرَارِ

items.text: Did we take them as an object of mockery, or have (our) eyes failed to perceive them?"
items.secondaryText: أَتَّخَذْنَٰهُمْ سِخْرِيًّا أَمْ زَاغَتْ عَنْهُمُ ٱلْأَبْصَٰرُ

items.text: Verily, that is the very truth, the mutual dispute of the people of the Fire!
items.secondaryText: إِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ لَحَقٌّۭ تَخَاصُمُ أَهْلِ ٱلنَّارِ

items.text: Say (O Muhammad SAW): "I am only a warner and there is no Ilah (God) except Allah (none has the right to be worshipped but Allah) the One, the Irresistible,
items.secondaryText: قُلْ إِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ مُنذِرٌۭ ۖ وَمَا مِنْ إِلَٰهٍ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ ٱلْوَٰحِدُ ٱلْقَهَّارُ

items.text: "The Lord of the heavens and the earth and all that is between them, the All-Mighty, the Oft-Forgiving."
items.secondaryText: رَبُّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْغَفَّٰرُ

items.text: Say: "That (this Quran) is a great news,
items.secondaryText: قُلْ هُوَ نَبَؤٌا۟ عَظِيمٌ

items.text: "From which you turn away!
items.secondaryText: أَنتُمْ عَنْهُ مُعْرِضُونَ

items.text: "I had no knowledge of the chiefs (angels) on high when they were disputing and discussing (about the creation of Adam).
items.secondaryText: مَا كَانَ لِىَ مِنْ عِلْمٍۭ بِٱلْمَلَإِ ٱلْأَعْلَىٰٓ إِذْ يَخْتَصِمُونَ

items.text: "Only this has been inspired to me, that I am a plain warner."
items.secondaryText: إِن يُوحَىٰٓ إِلَىَّ إِلَّآ أَنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ نَذِيرٌۭ مُّبِينٌ

items.text: (Remember) when your Lord said to the angels: "Truly, I am going to create man from clay".
items.secondaryText: إِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَٰٓئِكَةِ إِنِّى خَٰلِقٌۢ بَشَرًۭا مِّن طِينٍۢ

items.text: So when I have fashioned him and breathed into him (his) soul created by Me, then you fall down prostrate to him."
items.secondaryText: فَإِذَا سَوَّيْتُهُۥ وَنَفَخْتُ فِيهِ مِن رُّوحِى فَقَعُوا۟ لَهُۥ سَٰجِدِينَ

items.text: So the angels prostrated themselves, all of them:
items.secondaryText: فَسَجَدَ ٱلْمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ كُلُّهُمْ أَجْمَعُونَ

items.text: Except Iblis (Satan) he was proud and was one of the disbelievers.
items.secondaryText: إِلَّآ إِبْلِيسَ ٱسْتَكْبَرَ وَكَانَ مِنَ ٱلْكَٰفِرِينَ

items.text: (Allah) said: "O Iblis (Satan)! What prevents you from prostrating yourself to one whom I have created with Both My Hands. Are you too proud (to fall prostrate to Adam) or are you one of the high exalted?"
items.secondaryText: قَالَ يَٰٓإِبْلِيسُ مَا مَنَعَكَ أَن تَسْجُدَ لِمَا خَلَقْتُ بِيَدَىَّ ۖ أَسْتَكْبَرْتَ أَمْ كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلْعَالِينَ

items.text: [Iblis (Satan)] said: "I am better than he, You created me from fire, and You created him from clay."
items.secondaryText: قَالَ أَنَا۠ خَيْرٌۭ مِّنْهُ ۖ خَلَقْتَنِى مِن نَّارٍۢ وَخَلَقْتَهُۥ مِن طِينٍۢ

items.text: (Allah) said: "Then get out from here, for verily, you are outcast.
items.secondaryText: قَالَ فَٱخْرُجْ مِنْهَا فَإِنَّكَ رَجِيمٌۭ

items.text: "And verily!, My Curse is on you till the Day of Recompense."
items.secondaryText: وَإِنَّ عَلَيْكَ لَعْنَتِىٓ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلدِّينِ

items.text: [Iblis (Satan)] said: "My Lord! Give me then respite till the Day the (dead) are resurrected."
items.secondaryText: قَالَ رَبِّ فَأَنظِرْنِىٓ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ يُبْعَثُونَ

items.text: (Allah) said: "Verily! You are of those allowed respite
items.secondaryText: قَالَ فَإِنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلْمُنظَرِينَ

items.text: "Till the Day of the time appointed."
items.secondaryText: إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلْوَقْتِ ٱلْمَعْلُومِ

items.text: [Iblis (Satan)] said: "By Your Might, then I will surely mislead them all,
items.secondaryText: قَالَ فَبِعِزَّتِكَ لَأُغْوِيَنَّهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ

items.text: "Except Your chosen slaves amongst them (faithful, obedient, true believers of Islamic Monotheism)."
items.secondaryText: إِلَّا عِبَادَكَ مِنْهُمُ ٱلْمُخْلَصِينَ

items.text: (Allah) said: "The Truth is, and the Truth I say,
items.secondaryText: قَالَ فَٱلْحَقُّ وَٱلْحَقَّ أَقُولُ

items.text: That I will fill Hell with you [Iblis (Satan)] and those of them (mankind) that follow you, together."
items.secondaryText: لَأَمْلَأَنَّ جَهَنَّمَ مِنكَ وَمِمَّن تَبِعَكَ مِنْهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ

items.text: Say (O Muhammad SAW): "No wage do I ask of you for this (the Quran), nor am I one of the Mutakallifun (those who pretend and fabricate things which do not exist).
items.secondaryText: قُلْ مَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍۢ وَمَآ أَنَا۠ مِنَ ٱلْمُتَكَلِّفِينَ

items.text: "It (this Quran) is only a Reminder for all the 'Alamin (mankind and jinns).
items.secondaryText: إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكْرٌۭ لِّلْعَٰلَمِينَ

items.text: "And you shall certainly know the truth of it after a while.
items.secondaryText: وَلَتَعْلَمُنَّ نَبَأَهُۥ بَعْدَ حِينٍۭ

items.text: The revelation of this Book (the Quran) is from Allah, the All-Mighty, the All-Wise.
items.secondaryText: تَنزِيلُ ٱلْكِتَٰبِ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْحَكِيمِ

items.text: Verily, We have sent down the Book to you (O Muhammad SAW) in truth: So worship Allah (Alone) by doing religious deeds sincerely for Allah's sake only, (and not to show-off, and not to set up rivals with Him in worship).
items.secondaryText: إِنَّآ أَنزَلْنَآ إِلَيْكَ ٱلْكِتَٰبَ بِٱلْحَقِّ فَٱعْبُدِ ٱللَّهَ مُخْلِصًۭا لَّهُ ٱلدِّينَ

items.text: Surely, the religion (i.e. the worship and the obedience) is for Allah only. And those who take Auliya' (protectors and helpers) besides Him (say): "We worship them only that they may bring us near to Allah." Verily, Allah will judge between them concerning that wherein they differ. Truly, Allah guides not him who is a liar, and a disbeliever.
items.secondaryText: أَلَا لِلَّهِ ٱلدِّينُ ٱلْخَالِصُ ۚ وَٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّخَذُوا۟ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ أَوْلِيَآءَ مَا نَعْبُدُهُمْ إِلَّا لِيُقَرِّبُونَآ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ زُلْفَىٰٓ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَحْكُمُ بَيْنَهُمْ فِى مَا هُمْ فِيهِ يَخْتَلِفُونَ ۗ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يَهْدِى مَنْ هُوَ كَٰذِبٌۭ كَفَّارٌۭ

items.text: Had Allah willed to take a son (or offspring or children), He could have chosen whom He pleased out of those whom He created. But glory be to Him! (He is above such things). He is Allah, the One, the Irresistible.
items.secondaryText: لَّوْ أَرَادَ ٱللَّهُ أَن يَتَّخِذَ وَلَدًۭا لَّٱصْطَفَىٰ مِمَّا يَخْلُقُ مَا يَشَآءُ ۚ سُبْحَٰنَهُۥ ۖ هُوَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْوَٰحِدُ ٱلْقَهَّارُ

items.text: He has created the heavens and the earth with truth. He makes the night to go in the day and makes the day to go in the night. And He has subjected the sun and the moon. Each running (on a fixed course) for an appointed term. Verily, He is the All-Mighty, the Oft-Forgiving.
items.secondaryText: خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ بِٱلْحَقِّ ۖ يُكَوِّرُ ٱلَّيْلَ عَلَى ٱلنَّهَارِ وَيُكَوِّرُ ٱلنَّهَارَ عَلَى ٱلَّيْلِ ۖ وَسَخَّرَ ٱلشَّمْسَ وَٱلْقَمَرَ ۖ كُلٌّۭ يَجْرِى لِأَجَلٍۢ مُّسَمًّى ۗ أَلَا هُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْغَفَّٰرُ

items.text: He created you (all) from a single person (Adam); then made from him his wife [Hawwa' (Eve)]. And He has sent down for you of cattle eight pairs (of the sheep, two, male and female; of the goats, two, male and female; of the oxen, two, male and female; and of the camels, two, male and female). He creates you in the wombs of your mothers, creation after creation in three veils of darkness, such is Allah your Lord. His is the kingdom, La ilaha illa Huwa (none has the right to be worshipped but He). How then are you turned away?
items.secondaryText: خَلَقَكُم مِّن نَّفْسٍۢ وَٰحِدَةٍۢ ثُمَّ جَعَلَ مِنْهَا زَوْجَهَا وَأَنزَلَ لَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَنْعَٰمِ ثَمَٰنِيَةَ أَزْوَٰجٍۢ ۚ يَخْلُقُكُمْ فِى بُطُونِ أُمَّهَٰتِكُمْ خَلْقًۭا مِّنۢ بَعْدِ خَلْقٍۢ فِى ظُلُمَٰتٍۢ ثَلَٰثٍۢ ۚ ذَٰلِكُمُ ٱللَّهُ رَبُّكُمْ لَهُ ٱلْمُلْكُ ۖ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۖ فَأَنَّىٰ تُصْرَفُونَ

items.text: If you disbelieve, then verily, Allah is not in need of you, He likes not disbelief for His slaves. And if you are grateful (by being believers), He is pleased therewith for you. No bearer of burdens shall bear the burden of another. Then to your Lord is your return, so He will inform you what you used to do. Verily, He is the All-Knower of that which is in (men's) breasts.
items.secondaryText: إِن تَكْفُرُوا۟ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ غَنِىٌّ عَنكُمْ ۖ وَلَا يَرْضَىٰ لِعِبَادِهِ ٱلْكُفْرَ ۖ وَإِن تَشْكُرُوا۟ يَرْضَهُ لَكُمْ ۗ وَلَا تَزِرُ وَازِرَةٌۭ وِزْرَ أُخْرَىٰ ۗ ثُمَّ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكُم مَّرْجِعُكُمْ فَيُنَبِّئُكُم بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ عَلِيمٌۢ بِذَاتِ ٱلصُّدُورِ

items.text: And when some hurt touches man, he cries to his Lord (Allah Alone), turning to Him in repentance, but when He bestows a favour upon him from Himself, he forgets that for which he cried for before, and he sets up rivals to Allah, in order to mislead others from His Path. Say: "Take pleasure in your disbelief for a while: surely, you are (one) of the dwellers of the Fire!"
