items.text: And that to your Lord (Allah) is the End (Return of everything).
items.secondaryText: وَأَنَّ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ ٱلْمُنتَهَىٰ

items.text: And that it is He (Allah) Who makes (whom He wills) laugh, and makes (whom He wills) weep;
items.secondaryText: وَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ أَضْحَكَ وَأَبْكَىٰ

items.text: And that it is He (Allah) Who causes death and gives life;
items.secondaryText: وَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ أَمَاتَ وَأَحْيَا

items.text: And that He (Allah) creates the pairs, male and female,
items.secondaryText: وَأَنَّهُۥ خَلَقَ ٱلزَّوْجَيْنِ ٱلذَّكَرَ وَٱلْأُنثَىٰ

items.text: From Nutfah (drops of semen male and female discharges) when it is emitted;
items.secondaryText: مِن نُّطْفَةٍ إِذَا تُمْنَىٰ

items.text: And that upon Him (Allah) is another bringing forth (Resurrection);
items.secondaryText: وَأَنَّ عَلَيْهِ ٱلنَّشْأَةَ ٱلْأُخْرَىٰ

items.text: And that it is He (Allah) Who gives much or a little (or gives wealth and contentment),
items.secondaryText: وَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ أَغْنَىٰ وَأَقْنَىٰ

items.text: And that He (Allah) is the Lord of Sirius (the star which the pagan Arabs used to worship);
items.secondaryText: وَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ رَبُّ ٱلشِّعْرَىٰ

items.text: And that it is He (Allah) Who destroyed the former 'Ad (people),
items.secondaryText: وَأَنَّهُۥٓ أَهْلَكَ عَادًا ٱلْأُولَىٰ

items.text: And Thamud (people). He spared none of them.
items.secondaryText: وَثَمُودَا۟ فَمَآ أَبْقَىٰ

items.text: And the people of Nuh (Noah) aforetime, verily, they were more unjust and more rebellious and transgressing [in disobeying Allah and His Messenger Nuh (Noah)].
items.secondaryText: وَقَوْمَ نُوحٍۢ مِّن قَبْلُ ۖ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ هُمْ أَظْلَمَ وَأَطْغَىٰ

items.text: And He destroyed the overthrown cities [of Sodom to which Prophet Lout (Lot) was sent].
items.secondaryText: وَٱلْمُؤْتَفِكَةَ أَهْوَىٰ

items.text: So there covered them that which did cover (i.e. torment with stones).
items.secondaryText: فَغَشَّىٰهَا مَا غَشَّىٰ

items.text: Then which of the Graces of your Lord (O man!) will you doubt.
items.secondaryText: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكَ تَتَمَارَىٰ

items.text: This (Muhammad SAW) is a warner (Messenger) of the (series of) warners (Messengers) of old.
items.secondaryText: هَٰذَا نَذِيرٌۭ مِّنَ ٱلنُّذُرِ ٱلْأُولَىٰٓ

items.text: The Day of Resurrection draws near,
items.secondaryText: أَزِفَتِ ٱلْءَازِفَةُ

items.text: None besides Allah can avert it, (or advance it, or delay it).
items.secondaryText: لَيْسَ لَهَا مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ كَاشِفَةٌ

items.text: Do you then wonder at this recital (the Quran)?
items.secondaryText: أَفَمِنْ هَٰذَا ٱلْحَدِيثِ تَعْجَبُونَ

items.text: And you laugh at it and weep not,
items.secondaryText: وَتَضْحَكُونَ وَلَا تَبْكُونَ

items.text: Wasting your (precious) lifetime in pastime and amusements (singing, etc.).
items.secondaryText: وَأَنتُمْ سَٰمِدُونَ

items.text: So fall you down in prostration to Allah, and worship Him (Alone).
items.secondaryText: فَٱسْجُدُوا۟ لِلَّهِ وَٱعْبُدُوا۟ ۩

items.text: The Hour has drawn near, and the moon has been cleft asunder (the people of Makkah requested Prophet Muhammad SAW to show them a miracle, so he showed them the splitting of the moon).
items.secondaryText: ٱقْتَرَبَتِ ٱلسَّاعَةُ وَٱنشَقَّ ٱلْقَمَرُ

items.text: And if they see a sign, they turn away, and say: "This is continuous magic."
items.secondaryText: وَإِن يَرَوْا۟ ءَايَةًۭ يُعْرِضُوا۟ وَيَقُولُوا۟ سِحْرٌۭ مُّسْتَمِرٌّۭ

items.text: They belied (the Verses of Allah, this Quran), and followed their own lusts. And every matter will be settled [according to the kind of deeds (for the doer of good deeds, his deeds will take him to Paradise, and similarly evil deeds will take their doers to Hell)].
items.secondaryText: وَكَذَّبُوا۟ وَٱتَّبَعُوٓا۟ أَهْوَآءَهُمْ ۚ وَكُلُّ أَمْرٍۢ مُّسْتَقِرٌّۭ

items.text: And indeed there has come to them news (in this Quran) wherein there is (enough warning) to check (them from evil),
items.secondaryText: وَلَقَدْ جَآءَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَنۢبَآءِ مَا فِيهِ مُزْدَجَرٌ

items.text: Perfect wisdom (this Quran), but (the preaching of) warners benefit them not,
items.secondaryText: حِكْمَةٌۢ بَٰلِغَةٌۭ ۖ فَمَا تُغْنِ ٱلنُّذُرُ

items.text: So (O Muhammad SAW) withdraw from them. The Day that the caller will call (them) to a terrible thing.
items.secondaryText: فَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ ۘ يَوْمَ يَدْعُ ٱلدَّاعِ إِلَىٰ شَىْءٍۢ نُّكُرٍ

items.text: They will come forth, with humbled eyes from (their) graves as if they were locusts spread abroad,
items.secondaryText: خُشَّعًا أَبْصَٰرُهُمْ يَخْرُجُونَ مِنَ ٱلْأَجْدَاثِ كَأَنَّهُمْ جَرَادٌۭ مُّنتَشِرٌۭ

items.text: Hastening towards the caller, the disbelievers will say: "This is a hard Day."
items.secondaryText: مُّهْطِعِينَ إِلَى ٱلدَّاعِ ۖ يَقُولُ ٱلْكَٰفِرُونَ هَٰذَا يَوْمٌ عَسِرٌۭ

items.text: The people of Nuh (Noah) denied (their Messenger) before them, they rejected Our slave, and said: "A madman!" and he was insolently rebuked and threatened.
items.secondaryText: ۞ كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍۢ فَكَذَّبُوا۟ عَبْدَنَا وَقَالُوا۟ مَجْنُونٌۭ وَٱزْدُجِرَ

items.text: Then he invoked his Lord (saying): "I have been overcome, so help (me)!"
items.secondaryText: فَدَعَا رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّى مَغْلُوبٌۭ فَٱنتَصِرْ

items.text: So We opened the gates of heaven with water pouring forth.
items.secondaryText: فَفَتَحْنَآ أَبْوَٰبَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ بِمَآءٍۢ مُّنْهَمِرٍۢ

items.text: And We caused the earth to gush forth with springs. So the waters (of the heaven and the earth) met for a matter predestined.
items.secondaryText: وَفَجَّرْنَا ٱلْأَرْضَ عُيُونًۭا فَٱلْتَقَى ٱلْمَآءُ عَلَىٰٓ أَمْرٍۢ قَدْ قُدِرَ

items.text: And We carried him on a (ship) made of planks and nails,
items.secondaryText: وَحَمَلْنَٰهُ عَلَىٰ ذَاتِ أَلْوَٰحٍۢ وَدُسُرٍۢ

items.text: Floating under Our Eyes, a reward for him who had been rejected!
items.secondaryText: تَجْرِى بِأَعْيُنِنَا جَزَآءًۭ لِّمَن كَانَ كُفِرَ

items.text: And indeed, We have left this as a sign, then is there any that will remember (or receive admonition)?
items.secondaryText: وَلَقَد تَّرَكْنَٰهَآ ءَايَةًۭ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍۢ

items.text: Then how (terrible) was My Torment and My Warnings?
items.secondaryText: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ

items.text: And We have indeed made the Quran easy to understand and remember, then is there any that will remember (or receive admonition)?
items.secondaryText: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍۢ

items.text: 'Ad (people) belied (their Prophet, Hud), then how (terrible) was My Torment and My Warnings?
items.secondaryText: كَذَّبَتْ عَادٌۭ فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ

items.text: Verily, We sent against them a furious wind of harsh voice on a day of evil omen and continuous calamity.
items.secondaryText: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ رِيحًۭا صَرْصَرًۭا فِى يَوْمِ نَحْسٍۢ مُّسْتَمِرٍّۢ

items.text: Plucking out men as if they were uprooted stems of date-palms.
items.secondaryText: تَنزِعُ ٱلنَّاسَ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍۢ مُّنقَعِرٍۢ

items.text: Then, how (terrible) was My Torment and My Warnings?
items.secondaryText: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ

items.text: And We have indeed made the Quran easy to understand and remember, then is there any that will remember (or receive admonition)?
items.secondaryText: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍۢ

items.text: Thamud (people also) belied the warnings.
items.secondaryText: كَذَّبَتْ ثَمُودُ بِٱلنُّذُرِ

items.text: For they said: "A man! Alone from among us, that we are to follow? Truly, then we should be in error and distress or madness!"
items.secondaryText: فَقَالُوٓا۟ أَبَشَرًۭا مِّنَّا وَٰحِدًۭا نَّتَّبِعُهُۥٓ إِنَّآ إِذًۭا لَّفِى ضَلَٰلٍۢ وَسُعُرٍ

items.text: "Is it that the Reminder is sent to him [Prophet Salih (Saleh)] alone from among us? Nay, he is an insolent liar!"
items.secondaryText: أَءُلْقِىَ ٱلذِّكْرُ عَلَيْهِ مِنۢ بَيْنِنَا بَلْ هُوَ كَذَّابٌ أَشِرٌۭ

items.text: Tomorrow they will come to know, who is the liar, the insolent one!
items.secondaryText: سَيَعْلَمُونَ غَدًۭا مَّنِ ٱلْكَذَّابُ ٱلْأَشِرُ

items.text: Verily, We are sending the she-camel as a test for them. So watch them [O Salih (Saleh)], and be patient!
items.secondaryText: إِنَّا مُرْسِلُوا۟ ٱلنَّاقَةِ فِتْنَةًۭ لَّهُمْ فَٱرْتَقِبْهُمْ وَٱصْطَبِرْ

items.text: And inform them that the water is to be shared between (her and) them. Each one's right to drink being established (by turns).
items.secondaryText: وَنَبِّئْهُمْ أَنَّ ٱلْمَآءَ قِسْمَةٌۢ بَيْنَهُمْ ۖ كُلُّ شِرْبٍۢ مُّحْتَضَرٌۭ

items.text: But they called their comrade and he took (a sword) and killed (her).
items.secondaryText: فَنَادَوْا۟ صَاحِبَهُمْ فَتَعَاطَىٰ فَعَقَرَ

items.text: Then, how (terrible) was My Torment and My Warnings?
items.secondaryText: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ

items.text: Verily, We sent against them a single Saihah (torment - awful cry, etc.), and they became like the dry stubble of a fold-builder.
items.secondaryText: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ صَيْحَةًۭ وَٰحِدَةًۭ فَكَانُوا۟ كَهَشِيمِ ٱلْمُحْتَظِرِ

items.text: And indeed, We have made the Quran easy to understand and remember, then is there any that will remember (or receive admonition)?
items.secondaryText: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍۢ

items.text: The people of Lout (Lot) belied the warnings.
items.secondaryText: كَذَّبَتْ قَوْمُ لُوطٍۭ بِٱلنُّذُرِ

items.text: Verily, We sent against them a violent storm of stones (which destroyed them all), except the family of Lout (Lot), whom We saved in last hour of the night,
items.secondaryText: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ حَاصِبًا إِلَّآ ءَالَ لُوطٍۢ ۖ نَّجَّيْنَٰهُم بِسَحَرٍۢ

items.text: As a Favour from Us, thus do We reward him who gives thanks (by obeying Us).
items.secondaryText: نِّعْمَةًۭ مِّنْ عِندِنَا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى مَن شَكَرَ

items.text: And he [Lout (Lot)] indeed had warned them of Our Grasp, but they did doubt the warnings!
items.secondaryText: وَلَقَدْ أَنذَرَهُم بَطْشَتَنَا فَتَمَارَوْا۟ بِٱلنُّذُرِ

items.text: And they indeed sought to shame his guest (by asking to commit sodomy with them). So We blinded their eyes, "Then taste you My Torment and My Warnings."
items.secondaryText: وَلَقَدْ رَٰوَدُوهُ عَن ضَيْفِهِۦ فَطَمَسْنَآ أَعْيُنَهُمْ فَذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ

items.text: And verily, an abiding torment seized them early in the morning.
items.secondaryText: وَلَقَدْ صَبَّحَهُم بُكْرَةً عَذَابٌۭ مُّسْتَقِرٌّۭ

items.text: "Then taste you My Torment and My Warnings."
items.secondaryText: فَذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ

items.text: And indeed, We have made the Quran easy to understand and remember, then is there any that will remember (or receive admonition)?
items.secondaryText: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍۢ

items.text: And indeed, warnings came to the people of Fir'aun (Pharaoh) [through Musa (Moses) and Harun (Aaron)].
items.secondaryText: وَلَقَدْ جَآءَ ءَالَ فِرْعَوْنَ ٱلنُّذُرُ

items.text: (They) belied all Our Signs, so We seized them with a Seizure of the All-Mighty, All-Capable to carry out what he Will (Omnipotent).
items.secondaryText: كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا كُلِّهَا فَأَخَذْنَٰهُمْ أَخْذَ عَزِيزٍۢ مُّقْتَدِرٍ

items.text: Are your disbelievers (O Quraish!) better than these [nations of Nuh (Noah), Lout (Lot), Salih (Saleh), and the people of Fir'aun (Pharaoh), etc., who were destroyed)? Or have you an immunity (against Our Torment) in the Divine Scriptures?
items.secondaryText: أَكُفَّارُكُمْ خَيْرٌۭ مِّنْ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكُمْ أَمْ لَكُم بَرَآءَةٌۭ فِى ٱلزُّبُرِ

items.text: Or do they say: "We are a great multitude, and we shall be victorious?"
items.secondaryText: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ نَحْنُ جَمِيعٌۭ مُّنتَصِرٌۭ

items.text: Their multitude will be put to flight, and they will show their backs.
items.secondaryText: سَيُهْزَمُ ٱلْجَمْعُ وَيُوَلُّونَ ٱلدُّبُرَ

items.text: Nay, but the Hour is their appointed time (for their full recompense), and the Hour will be more grievous and more bitter.
items.secondaryText: بَلِ ٱلسَّاعَةُ مَوْعِدُهُمْ وَٱلسَّاعَةُ أَدْهَىٰ وَأَمَرُّ

items.text: Verily, the Mujrimun (polytheists, disbelievers, sinners, criminals, etc.) are in error (in this world) and will burn (in the Hell-fire in the Hereafter).
items.secondaryText: إِنَّ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ فِى ضَلَٰلٍۢ وَسُعُرٍۢ

items.text: The Day they will be dragged in the Fire on their faces (it will be said to them): "Taste you the touch of Hell!"
items.secondaryText: يَوْمَ يُسْحَبُونَ فِى ٱلنَّارِ عَلَىٰ وُجُوهِهِمْ ذُوقُوا۟ مَسَّ سَقَرَ

items.text: Verily, We have created all things with Qadar (Divine Preordainments of all things before their creation, as written in the Book of Decrees Al-Lauh Al-Mahfuz).
items.secondaryText: إِنَّا كُلَّ شَىْءٍ خَلَقْنَٰهُ بِقَدَرٍۢ

items.text: And Our Commandment is but one, as the twinkling of an eye.
items.secondaryText: وَمَآ أَمْرُنَآ إِلَّا وَٰحِدَةٌۭ كَلَمْحٍۭ بِٱلْبَصَرِ

items.text: And indeed, We have destroyed your likes, then is there any that will remember (or receive admonition)?
items.secondaryText: وَلَقَدْ أَهْلَكْنَآ أَشْيَاعَكُمْ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍۢ

items.text: And each and everything they have done is noted in (their) Records (of deeds).
items.secondaryText: وَكُلُّ شَىْءٍۢ فَعَلُوهُ فِى ٱلزُّبُرِ

items.text: And everything, small and big is written (in Al-Lauh Al-Mahfuz already beforehand i.e. before it befalls, or is done by its doer) (See the Quran V. 57:22).
items.secondaryText: وَكُلُّ صَغِيرٍۢ وَكَبِيرٍۢ مُّسْتَطَرٌ

items.text: Verily, The Muttaqun (pious), will be in the midst of Gardens and Rivers (Paradise).
items.secondaryText: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّٰتٍۢ وَنَهَرٍۢ

items.text: In a seat of truth (i.e. Paradise), near the Omnipotent King (Allah, the All-Blessed, the Most High, the Owner of Majesty and Honour).
items.secondaryText: فِى مَقْعَدِ صِدْقٍ عِندَ مَلِيكٍۢ مُّقْتَدِرٍۭ

items.text: The Most Beneficent (Allah)!
items.secondaryText: ٱلرَّحْمَٰنُ

items.text: Has taught (you mankind) the Quran (by His Mercy).
items.secondaryText: عَلَّمَ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ

items.text: He created man.
items.secondaryText: خَلَقَ ٱلْإِنسَٰنَ

items.text: He taught him eloquent speech.
items.secondaryText: عَلَّمَهُ ٱلْبَيَانَ

items.text: The sun and the moon run on their fixed courses (exactly) calculated with measured out stages for each (for reckoning, etc.).
items.secondaryText: ٱلشَّمْسُ وَٱلْقَمَرُ بِحُسْبَانٍۢ

items.text: And the herbs (or stars) and the trees both prostrate.
items.secondaryText: وَٱلنَّجْمُ وَٱلشَّجَرُ يَسْجُدَانِ

items.text: And the heaven He has raised high, and He has set up the Balance.
items.secondaryText: وَٱلسَّمَآءَ رَفَعَهَا وَوَضَعَ ٱلْمِيزَانَ

items.text: In order that you may not transgress (due) balance.
items.secondaryText: أَلَّا تَطْغَوْا۟ فِى ٱلْمِيزَانِ

items.text: And observe the weight with equity and do not make the balance deficient.
items.secondaryText: وَأَقِيمُوا۟ ٱلْوَزْنَ بِٱلْقِسْطِ وَلَا تُخْسِرُوا۟ ٱلْمِيزَانَ

items.text: And the earth He has put for the creatures.
items.secondaryText: وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَضَعَهَا لِلْأَنَامِ

items.text: Therein are fruits, date-palms producing sheathed fruit-stalks (enclosing dates).
items.secondaryText: فِيهَا فَٰكِهَةٌۭ وَٱلنَّخْلُ ذَاتُ ٱلْأَكْمَامِ

items.text: And also corn, with (its) leaves and stalk for fodder, and sweet-scented plants.
items.secondaryText: وَٱلْحَبُّ ذُو ٱلْعَصْفِ وَٱلرَّيْحَانُ

items.text: Then which of the Blessings of your Lord will you both (jinns and men) deny?
items.secondaryText: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

items.text: He created man (Adam) from sounding clay like the clay of pottery.
items.secondaryText: خَلَقَ ٱلْإِنسَٰنَ مِن صَلْصَٰلٍۢ كَٱلْفَخَّارِ

items.text: And the jinns did He create from a smokeless flame of fire.
items.secondaryText: وَخَلَقَ ٱلْجَآنَّ مِن مَّارِجٍۢ مِّن نَّارٍۢ

items.text: Then which of the Blessings of your Lord will you both (jinns and men) deny?
items.secondaryText: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

items.text: (He is) the Lord of the two easts (places of sunrise during early summer and early winter) and the Lord of the two wests (places of sunset during early summer and early winter).
items.secondaryText: رَبُّ ٱلْمَشْرِقَيْنِ وَرَبُّ ٱلْمَغْرِبَيْنِ

items.text: Then which of the Blessings of your Lord will you both (jinns and men) deny?
items.secondaryText: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

items.text: He has let loosed the two seas (the salt water and the sweet) meeting together.
items.secondaryText: مَرَجَ ٱلْبَحْرَيْنِ يَلْتَقِيَانِ

items.text: Between them is a barrier which none of them can transgress.
items.secondaryText: بَيْنَهُمَا بَرْزَخٌۭ لَّا يَبْغِيَانِ

items.text: Then which of the Blessings of your Lord will you both (jinns and men) deny?
items.secondaryText: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

items.text: Out of them both come out pearl and coral.
items.secondaryText: يَخْرُجُ مِنْهُمَا ٱللُّؤْلُؤُ وَٱلْمَرْجَانُ

items.text: Then which of the Blessings of your Lord will you both (jinns and men) deny?
items.secondaryText: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

items.text: And His are the ships going and coming in the seas, like mountains.
items.secondaryText: وَلَهُ ٱلْجَوَارِ ٱلْمُنشَـَٔاتُ فِى ٱلْبَحْرِ كَٱلْأَعْلَٰمِ

items.text: Then which of the Blessings of your Lord will you both (jinns and men) deny?
items.secondaryText: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

items.text: Whatsoever is on it (the earth) will perish.
items.secondaryText: كُلُّ مَنْ عَلَيْهَا فَانٍۢ

items.text: And the Face of your Lord full of Majesty and Honour will abide forever.
items.secondaryText: وَيَبْقَىٰ وَجْهُ رَبِّكَ ذُو ٱلْجَلَٰلِ وَٱلْإِكْرَامِ

items.text: Then which of the Blessings of your Lord will you both (jinns and men) deny?
items.secondaryText: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

items.text: Whosoever is in the heavens and on earth begs of Him (its needs from Him). Every day He has a matter to bring forth (such as giving honour to some, disgrace to some, life to some, death to some, etc.)!
items.secondaryText: يَسْـَٔلُهُۥ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ هُوَ فِى شَأْنٍۢ

items.text: Then which of the Blessings of your Lord will you both (jinns and men) deny?
items.secondaryText: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

items.text: We shall attend to you, O you two classes (jinns and men)!
items.secondaryText: سَنَفْرُغُ لَكُمْ أَيُّهَ ٱلثَّقَلَانِ

items.text: Then which of the Blessings of your Lord will you both (jinns and men) deny?
items.secondaryText: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

items.text: O assembly of jinns and men! If you have power to pass beyond the zones of the heavens and the earth, then pass (them)! But you will never be able to pass them, except with authority (from Allah)!
items.secondaryText: يَٰمَعْشَرَ ٱلْجِنِّ وَٱلْإِنسِ إِنِ ٱسْتَطَعْتُمْ أَن تَنفُذُوا۟ مِنْ أَقْطَارِ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ فَٱنفُذُوا۟ ۚ لَا تَنفُذُونَ إِلَّا بِسُلْطَٰنٍۢ

items.text: Then which of the Blessings of your Lord will you both (jinns and men) deny?
items.secondaryText: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

items.text: There will be sent against you both, smokeless flames of fire and (molten) brass, and you will not be able to defend yourselves.
items.secondaryText: يُرْسَلُ عَلَيْكُمَا شُوَاظٌۭ مِّن نَّارٍۢ وَنُحَاسٌۭ فَلَا تَنتَصِرَانِ

items.text: Then which of the Blessings of your Lord will you both (jinns and men) deny?
items.secondaryText: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

items.text: Then when the heaven is rent asunder, and it becomes rosy or red like red-oil, or red hide.
items.secondaryText: فَإِذَا ٱنشَقَّتِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ فَكَانَتْ وَرْدَةًۭ كَٱلدِّهَانِ

items.text: Then which of the Blessings of your Lord will you both (jinns and men) deny?
items.secondaryText: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

items.text: So on that Day no question will be asked of man or jinn as to his sin, (because they have already been known from their faces either white or black).
items.secondaryText: فَيَوْمَئِذٍۢ لَّا يُسْـَٔلُ عَن ذَنۢبِهِۦٓ إِنسٌۭ وَلَا جَآنٌّۭ

items.text: Then which of the Blessings of your Lord will you both (jinns and men) deny?
items.secondaryText: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

items.text: The Mujrimun (polytheists, criminals, sinners, etc.) will be known by their marks (black faces), and they will be seized by their forelocks and their feet.
items.secondaryText: يُعْرَفُ ٱلْمُجْرِمُونَ بِسِيمَٰهُمْ فَيُؤْخَذُ بِٱلنَّوَٰصِى وَٱلْأَقْدَامِ

items.text: Then which of the Blessings of your Lord will you both (jinns and men) deny?
items.secondaryText: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

items.text: This is Hell which the Mujrimun (polytheists, criminals, sinners, etc.) denied.
items.secondaryText: هَٰذِهِۦ جَهَنَّمُ ٱلَّتِى يُكَذِّبُ بِهَا ٱلْمُجْرِمُونَ

items.text: They will go between it (Hell) and the boiling hot water!
items.secondaryText: يَطُوفُونَ بَيْنَهَا وَبَيْنَ حَمِيمٍ ءَانٍۢ

items.text: Then which of the Blessings of your Lord will you both (jinns and men) deny?
items.secondaryText: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

items.text: But for him who [the true believer of Islamic Monotheism who performs all the duties ordained by Allah and His Messenger Muhammad SAW, and keeps away (abstain) from all kinds of sin and evil deeds prohibited in Islam and] fears the standing before his Lord, there will be two Gardens (i.e. in Paradise).
items.secondaryText: وَلِمَنْ خَافَ مَقَامَ رَبِّهِۦ جَنَّتَانِ

items.text: Then which of the Blessings of your Lord will you both (jinns and men) deny?
items.secondaryText: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

items.text: With spreading branches;
items.secondaryText: ذَوَاتَآ أَفْنَانٍۢ

items.text: Then which of the Blessings of your Lord will you both (jinns and men) deny?
items.secondaryText: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

items.text: In them (both) will be two springs flowing (free)
items.secondaryText: فِيهِمَا عَيْنَانِ تَجْرِيَانِ

items.text: Then which of the Blessings of your Lord will you both (jinns and men) deny?
items.secondaryText: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

items.text: In them (both) will be every kind of fruit in pairs.
items.secondaryText: فِيهِمَا مِن كُلِّ فَٰكِهَةٍۢ زَوْجَانِ

items.text: Then which of the Blessings of your Lord will you both (jinns and men) deny?
items.secondaryText: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

items.text: Reclining upon the couches lined with silk brocade, and the fruits of the two Gardens will be near at hand.
items.secondaryText: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَىٰ فُرُشٍۭ بَطَآئِنُهَا مِنْ إِسْتَبْرَقٍۢ ۚ وَجَنَى ٱلْجَنَّتَيْنِ دَانٍۢ

items.text: Then which of the Blessings of your Lord will you both (jinns and men) deny?
items.secondaryText: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

items.text: Wherein both will be those (maidens) restraining their glances upon their husbands, whom no man or jinn yatmithhunna (has opened their hymens with sexual intercourse) before them.
items.secondaryText: فِيهِنَّ قَٰصِرَٰتُ ٱلطَّرْفِ لَمْ يَطْمِثْهُنَّ إِنسٌۭ قَبْلَهُمْ وَلَا جَآنٌّۭ

items.text: Then which of the Blessings of your Lord will you both (jinns and men) deny?
items.secondaryText: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

items.text: (In beauty) they are like rubies and coral.
items.secondaryText: كَأَنَّهُنَّ ٱلْيَاقُوتُ وَٱلْمَرْجَانُ

items.text: Then which of the Blessings of your Lord will you both (jinns and men) deny?
items.secondaryText: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

items.text: Is there any reward for good other than good?
items.secondaryText: هَلْ جَزَآءُ ٱلْإِحْسَٰنِ إِلَّا ٱلْإِحْسَٰنُ

items.text: Then which of the Blessings of your Lord will you both (jinns and men) deny?
items.secondaryText: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

items.text: And besides these two, there are two other Gardens (i.e. in Paradise).
items.secondaryText: وَمِن دُونِهِمَا جَنَّتَانِ

items.text: Then which of the Blessings of your Lord will you both (jinns and men) deny?
items.secondaryText: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

items.text: Dark green (in colour).
items.secondaryText: مُدْهَآمَّتَانِ

items.text: Then which of the Blessings of your Lord will you both (jinns and men) deny?
items.secondaryText: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

items.text: In them (both) will be two springs gushing forth water.
items.secondaryText: فِيهِمَا عَيْنَانِ نَضَّاخَتَانِ

items.text: Then which of the Blessings of your Lord will you both (jinns and men) deny?
items.secondaryText: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

items.text: In them (both) will be fruits, and date- palms and pomegranates.
items.secondaryText: فِيهِمَا فَٰكِهَةٌۭ وَنَخْلٌۭ وَرُمَّانٌۭ

items.text: Then which of the Blessings of your Lord will you both (jinns and men) deny?
items.secondaryText: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

items.text: Therein (gardens) will be fair (wives) good and beautiful;
items.secondaryText: فِيهِنَّ خَيْرَٰتٌ حِسَانٌۭ

items.text: Then which of the Blessings of your Lord will you both (jinns and men) deny?
items.secondaryText: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

items.text: Houris (beautiful, fair females) restrained in pavilions;
items.secondaryText: حُورٌۭ مَّقْصُورَٰتٌۭ فِى ٱلْخِيَامِ

items.text: Then which of the Blessings of your Lord will you both (jinns and men) deny?
items.secondaryText: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

items.text: Whom no man or jinn yatmithhunna (has opened their hymens with sexual intercourse) before them.
items.secondaryText: لَمْ يَطْمِثْهُنَّ إِنسٌۭ قَبْلَهُمْ وَلَا جَآنٌّۭ

items.text: Then which of the Blessings of your Lord will you both (jinns and men) deny?
items.secondaryText: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

items.text: Reclining on green cushions and rich beautiful mattresses.
items.secondaryText: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَىٰ رَفْرَفٍ خُضْرٍۢ وَعَبْقَرِىٍّ حِسَانٍۢ

items.text: Then which of the Blessings of your Lord will you both (jinns and men) deny?
items.secondaryText: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

items.text: Blessed be the Name of your Lord (Allah), the Owner of Majesty and Honour.
items.secondaryText: تَبَٰرَكَ ٱسْمُ رَبِّكَ ذِى ٱلْجَلَٰلِ وَٱلْإِكْرَامِ

items.text: When the Event (i.e. the Day of Resurrection) befalls.
items.secondaryText: إِذَا وَقَعَتِ ٱلْوَاقِعَةُ

items.text: And there can be no denying of its befalling.
items.secondaryText: لَيْسَ لِوَقْعَتِهَا كَاذِبَةٌ

items.text: It will bring low (some); (and others) it will exalt;
items.secondaryText: خَافِضَةٌۭ رَّافِعَةٌ

items.text: When the earth will be shaken with a terrible shake.
items.secondaryText: إِذَا رُجَّتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ رَجًّۭا

items.text: And the mountains will be powdered to dust.
items.secondaryText: وَبُسَّتِ ٱلْجِبَالُ بَسًّۭا

items.text: So that they will become floating dust particles.
items.secondaryText: فَكَانَتْ هَبَآءًۭ مُّنۢبَثًّۭا

items.text: And you (all) will be in three kinds (i.e. separate groups).
items.secondaryText: وَكُنتُمْ أَزْوَٰجًۭا ثَلَٰثَةًۭ

items.text: So those on the Right Hand (i.e. those who will be given their Records in their right hands), Who will be those on the Right Hand? (As a respect for them, because they will enter Paradise).
items.secondaryText: فَأَصْحَٰبُ ٱلْمَيْمَنَةِ مَآ أَصْحَٰبُ ٱلْمَيْمَنَةِ

items.text: And those on the Left Hand (i.e. those who will be given their Record in their left hands), Who will be those on the Left Hand? (As a disgrace for them, because they will enter Hell).
items.secondaryText: وَأَصْحَٰبُ ٱلْمَشْـَٔمَةِ مَآ أَصْحَٰبُ ٱلْمَشْـَٔمَةِ

items.text: And those foremost [(in Islamic Faith of Monotheism and in performing righteous deeds) in the life of this world on the very first call for to embrace Islam,] will be foremost (in Paradise).
items.secondaryText: وَٱلسَّٰبِقُونَ ٱلسَّٰبِقُونَ

items.text: These will be those nearest to Allah.
items.secondaryText: أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ ٱلْمُقَرَّبُونَ

items.text: In the Gardens of delight (Paradise).
items.secondaryText: فِى جَنَّٰتِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ

items.text: A multitude of those (foremost) will be from the first generations (who embraced Islam).
items.secondaryText: ثُلَّةٌۭ مِّنَ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ

items.text: And a few of those (foremost) will be from the later time (generations).
items.secondaryText: وَقَلِيلٌۭ مِّنَ ٱلْءَاخِرِينَ

items.text: (They will be) on thrones woven with gold and precious stones,
items.secondaryText: عَلَىٰ سُرُرٍۢ مَّوْضُونَةٍۢ

items.text: Reclining thereon, face to face.
items.secondaryText: مُّتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَيْهَا مُتَقَٰبِلِينَ

items.text: They will be served by immortal boys,
items.secondaryText: يَطُوفُ عَلَيْهِمْ وِلْدَٰنٌۭ مُّخَلَّدُونَ

items.text: With cups, and jugs, and a glass from the flowing wine,
items.secondaryText: بِأَكْوَابٍۢ وَأَبَارِيقَ وَكَأْسٍۢ مِّن مَّعِينٍۢ

items.text: Wherefrom they will get neither any aching of the head, nor any intoxication.
items.secondaryText: لَّا يُصَدَّعُونَ عَنْهَا وَلَا يُنزِفُونَ

items.text: And fruit; that they may choose.
items.secondaryText: وَفَٰكِهَةٍۢ مِّمَّا يَتَخَيَّرُونَ

items.text: And the flesh of fowls that they desire.
items.secondaryText: وَلَحْمِ طَيْرٍۢ مِّمَّا يَشْتَهُونَ

items.text: And (there will be) Houris (fair females) with wide, lovely eyes (as wives for the pious),
items.secondaryText: وَحُورٌ عِينٌۭ

items.text: Like unto preserved pearls.
items.secondaryText: كَأَمْثَٰلِ ٱللُّؤْلُؤِ ٱلْمَكْنُونِ

items.text: A reward for what they used to do.
items.secondaryText: جَزَآءًۢ بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَعْمَلُونَ

items.text: No Laghw (dirty, false, evil vain talk) will they hear therein, nor any sinful speech (like backbiting, etc.).
items.secondaryText: لَا يَسْمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغْوًۭا وَلَا تَأْثِيمًا

items.text: But only the saying of: Salam!, Salam! (greetings with peace)!
items.secondaryText: إِلَّا قِيلًۭا سَلَٰمًۭا سَلَٰمًۭا

items.text: And those on the Right Hand, Who will be those on the Right Hand?
items.secondaryText: وَأَصْحَٰبُ ٱلْيَمِينِ مَآ أَصْحَٰبُ ٱلْيَمِينِ

items.text: (They will be) among thornless lote-trees,
items.secondaryText: فِى سِدْرٍۢ مَّخْضُودٍۢ

items.text: Among Talh (banana-trees) with fruits piled one above another,
items.secondaryText: وَطَلْحٍۢ مَّنضُودٍۢ

items.text: In shade long-extended,
items.secondaryText: وَظِلٍّۢ مَّمْدُودٍۢ

items.text: By water flowing constantly,
items.secondaryText: وَمَآءٍۢ مَّسْكُوبٍۢ

items.text: And fruit in plenty,
items.secondaryText: وَفَٰكِهَةٍۢ كَثِيرَةٍۢ

items.text: Whose season is not limited, and their supply will not be cut off,
items.secondaryText: لَّا مَقْطُوعَةٍۢ وَلَا مَمْنُوعَةٍۢ

items.text: And on couches or thrones, raised high.
items.secondaryText: وَفُرُشٍۢ مَّرْفُوعَةٍ

items.text: Verily, We have created them (maidens) of special creation.
items.secondaryText: إِنَّآ أَنشَأْنَٰهُنَّ إِنشَآءًۭ

items.text: And made them virgins.
items.secondaryText: فَجَعَلْنَٰهُنَّ أَبْكَارًا

items.text: Loving (their husbands only), equal in age.
items.secondaryText: عُرُبًا أَتْرَابًۭا

items.text: For those on the Right Hand.
items.secondaryText: لِّأَصْحَٰبِ ٱلْيَمِينِ

items.text: A multitude of those (on the Right Hand) will be from the first generation (who embraced Islam).
items.secondaryText: ثُلَّةٌۭ مِّنَ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ

items.text: And a multitude of those (on the Right Hand) will be from the later times (generations).
items.secondaryText: وَثُلَّةٌۭ مِّنَ ٱلْءَاخِرِينَ

items.text: And those on the Left Hand Who will be those on the Left Hand?
items.secondaryText: وَأَصْحَٰبُ ٱلشِّمَالِ مَآ أَصْحَٰبُ ٱلشِّمَالِ

items.text: In fierce hot wind and boiling water,
items.secondaryText: فِى سَمُومٍۢ وَحَمِيمٍۢ

items.text: And shadow of black smoke,
items.secondaryText: وَظِلٍّۢ مِّن يَحْمُومٍۢ

items.text: (That shadow) neither cool, nor (even) good,
items.secondaryText: لَّا بَارِدٍۢ وَلَا كَرِيمٍ

items.text: Verily, before that, they indulged in luxury,
items.secondaryText: إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَبْلَ ذَٰلِكَ مُتْرَفِينَ

items.text: And were persisting in great sin (joining partners in worship along with Allah, committing murders and other crimes, etc.)
items.secondaryText: وَكَانُوا۟ يُصِرُّونَ عَلَى ٱلْحِنثِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ

items.text: And they used to say: "When we die and become dust and bones, shall we then indeed be resurrected?
items.secondaryText: وَكَانُوا۟ يَقُولُونَ أَئِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًۭا وَعِظَٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَبْعُوثُونَ

items.text: "And also our forefathers?"
items.secondaryText: أَوَءَابَآؤُنَا ٱلْأَوَّلُونَ

items.text: Say (O Muhammad SAW): "(Yes) verily, those of old, and those of later times.
items.secondaryText: قُلْ إِنَّ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ وَٱلْءَاخِرِينَ

items.text: "All will surely be gathered together for appointed Meeting of a known Day.
items.secondaryText: لَمَجْمُوعُونَ إِلَىٰ مِيقَٰتِ يَوْمٍۢ مَّعْلُومٍۢ

items.text: "Then moreover, verily, you the erring-ones, the deniers (of Resurrection)!
items.secondaryText: ثُمَّ إِنَّكُمْ أَيُّهَا ٱلضَّآلُّونَ ٱلْمُكَذِّبُونَ

items.text: "You verily will eat of the trees of Zaqqum.
items.secondaryText: لَءَاكِلُونَ مِن شَجَرٍۢ مِّن زَقُّومٍۢ

items.text: "Then you will fill your bellies therewith,
items.secondaryText: فَمَالِـُٔونَ مِنْهَا ٱلْبُطُونَ

items.text: "And drink boiling water on top of it,
items.secondaryText: فَشَٰرِبُونَ عَلَيْهِ مِنَ ٱلْحَمِيمِ

items.text: "So you will drink (that) like thirsty camels!"
items.secondaryText: فَشَٰرِبُونَ شُرْبَ ٱلْهِيمِ

items.text: That will be their entertainment on the Day of Recompense!
items.secondaryText: هَٰذَا نُزُلُهُمْ يَوْمَ ٱلدِّينِ

items.text: We created you, then why do you believe not?
items.secondaryText: نَحْنُ خَلَقْنَٰكُمْ فَلَوْلَا تُصَدِّقُونَ

items.text: Then tell Me (about) the human semen that you emit.
items.secondaryText: أَفَرَءَيْتُم مَّا تُمْنُونَ

items.text: Is it you who create it (i.e. make this semen into a perfect human being), or are We the Creator?
items.secondaryText: ءَأَنتُمْ تَخْلُقُونَهُۥٓ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْخَٰلِقُونَ

items.text: We have decreed death to you all, and We are not unable,
items.secondaryText: نَحْنُ قَدَّرْنَا بَيْنَكُمُ ٱلْمَوْتَ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمَسْبُوقِينَ

items.text: To transfigure you and create you in (forms) that you know not.
items.secondaryText: عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّبَدِّلَ أَمْثَٰلَكُمْ وَنُنشِئَكُمْ فِى مَا لَا تَعْلَمُونَ

items.text: And indeed, you have already known the first form of creation (i.e. the creation of Adam), why then do you not remember or take heed?
items.secondaryText: وَلَقَدْ عَلِمْتُمُ ٱلنَّشْأَةَ ٱلْأُولَىٰ فَلَوْلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ

items.text: Tell Me! The seed that you sow in the ground.
items.secondaryText: أَفَرَءَيْتُم مَّا تَحْرُثُونَ

items.text: Is it you that make it grow, or are We the Grower?
items.secondaryText: ءَأَنتُمْ تَزْرَعُونَهُۥٓ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلزَّٰرِعُونَ

items.text: Were it Our Will, We could crumble it to dry pieces, and you would be regretful (or left in wonderment).
items.secondaryText: لَوْ نَشَآءُ لَجَعَلْنَٰهُ حُطَٰمًۭا فَظَلْتُمْ تَفَكَّهُونَ

items.text: (Saying): "We are indeed Mughramun (i.e. ruined or lost the money without any profit, or punished by the loss of all that we spend for cultivation, etc.)! [See Tafsir Al-Qurtubi, Vol. 17, Page 219]
items.secondaryText: إِنَّا لَمُغْرَمُونَ

items.text: "Nay, but we are deprived!"
items.secondaryText: بَلْ نَحْنُ مَحْرُومُونَ

items.text: Tell Me! The water that you drink.
items.secondaryText: أَفَرَءَيْتُمُ ٱلْمَآءَ ٱلَّذِى تَشْرَبُونَ

items.text: Is it you who cause it from the rainclouds to come down, or are We the Causer of it to come down?
items.secondaryText: ءَأَنتُمْ أَنزَلْتُمُوهُ مِنَ ٱلْمُزْنِ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْمُنزِلُونَ

items.text: If We willed, We verily could make it salt (and undrinkable), why then do you not give thanks (to Allah)?
items.secondaryText: لَوْ نَشَآءُ جَعَلْنَٰهُ أُجَاجًۭا فَلَوْلَا تَشْكُرُونَ

items.text: Tell Me! The fire which you kindle,
items.secondaryText: أَفَرَءَيْتُمُ ٱلنَّارَ ٱلَّتِى تُورُونَ

items.text: Is it you who made the tree thereof to grow, or are We the Grower?
items.secondaryText: ءَأَنتُمْ أَنشَأْتُمْ شَجَرَتَهَآ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْمُنشِـُٔونَ

items.text: We have made it a Reminder (for the Hell-fire, in the Hereafter); and an article of use for the travellers (and all the others, in this world).
items.secondaryText: نَحْنُ جَعَلْنَٰهَا تَذْكِرَةًۭ وَمَتَٰعًۭا لِّلْمُقْوِينَ

items.text: Then glorify with praises the Name of your Lord, the Most Great.
items.secondaryText: فَسَبِّحْ بِٱسْمِ رَبِّكَ ٱلْعَظِيمِ

items.text: So I swear by Mawaqi (setting or the mansions, etc.) of the stars (they traverse).
items.secondaryText: ۞ فَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِمَوَٰقِعِ ٱلنُّجُومِ

items.text: And verily, that is indeed a great oath, if you but know.
items.secondaryText: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَقَسَمٌۭ لَّوْ تَعْلَمُونَ عَظِيمٌ

items.text: That (this) is indeed an honourable recital (the Noble Quran).
items.secondaryText: إِنَّهُۥ لَقُرْءَانٌۭ كَرِيمٌۭ

items.text: In a Book well-guarded (with Allah in the heaven i.e. Al-Lauh Al-Mahfuz).
items.secondaryText: فِى كِتَٰبٍۢ مَّكْنُونٍۢ

items.text: Which (that Book with Allah) none can touch but the purified (i.e. the angels).
items.secondaryText: لَّا يَمَسُّهُۥٓ إِلَّا ٱلْمُطَهَّرُونَ

items.text: A Revelation (this Quran) from the Lord of the 'Alamin (mankind, jinns and all that exists).
items.secondaryText: تَنزِيلٌۭ مِّن رَّبِّ ٱلْعَٰلَمِينَ

items.text: Is it such a talk (this Quran) that you (disbelievers) deny?
items.secondaryText: أَفَبِهَٰذَا ٱلْحَدِيثِ أَنتُم مُّدْهِنُونَ

items.text: And instead (of thanking Allah) for the provision He gives you, on the contrary, you deny Him (by disbelief)!
items.secondaryText: وَتَجْعَلُونَ رِزْقَكُمْ أَنَّكُمْ تُكَذِّبُونَ

items.text: Then why do you not (intervene) when (the soul of a dying person) reaches the throat?
items.secondaryText: فَلَوْلَآ إِذَا بَلَغَتِ ٱلْحُلْقُومَ

items.text: And you at the moment are looking on,
items.secondaryText: وَأَنتُمْ حِينَئِذٍۢ تَنظُرُونَ

items.text: But We (i.e. Our angels who take the soul) are nearer to him than you, but you see not, [Tafsir At-Tabari, Vol. 27, Page 209]
items.secondaryText: وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنكُمْ وَلَٰكِن لَّا تُبْصِرُونَ

items.text: Then why do you not, if you are exempt from the reckoning and recompense (punishment, etc.)
items.secondaryText: فَلَوْلَآ إِن كُنتُمْ غَيْرَ مَدِينِينَ

items.text: Bring back the soul (to its body), if you are truthful?
items.secondaryText: تَرْجِعُونَهَآ إِن كُنتُمْ صَٰدِقِينَ

items.text: Then, if he (the dying person) be of the Muqarrabun (those brought near to Allah),
items.secondaryText: فَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنَ ٱلْمُقَرَّبِينَ

items.text: (There is for him) rest and provision, and a Garden of delights (Paradise).
items.secondaryText: فَرَوْحٌۭ وَرَيْحَانٌۭ وَجَنَّتُ نَعِيمٍۢ

items.text: And if he (the dying person) be of those on the Right Hand,
items.secondaryText: وَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنْ أَصْحَٰبِ ٱلْيَمِينِ

items.text: Then there is safety and peace (from the Punishment of Allah) for (you as you are from) those on the Right Hand.
items.secondaryText: فَسَلَٰمٌۭ لَّكَ مِنْ أَصْحَٰبِ ٱلْيَمِينِ

items.text: But if he (the dying person) be of the denying (of the Resurrection), the erring (away from the Right Path of Islamic Monotheism),
items.secondaryText: وَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنَ ٱلْمُكَذِّبِينَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ

items.text: Then for him is entertainment with boiling water.
items.secondaryText: فَنُزُلٌۭ مِّنْ حَمِيمٍۢ

items.text: And burning in Hell-fire.
items.secondaryText: وَتَصْلِيَةُ جَحِيمٍ

items.text: Verily, this! This is an absolute Truth with certainty.
items.secondaryText: إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَهُوَ حَقُّ ٱلْيَقِينِ

items.text: So glorify with praises the Name of your Lord, the Most Great.
items.secondaryText: فَسَبِّحْ بِٱسْمِ رَبِّكَ ٱلْعَظِيمِ

items.text: Whatsoever is in the heavens and the earth glorifies Allah, and He is the All-Mighty, All-Wise.
items.secondaryText: سَبَّحَ لِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ

items.text: His is the kingdom of the heavens and the earth, It is He Who gives life and causes death; and He is Able to do all things.
items.secondaryText: لَهُۥ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ يُحْىِۦ وَيُمِيتُ ۖ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍۢ قَدِيرٌ

items.text: He is the First (nothing is before Him) and the Last (nothing is after Him), the Most High (nothing is above Him) and the Most Near (nothing is nearer than Him). And He is the All-Knower of every thing.
items.secondaryText: هُوَ ٱلْأَوَّلُ وَٱلْءَاخِرُ وَٱلظَّٰهِرُ وَٱلْبَاطِنُ ۖ وَهُوَ بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ عَلِيمٌ

items.text: He it is Who created the heavens and the earth in six Days and then Istawa (rose over) the Throne (in a manner that suits His Majesty). He knows what goes into the earth and what comes forth from it, what descends from the heaven and what ascends thereto. And He is with you (by His Knowledge) wheresoever you may be. And Allah is the All-Seer of what you do.
items.secondaryText: هُوَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ فِى سِتَّةِ أَيَّامٍۢ ثُمَّ ٱسْتَوَىٰ عَلَى ٱلْعَرْشِ ۚ يَعْلَمُ مَا يَلِجُ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا يَخْرُجُ مِنْهَا وَمَا يَنزِلُ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَمَا يَعْرُجُ فِيهَا ۖ وَهُوَ مَعَكُمْ أَيْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ بَصِيرٌۭ

items.text: His is the kingdom of the heavens and the earth. And to Allah return all the matters (for decision).
items.secondaryText: لَّهُۥ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ وَإِلَى ٱللَّهِ تُرْجَعُ ٱلْأُمُورُ

items.text: He merges night into day (i.e. the decrease in the hours of the night is added into the hours of the day), and merges day into night (i.e. the decrease in the hours of the day is added into the hours of the night), and He has full knowledge of whatsoever is in the breasts.
items.secondaryText: يُولِجُ ٱلَّيْلَ فِى ٱلنَّهَارِ وَيُولِجُ ٱلنَّهَارَ فِى ٱلَّيْلِ ۚ وَهُوَ عَلِيمٌۢ بِذَاتِ ٱلصُّدُورِ

items.text: Believe in Allah and His Messenger (Muhammad SAW), and spend of that whereof He has made you trustees. And such of you as believe and spend (in Allah's Way), theirs will be a great reward.
items.secondaryText: ءَامِنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ وَأَنفِقُوا۟ مِمَّا جَعَلَكُم مُّسْتَخْلَفِينَ فِيهِ ۖ فَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ مِنكُمْ وَأَنفَقُوا۟ لَهُمْ أَجْرٌۭ كَبِيرٌۭ

items.text: And what is the matter with you that you believe not in Allah! While the Messenger (Muhammad SAW) invites you to believe in your Lord (Allah), and He (Allah) has indeed taken your covenant, if you are real believers.
items.secondaryText: وَمَا لَكُمْ لَا تُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱللَّهِ ۙ وَٱلرَّسُولُ يَدْعُوكُمْ لِتُؤْمِنُوا۟ بِرَبِّكُمْ وَقَدْ أَخَذَ مِيثَٰقَكُمْ إِن كُنتُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ

items.text: It is He Who sends down manifest Ayat (proofs, evidences, verses, lessons, signs, revelations, etc.) to His slave (Muhammad SAW) that He may bring you out from darkness into light. And verily, Allah is to you full of kindness, Most Merciful.
items.secondaryText: هُوَ ٱلَّذِى يُنَزِّلُ عَلَىٰ عَبْدِهِۦٓ ءَايَٰتٍۭ بَيِّنَٰتٍۢ لِّيُخْرِجَكُم مِّنَ ٱلظُّلُمَٰتِ إِلَى ٱلنُّورِ ۚ وَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ بِكُمْ لَرَءُوفٌۭ رَّحِيمٌۭ

items.text: And what is the matter with you that you spend not in the Cause of Allah? And to Allah belongs the heritage of the heavens and the earth. Not equal among you are those who spent and fought before the conquering (of Makkah) (with those among you who did so later). Such are higher in degree than those who spent and fought afterwards. But to all, Allah has promised the best (reward). And Allah is All-Aware of what you do.
items.secondaryText: وَمَا لَكُمْ أَلَّا تُنفِقُوا۟ فِى سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ وَلِلَّهِ مِيرَٰثُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ لَا يَسْتَوِى مِنكُم مَّنْ أَنفَقَ مِن قَبْلِ ٱلْفَتْحِ وَقَٰتَلَ ۚ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ أَعْظَمُ دَرَجَةًۭ مِّنَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَنفَقُوا۟ مِنۢ بَعْدُ وَقَٰتَلُوا۟ ۚ وَكُلًّۭا وَعَدَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْحُسْنَىٰ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ خَبِيرٌۭ

items.text: Who is he that will lend to Allah a goodly loan, then (Allah) will increase it manifold to his credit (in repaying), and he will have (besides) a good reward (i.e. Paradise).
items.secondaryText: مَّن ذَا ٱلَّذِى يُقْرِضُ ٱللَّهَ قَرْضًا حَسَنًۭا فَيُضَٰعِفَهُۥ لَهُۥ وَلَهُۥٓ أَجْرٌۭ كَرِيمٌۭ

items.text: On the Day you shall see the believing men and the believing women their light running forward before them and by their right hands. Glad tidings for you this Day! Gardens under which rivers flow (Paradise), to dwell therein forever! Truly, this is the great success!
items.secondaryText: يَوْمَ تَرَى ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنَٰتِ يَسْعَىٰ نُورُهُم بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَبِأَيْمَٰنِهِم بُشْرَىٰكُمُ ٱلْيَوْمَ جَنَّٰتٌۭ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَٰرُ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا ۚ ذَٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْعَظِيمُ

items.text: On the Day when the hypocrites men and women will say to the believers: "Wait for us! Let us get something from your light!" It will be said: "Go back to your rear! Then seek a light!" So a wall will be put up between them, with a gate therein. Inside it will be mercy, and outside it will be torment."
items.secondaryText: يَوْمَ يَقُولُ ٱلْمُنَٰفِقُونَ وَٱلْمُنَٰفِقَٰتُ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ٱنظُرُونَا نَقْتَبِسْ مِن نُّورِكُمْ قِيلَ ٱرْجِعُوا۟ وَرَآءَكُمْ فَٱلْتَمِسُوا۟ نُورًۭا فَضُرِبَ بَيْنَهُم بِسُورٍۢ لَّهُۥ بَابٌۢ بَاطِنُهُۥ فِيهِ ٱلرَّحْمَةُ وَظَٰهِرُهُۥ مِن قِبَلِهِ ٱلْعَذَابُ

items.text: (The hypocrites) will call the believers: "Were we not with you?" The believers will reply: "Yes! But you led yourselves into temptations, you looked forward for our destruction; you doubted (in Faith); and you were deceived by false desires, till the Command of Allah came to pass. And the chief deceiver (Satan) deceived you in respect of Allah."
items.secondaryText: يُنَادُونَهُمْ أَلَمْ نَكُن مَّعَكُمْ ۖ قَالُوا۟ بَلَىٰ وَلَٰكِنَّكُمْ فَتَنتُمْ أَنفُسَكُمْ وَتَرَبَّصْتُمْ وَٱرْتَبْتُمْ وَغَرَّتْكُمُ ٱلْأَمَانِىُّ حَتَّىٰ جَآءَ أَمْرُ ٱللَّهِ وَغَرَّكُم بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْغَرُورُ

items.text: So this Day no ransom shall be taken from you (hypocrites), nor of those who disbelieved, (in the Oneness of Allah Islamic Monotheism). Your abode is the Fire, that is the proper place for you, and worst indeed is that destination.
items.secondaryText: فَٱلْيَوْمَ لَا يُؤْخَذُ مِنكُمْ فِدْيَةٌۭ وَلَا مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ ۚ مَأْوَىٰكُمُ ٱلنَّارُ ۖ هِىَ مَوْلَىٰكُمْ ۖ وَبِئْسَ ٱلْمَصِيرُ

items.text: Has not the time come for the hearts of those who believe (in the Oneness of Allah - Islamic Monotheism) to be affected by Allah's Reminder (this Quran), and that which has been revealed of the truth, lest they become as those who received the Scripture [the Taurat (Torah) and the Injeel (Gospel)] before (i.e. Jews and Christians), and the term was prolonged for them and so their hearts were hardened? And many of them were Fasiqun (rebellious, disobedient to Allah).
items.secondaryText: ۞ أَلَمْ يَأْنِ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ أَن تَخْشَعَ قُلُوبُهُمْ لِذِكْرِ ٱللَّهِ وَمَا نَزَلَ مِنَ ٱلْحَقِّ وَلَا يَكُونُوا۟ كَٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْكِتَٰبَ مِن قَبْلُ فَطَالَ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلْأَمَدُ فَقَسَتْ قُلُوبُهُمْ ۖ وَكَثِيرٌۭ مِّنْهُمْ فَٰسِقُونَ

items.text: Know that Allah gives life to the earth after its death! Indeed We have made clear the Ayat (proofs, evidences, verses, lessons, signs, revelations, etc.) to you, if you but understand.
items.secondaryText: ٱعْلَمُوٓا۟ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُحْىِ ٱلْأَرْضَ بَعْدَ مَوْتِهَا ۚ قَدْ بَيَّنَّا لَكُمُ ٱلْءَايَٰتِ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَعْقِلُونَ

items.text: Verily, those who give Sadaqat (i.e. Zakat and alms, etc.), men and women, and lend to Allah a goodly loan, it shall be increased manifold (to their credit), and theirs shall be an honourable good reward (i.e. Paradise).
items.secondaryText: إِنَّ ٱلْمُصَّدِّقِينَ وَٱلْمُصَّدِّقَٰتِ وَأَقْرَضُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ قَرْضًا حَسَنًۭا يُضَٰعَفُ لَهُمْ وَلَهُمْ أَجْرٌۭ كَرِيمٌۭ

items.text: And those who believe in (the Oneness of) Allah and His Messengers, they are the Siddiqun (i.e. those followers of the Prophets who were first and foremost to believe in them), and the martyrs with their Lord, they shall have their reward and their light. But those who disbelieve (in the Oneness of Allah - Islamic Monotheism) and deny Our Ayat (proofs, evidences, verses, lessons, signs, revelations, etc.), they shall be the dwellers of the blazing Fire.
items.secondaryText: وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ وَرُسُلِهِۦٓ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلصِّدِّيقُونَ ۖ وَٱلشُّهَدَآءُ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ لَهُمْ أَجْرُهُمْ وَنُورُهُمْ ۖ وَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ وَكَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَآ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ أَصْحَٰبُ ٱلْجَحِيمِ

items.text: Know that the life of this world is only play and amusement, pomp and mutual boasting among you, and rivalry in respect of wealth and children, as the likeness of vegetation after rain, thereof the growth is pleasing to the tiller; afterwards it dries up and you see it turning yellow; then it becomes straw. But in the Hereafter (there is) a severe torment (for the disbelievers, evil-doers), and (there is) Forgiveness from Allah and (His) Good Pleasure (for the believers, good-doers), whereas the life of this world is only a deceiving enjoyment.
items.secondaryText: ٱعْلَمُوٓا۟ أَنَّمَا ٱلْحَيَوٰةُ ٱلدُّنْيَا لَعِبٌۭ وَلَهْوٌۭ وَزِينَةٌۭ وَتَفَاخُرٌۢ بَيْنَكُمْ وَتَكَاثُرٌۭ فِى ٱلْأَمْوَٰلِ وَٱلْأَوْلَٰدِ ۖ كَمَثَلِ غَيْثٍ أَعْجَبَ ٱلْكُفَّارَ نَبَاتُهُۥ ثُمَّ يَهِيجُ فَتَرَىٰهُ مُصْفَرًّۭا ثُمَّ يَكُونُ حُطَٰمًۭا ۖ وَفِى ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ عَذَابٌۭ شَدِيدٌۭ وَمَغْفِرَةٌۭ مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَرِضْوَٰنٌۭ ۚ وَمَا ٱلْحَيَوٰةُ ٱلدُّنْيَآ إِلَّا مَتَٰعُ ٱلْغُرُورِ

items.text: Race one with another in hastening towards Forgiveness from your Lord (Allah), and towards Paradise, the width whereof is as the width of heaven and earth, prepared for those who believe in Allah and His Messengers. That is the Grace of Allah which He bestows on whom He pleases. And Allah is the Owner of Great Bounty.
items.secondaryText: سَابِقُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰ مَغْفِرَةٍۢ مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ وَجَنَّةٍ عَرْضُهَا كَعَرْضِ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ أُعِدَّتْ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ وَرُسُلِهِۦ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ فَضْلُ ٱللَّهِ يُؤْتِيهِ مَن يَشَآءُ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ ذُو ٱلْفَضْلِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ

items.text: No calamity befalls on the earth or in yourselves but is inscribed in the Book of Decrees (Al-Lauh Al-Mahfuz), before We bring it into existence. Verily, that is easy for Allah.
items.secondaryText: مَآ أَصَابَ مِن مُّصِيبَةٍۢ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِىٓ أَنفُسِكُمْ إِلَّا فِى كِتَٰبٍۢ مِّن قَبْلِ أَن نَّبْرَأَهَآ ۚ إِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ يَسِيرٌۭ

items.text: In order that you may not be sad over matters that you fail to get, nor rejoice because of that which has been given to you. And Allah likes not prideful boasters.
items.secondaryText: لِّكَيْلَا تَأْسَوْا۟ عَلَىٰ مَا فَاتَكُمْ وَلَا تَفْرَحُوا۟ بِمَآ ءَاتَىٰكُمْ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ لَا يُحِبُّ كُلَّ مُخْتَالٍۢ فَخُورٍ

items.text: Those who are misers and enjoin upon people miserliness (Allah is not in need of their charity). And whosoever turns away (from Faith Allah's Monotheism), then Allah is Rich (Free of all wants), Worthy of all praise.
items.secondaryText: ٱلَّذِينَ يَبْخَلُونَ وَيَأْمُرُونَ ٱلنَّاسَ بِٱلْبُخْلِ ۗ وَمَن يَتَوَلَّ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلْغَنِىُّ ٱلْحَمِيدُ

items.text: Indeed We have sent Our Messengers with clear proofs, and revealed with them the Scripture and the Balance (justice) that mankind may keep up justice. And We brought forth iron wherein is mighty power (in matters of war), as well as many benefits for mankind, that Allah may test who it is that will help Him (His religion), and His Messengers in the unseen. Verily, Allah is All-Strong, All-Mighty.
items.secondaryText: لَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا رُسُلَنَا بِٱلْبَيِّنَٰتِ وَأَنزَلْنَا مَعَهُمُ ٱلْكِتَٰبَ وَٱلْمِيزَانَ لِيَقُومَ ٱلنَّاسُ بِٱلْقِسْطِ ۖ وَأَنزَلْنَا ٱلْحَدِيدَ فِيهِ بَأْسٌۭ شَدِيدٌۭ وَمَنَٰفِعُ لِلنَّاسِ وَلِيَعْلَمَ ٱللَّهُ مَن يَنصُرُهُۥ وَرُسُلَهُۥ بِٱلْغَيْبِ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ قَوِىٌّ عَزِيزٌۭ

items.text: And indeed, We sent Nuh (Noah) and Ibrahim (Abraham), and placed in their offspring Prophethood and Scripture, and among them there is he who is guided, but many of them are Fasiqun (rebellious, disobedient to Allah).
items.secondaryText: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًۭا وَإِبْرَٰهِيمَ وَجَعَلْنَا فِى ذُرِّيَّتِهِمَا ٱلنُّبُوَّةَ وَٱلْكِتَٰبَ ۖ فَمِنْهُم مُّهْتَدٍۢ ۖ وَكَثِيرٌۭ مِّنْهُمْ فَٰسِقُونَ

items.text: Then, We sent after them, Our Messengers, and We sent 'Iesa (Jesus) - son of Maryam (Mary), and gave him the Injeel (Gospel). And We ordained in the hearts of those who followed him, compassion and mercy. But the Monasticism which they invented for themselves, We did not prescribe for them, but (they sought it) only to please Allah therewith, but that they did not observe it with the right observance. So We gave those among them who believed, their (due) reward, but many of them are Fasiqun (rebellious, disobedient to Allah).
items.secondaryText: ثُمَّ قَفَّيْنَا عَلَىٰٓ ءَاثَٰرِهِم بِرُسُلِنَا وَقَفَّيْنَا بِعِيسَى ٱبْنِ مَرْيَمَ وَءَاتَيْنَٰهُ ٱلْإِنجِيلَ وَجَعَلْنَا فِى قُلُوبِ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّبَعُوهُ رَأْفَةًۭ وَرَحْمَةًۭ وَرَهْبَانِيَّةً ٱبْتَدَعُوهَا مَا كَتَبْنَٰهَا عَلَيْهِمْ إِلَّا ٱبْتِغَآءَ رِضْوَٰنِ ٱللَّهِ فَمَا رَعَوْهَا حَقَّ رِعَايَتِهَا ۖ فَـَٔاتَيْنَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ مِنْهُمْ أَجْرَهُمْ ۖ وَكَثِيرٌۭ مِّنْهُمْ فَٰسِقُونَ

items.text: O you who believe [in Musa (Moses) (i.e. Jews) and 'Iesa (Jesus) (i.e. Christians)]! Fear Allah, and believe too in His Messenger (Muhammad SAW), He will give you a double portion of His Mercy, and He will give you a light by which you shall walk (straight), and He will forgive you. And Allah is Oft-Forgiving, Most Merciful.
items.secondaryText: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَءَامِنُوا۟ بِرَسُولِهِۦ يُؤْتِكُمْ كِفْلَيْنِ مِن رَّحْمَتِهِۦ وَيَجْعَل لَّكُمْ نُورًۭا تَمْشُونَ بِهِۦ وَيَغْفِرْ لَكُمْ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ غَفُورٌۭ رَّحِيمٌۭ

items.text: So that the people of the Scripture (Jews and Christians) may know that they have no power whatsoever over the Grace of Allah, and that (His) Grace is (entirely) in His Hand to bestow it on whomsoever He wills. And Allah is the Owner of Great Bounty.
items.secondaryText: لِّئَلَّا يَعْلَمَ أَهْلُ ٱلْكِتَٰبِ أَلَّا يَقْدِرُونَ عَلَىٰ شَىْءٍۢ مِّن فَضْلِ ٱللَّهِ ۙ وَأَنَّ ٱلْفَضْلَ بِيَدِ ٱللَّهِ يُؤْتِيهِ مَن يَشَآءُ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ ذُو ٱلْفَضْلِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ

items.text: Indeed Allah has heard the statement of her (Khaulah bint Tha'labah) that disputes with you (O Muhammad SAW) concerning her husband (Aus bin As-Samit), and complains to Allah. And Allah hears the argument between you both. Verily, Allah is All-Hearer, All-Seer.
items.secondaryText: قَدْ سَمِعَ ٱللَّهُ قَوْلَ ٱلَّتِى تُجَٰدِلُكَ فِى زَوْجِهَا وَتَشْتَكِىٓ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ وَٱللَّهُ يَسْمَعُ تَحَاوُرَكُمَآ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ سَمِيعٌۢ بَصِيرٌ

items.text: Those among you who make their wives unlawful (Az-Zihar) to them by saying to them "You are like my mother's back." They cannot be their mothers. None can be their mothers except those who gave them birth. And verily, they utter an ill word and a lie. And verily, Allah is Oft-Pardoning, Oft-Forgiving.
items.secondaryText: ٱلَّذِينَ يُظَٰهِرُونَ مِنكُم مِّن نِّسَآئِهِم مَّا هُنَّ أُمَّهَٰتِهِمْ ۖ إِنْ أُمَّهَٰتُهُمْ إِلَّا ٱلَّٰٓـِٔى وَلَدْنَهُمْ ۚ وَإِنَّهُمْ لَيَقُولُونَ مُنكَرًۭا مِّنَ ٱلْقَوْلِ وَزُورًۭا ۚ وَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَعَفُوٌّ غَفُورٌۭ

items.text: And those who make unlawful to them (their wives) (by Az-Zihar) and wish to free themselves from what they uttered, (the penalty) in that case (is) the freeing of a slave before they touch each other. That is an admonition to you (so that you may not return to such an ill thing). And Allah is All-Aware of what you do.
items.secondaryText: وَٱلَّذِينَ يُظَٰهِرُونَ مِن نِّسَآئِهِمْ ثُمَّ يَعُودُونَ لِمَا قَالُوا۟ فَتَحْرِيرُ رَقَبَةٍۢ مِّن قَبْلِ أَن يَتَمَآسَّا ۚ ذَٰلِكُمْ تُوعَظُونَ بِهِۦ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ خَبِيرٌۭ

items.text: And he who finds not (the money for freeing a slave) must fast two successive months before they both touch each other. And for him who is unable to do so, he should feed sixty of Miskin (poor). That is in order that you may have perfect Faith in Allah and His Messenger. These are the limits set by Allah. And for disbelievers, there is a painful torment.
items.secondaryText: فَمَن لَّمْ يَجِدْ فَصِيَامُ شَهْرَيْنِ مُتَتَابِعَيْنِ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يَتَمَآسَّا ۖ فَمَن لَّمْ يَسْتَطِعْ فَإِطْعَامُ سِتِّينَ مِسْكِينًۭا ۚ ذَٰلِكَ لِتُؤْمِنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ ۚ وَتِلْكَ حُدُودُ ٱللَّهِ ۗ وَلِلْكَٰفِرِينَ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ

items.text: Verily, those who oppose Allah and His Messenger (Muhammad SAW) will be disgraced, as those before them (among the past nation), were disgraced. And We have sent down clear Ayat (proofs, evidences, verses, lessons, signs, revelations, etc.). And for the disbelievers is a disgracing torment.
items.secondaryText: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يُحَآدُّونَ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ كُبِتُوا۟ كَمَا كُبِتَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ ۚ وَقَدْ أَنزَلْنَآ ءَايَٰتٍۭ بَيِّنَٰتٍۢ ۚ وَلِلْكَٰفِرِينَ عَذَابٌۭ مُّهِينٌۭ

items.text: On the Day when Allah will resurrect them all together (i.e. the Day of Resurrection) and inform them of what they did. Allah has kept account of it, while they have forgotten it. And Allah is Witness over all things.
items.secondaryText: يَوْمَ يَبْعَثُهُمُ ٱللَّهُ جَمِيعًۭا فَيُنَبِّئُهُم بِمَا عَمِلُوٓا۟ ۚ أَحْصَىٰهُ ٱللَّهُ وَنَسُوهُ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍۢ شَهِيدٌ

items.text: Have you not seen that Allah knows whatsoever is in the heavens and whatsoever is on the earth? There is no Najwa (secret counsel) of three, but He is their fourth (with His Knowledge, while He Himself is over the Throne, over the seventh heaven), nor of five but He is their sixth (with His Knowledge), not of less than that or more, but He is with them (with His Knowledge) wheresoever they may be; and afterwards on the Day of Resurrection, He will inform them of what they did. Verily, Allah is the All-Knower of everything.
items.secondaryText: أَلَمْ تَرَ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَعْلَمُ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ مَا يَكُونُ مِن نَّجْوَىٰ ثَلَٰثَةٍ إِلَّا هُوَ رَابِعُهُمْ وَلَا خَمْسَةٍ إِلَّا هُوَ سَادِسُهُمْ وَلَآ أَدْنَىٰ مِن ذَٰلِكَ وَلَآ أَكْثَرَ إِلَّا هُوَ مَعَهُمْ أَيْنَ مَا كَانُوا۟ ۖ ثُمَّ يُنَبِّئُهُم بِمَا عَمِلُوا۟ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَٰمَةِ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ عَلِيمٌ

items.text: Have you not seen those who were forbidden to hold secret counsels, and afterwards returned to that which they had been forbidden, and conspired together for sin and wrong doing and disobedience to the Messenger (Muhammad SAW). And when they come to you, they greet you with a greeting wherewith Allah greets you not, and say within themselves: "Why should Allah punish us not for what we say?" Hell will be sufficient for them, they will burn therein, and worst indeed is that destination!
items.secondaryText: أَلَمْ تَرَ إِلَى ٱلَّذِينَ نُهُوا۟ عَنِ ٱلنَّجْوَىٰ ثُمَّ يَعُودُونَ لِمَا نُهُوا۟ عَنْهُ وَيَتَنَٰجَوْنَ بِٱلْإِثْمِ وَٱلْعُدْوَٰنِ وَمَعْصِيَتِ ٱلرَّسُولِ وَإِذَا جَآءُوكَ حَيَّوْكَ بِمَا لَمْ يُحَيِّكَ بِهِ ٱللَّهُ وَيَقُولُونَ فِىٓ أَنفُسِهِمْ لَوْلَا يُعَذِّبُنَا ٱللَّهُ بِمَا نَقُولُ ۚ حَسْبُهُمْ جَهَنَّمُ يَصْلَوْنَهَا ۖ فَبِئْسَ ٱلْمَصِيرُ

items.text: O you who believe! When you hold secret counsel, do it not for sin and wrong-doing, and disobedience towards the Messenger (Muhammad SAW) but do it for Al-Birr (righteousness) and Taqwa (virtues and piety); and fear Allah unto Whom you shall be gathered.
items.secondaryText: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ إِذَا تَنَٰجَيْتُمْ فَلَا تَتَنَٰجَوْا۟ بِٱلْإِثْمِ وَٱلْعُدْوَٰنِ وَمَعْصِيَتِ ٱلرَّسُولِ وَتَنَٰجَوْا۟ بِٱلْبِرِّ وَٱلتَّقْوَىٰ ۖ وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ ٱلَّذِىٓ إِلَيْهِ تُحْشَرُونَ

items.text: Secret counsels (conspiracies) are only from Shaitan (Satan), in order that he may cause grief to the believers. But he cannot harm them in the least, except as Allah permits, and in Allah let the believers put their trust.
items.secondaryText: إِنَّمَا ٱلنَّجْوَىٰ مِنَ ٱلشَّيْطَٰنِ لِيَحْزُنَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَلَيْسَ بِضَآرِّهِمْ شَيْـًٔا إِلَّا بِإِذْنِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ وَعَلَى ٱللَّهِ فَلْيَتَوَكَّلِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ

items.text: O you who believe! When you are told to make room in the assemblies, (spread out and) make room. Allah will give you (ample) room (from His Mercy). And when you are told to rise up [for prayers, Jihad (holy fighting in Allah's Cause), or for any other good deed], rise up. Allah will exalt in degree those of you who believe, and those who have been granted knowledge. And Allah is Well-Acquainted with what you do.
items.secondaryText: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ إِذَا قِيلَ لَكُمْ تَفَسَّحُوا۟ فِى ٱلْمَجَٰلِسِ فَٱفْسَحُوا۟ يَفْسَحِ ٱللَّهُ لَكُمْ ۖ وَإِذَا قِيلَ ٱنشُزُوا۟ فَٱنشُزُوا۟ يَرْفَعِ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ مِنكُمْ وَٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْعِلْمَ دَرَجَٰتٍۢ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ خَبِيرٌۭ

items.text: O you who believe! When you (want to) consult the Messenger (Muhammad SAW) in private, spend something in charity before your private consultation. That will be better and purer for you. But if you find not (the means for it), then verily, Allah is Oft-Forgiving, Most Merciful.
items.secondaryText: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ إِذَا نَٰجَيْتُمُ ٱلرَّسُولَ فَقَدِّمُوا۟ بَيْنَ يَدَىْ نَجْوَىٰكُمْ صَدَقَةًۭ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ خَيْرٌۭ لَّكُمْ وَأَطْهَرُ ۚ فَإِن لَّمْ تَجِدُوا۟ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ غَفُورٌۭ رَّحِيمٌ

items.text: Are you afraid of spending in charity before your private consultation (with him)? If then you do it not, and Allah has forgiven you, then (at least) perform As-Salat (Iqamat-as-Salat) and give Zakat and obey Allah (i.e. do all what Allah and His Prophet SAW order you to do). And Allah is All-Aware of what you do.
items.secondaryText: ءَأَشْفَقْتُمْ أَن تُقَدِّمُوا۟ بَيْنَ يَدَىْ نَجْوَىٰكُمْ صَدَقَٰتٍۢ ۚ فَإِذْ لَمْ تَفْعَلُوا۟ وَتَابَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْكُمْ فَأَقِيمُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَءَاتُوا۟ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَأَطِيعُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ خَبِيرٌۢ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ

items.text: Have you (O Muhammad SAW) not seen those (hypocrites) who take for friends a people upon whom is the Wrath of Allah (i.e. Jews)? They are neither of you (Muslims) nor of them (Jews), and they swear to a lie while they know.
items.secondaryText: ۞ أَلَمْ تَرَ إِلَى ٱلَّذِينَ تَوَلَّوْا۟ قَوْمًا غَضِبَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِم مَّا هُم مِّنكُمْ وَلَا مِنْهُمْ وَيَحْلِفُونَ عَلَى ٱلْكَذِبِ وَهُمْ يَعْلَمُونَ

items.text: Allah has prepared for them a severe torment. Evil indeed is that which they used to do.
items.secondaryText: أَعَدَّ ٱللَّهُ لَهُمْ عَذَابًۭا شَدِيدًا ۖ إِنَّهُمْ سَآءَ مَا كَانُوا۟ يَعْمَلُونَ

items.text: They have made their oaths a screen (for their evil actions). Thus they hinder (men) from the Path of Allah, so they shall have a humiliating torment.
items.secondaryText: ٱتَّخَذُوٓا۟ أَيْمَٰنَهُمْ جُنَّةًۭ فَصَدُّوا۟ عَن سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ فَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌۭ مُّهِينٌۭ

items.text: Their children and their wealth will avail them nothing against Allah. They will be (the) dwellers of the Fire, to dwell therein forever.
items.secondaryText: لَّن تُغْنِىَ عَنْهُمْ أَمْوَٰلُهُمْ وَلَآ أَوْلَٰدُهُم مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ شَيْـًٔا ۚ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ أَصْحَٰبُ ٱلنَّارِ ۖ هُمْ فِيهَا خَٰلِدُونَ

items.text: On the Day when Allah will resurrect them all together (for their account), then they will swear to Him as they swear to you (O Muslims). And they think that they have something (to stand upon). Verily, they are liars!
items.secondaryText: يَوْمَ يَبْعَثُهُمُ ٱللَّهُ جَمِيعًۭا فَيَحْلِفُونَ لَهُۥ كَمَا يَحْلِفُونَ لَكُمْ ۖ وَيَحْسَبُونَ أَنَّهُمْ عَلَىٰ شَىْءٍ ۚ أَلَآ إِنَّهُمْ هُمُ ٱلْكَٰذِبُونَ

items.text: Shaitan (Satan) has overtaken them. So he has made them forget the remembrance of Allah. They are the party of Shaitan (Satan). Verily, it is the party of Shaitan (Satan) that will be the losers!
items.secondaryText: ٱسْتَحْوَذَ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلشَّيْطَٰنُ فَأَنسَىٰهُمْ ذِكْرَ ٱللَّهِ ۚ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ حِزْبُ ٱلشَّيْطَٰنِ ۚ أَلَآ إِنَّ حِزْبَ ٱلشَّيْطَٰنِ هُمُ ٱلْخَٰسِرُونَ

items.text: Those who oppose Allah and His Messenger (Muhammad SAW), they will be among the lowest (most humiliated).
items.secondaryText: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يُحَآدُّونَ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥٓ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ فِى ٱلْأَذَلِّينَ

items.text: Allah has decreed: "Verily! It is I and My Messengers who shall be the victorious." Verily, Allah is All-Powerful, All-Mighty.
items.secondaryText: كَتَبَ ٱللَّهُ لَأَغْلِبَنَّ أَنَا۠ وَرُسُلِىٓ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ قَوِىٌّ عَزِيزٌۭ

items.text: You (O Muhammad SAW) will not find any people who believe in Allah and the Last Day, making friendship with those who oppose Allah and His Messenger (Muhammad SAW), even though they were their fathers, or their sons, or their brothers, or their kindred (people). For such He has written Faith in their hearts, and strengthened them with Ruh (proofs, light and true guidance) from Himself. And We will admit them to Gardens (Paradise) under which rivers flow, to dwell therein (forever). Allah is pleased with them, and they with Him. They are the Party of Allah. Verily, it is the Party of Allah that will be the successful.
items.secondaryText: لَّا تَجِدُ قَوْمًۭا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱللَّهِ وَٱلْيَوْمِ ٱلْءَاخِرِ يُوَآدُّونَ مَنْ حَآدَّ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ وَلَوْ كَانُوٓا۟ ءَابَآءَهُمْ أَوْ أَبْنَآءَهُمْ أَوْ إِخْوَٰنَهُمْ أَوْ عَشِيرَتَهُمْ ۚ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ كَتَبَ فِى قُلُوبِهِمُ ٱلْإِيمَٰنَ وَأَيَّدَهُم بِرُوحٍۢ مِّنْهُ ۖ وَيُدْخِلُهُمْ جَنَّٰتٍۢ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَٰرُ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا ۚ رَضِىَ ٱللَّهُ عَنْهُمْ وَرَضُوا۟ عَنْهُ ۚ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ حِزْبُ ٱللَّهِ ۚ أَلَآ إِنَّ حِزْبَ ٱللَّهِ هُمُ ٱلْمُفْلِحُونَ

items.text: Whatsoever is in the heavens and whatsoever is on the earth glorifies Allah. And He is the All-Mighty, the All-Wise.
items.secondaryText: سَبَّحَ لِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ

items.text: He it is Who drove out the disbelievers among the people of the Scripture (i.e. the Jews of the tribe of Bani An-Nadir) from their homes at the first gathering. You did not think that they would get out. And they thought that their fortresses would defend them from Allah! But Allah's (Torment) reached them from a place whereof they expected it not, and He cast terror into their hearts, so that they destroyed their own dwellings with their own hands and the hands of the believers. Then take admonition, O you with eyes (to see).
items.secondaryText: هُوَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَخْرَجَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِنْ أَهْلِ ٱلْكِتَٰبِ مِن دِيَٰرِهِمْ لِأَوَّلِ ٱلْحَشْرِ ۚ مَا ظَنَنتُمْ أَن يَخْرُجُوا۟ ۖ وَظَنُّوٓا۟ أَنَّهُم مَّانِعَتُهُمْ حُصُونُهُم مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ فَأَتَىٰهُمُ ٱللَّهُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَمْ يَحْتَسِبُوا۟ ۖ وَقَذَفَ فِى قُلُوبِهِمُ ٱلرُّعْبَ ۚ يُخْرِبُونَ بُيُوتَهُم بِأَيْدِيهِمْ وَأَيْدِى ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ فَٱعْتَبِرُوا۟ يَٰٓأُو۟لِى ٱلْأَبْصَٰرِ

items.text: And had it not been that Allah had decreed exile for them, He would certainly have punished them in this world, and in the Hereafter theirs shall be the torment of the Fire.
items.secondaryText: وَلَوْلَآ أَن كَتَبَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلْجَلَآءَ لَعَذَّبَهُمْ فِى ٱلدُّنْيَا ۖ وَلَهُمْ فِى ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ عَذَابُ ٱلنَّارِ

items.text: That is because they opposed Allah and His Messenger (Muhammad SAW). And whosoever opposes Allah, then verily, Allah is Severe in punishment.
items.secondaryText: ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمْ شَآقُّوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ ۖ وَمَن يُشَآقِّ ٱللَّهَ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ شَدِيدُ ٱلْعِقَابِ

items.text: What you (O Muslims) cut down of the palm-trees (of the enemy), or you left them standing on their stems, it was by Leave of Allah, and in order that He might disgrace the Fasiqun (rebellious, disobedient to Allah).
items.secondaryText: مَا قَطَعْتُم مِّن لِّينَةٍ أَوْ تَرَكْتُمُوهَا قَآئِمَةً عَلَىٰٓ أُصُولِهَا فَبِإِذْنِ ٱللَّهِ وَلِيُخْزِىَ ٱلْفَٰسِقِينَ

items.text: And what Allah gave as booty (Fai') to His Messenger (Muhammad SAW) from them, for which you made no expedition with either cavalry or camelry. But Allah gives power to His Messengers over whomsoever He wills. And Allah is Able to do all things.
items.secondaryText: وَمَآ أَفَآءَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ رَسُولِهِۦ مِنْهُمْ فَمَآ أَوْجَفْتُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ خَيْلٍۢ وَلَا رِكَابٍۢ وَلَٰكِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُسَلِّطُ رُسُلَهُۥ عَلَىٰ مَن يَشَآءُ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍۢ قَدِيرٌۭ

items.text: What Allah gave as booty (Fai') to His Messenger (Muhammad SAW) from the people of the townships, - it is for Allah, His Messenger (Muhammad SAW), the kindred (of Messenger Muhammad SAW), the orphans, Al-Masakin (the poor), and the wayfarer, in order that it may not become a fortune used by the rich among you. And whatsoever the Messenger (Muhammad SAW) gives you, take it, and whatsoever he forbids you, abstain (from it), and fear Allah. Verily, Allah is Severe in punishment.
items.secondaryText: مَّآ أَفَآءَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ رَسُولِهِۦ مِنْ أَهْلِ ٱلْقُرَىٰ فَلِلَّهِ وَلِلرَّسُولِ وَلِذِى ٱلْقُرْبَىٰ وَٱلْيَتَٰمَىٰ وَٱلْمَسَٰكِينِ وَٱبْنِ ٱلسَّبِيلِ كَىْ لَا يَكُونَ دُولَةًۢ بَيْنَ ٱلْأَغْنِيَآءِ مِنكُمْ ۚ وَمَآ ءَاتَىٰكُمُ ٱلرَّسُولُ فَخُذُوهُ وَمَا نَهَىٰكُمْ عَنْهُ فَٱنتَهُوا۟ ۚ وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ ۖ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ شَدِيدُ ٱلْعِقَابِ

items.text: (And there is also a share in this booty) for the poor emigrants, who were expelled from their homes and their property, seeking Bounties from Allah and to please Him. And helping Allah (i.e. helping His religion) and His Messenger (Muhammad SAW). Such are indeed the truthful (to what they say);
items.secondaryText: لِلْفُقَرَآءِ ٱلْمُهَٰجِرِينَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُخْرِجُوا۟ مِن دِيَٰرِهِمْ وَأَمْوَٰلِهِمْ يَبْتَغُونَ فَضْلًۭا مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَرِضْوَٰنًۭا وَيَنصُرُونَ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥٓ ۚ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلصَّٰدِقُونَ

items.text: And those who, before them, had homes (in Al-Madinah) and had adopted the Faith, love those who emigrate to them, and have no jealousy in their breasts for that which they have been given (from the booty of Bani An-Nadir), and give them (emigrants) preference over themselves, even though they were in need of that. And whosoever is saved from his own covetousness, such are they who will be the successful.
items.secondaryText: وَٱلَّذِينَ تَبَوَّءُو ٱلدَّارَ وَٱلْإِيمَٰنَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ يُحِبُّونَ مَنْ هَاجَرَ إِلَيْهِمْ وَلَا يَجِدُونَ فِى صُدُورِهِمْ حَاجَةًۭ مِّمَّآ أُوتُوا۟ وَيُؤْثِرُونَ عَلَىٰٓ أَنفُسِهِمْ وَلَوْ كَانَ بِهِمْ خَصَاصَةٌۭ ۚ وَمَن يُوقَ شُحَّ نَفْسِهِۦ فَأُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْمُفْلِحُونَ

items.text: And those who came after them say: "Our Lord! Forgive us and our brethren who have preceded us in Faith, and put not in our hearts any hatred against those who have believed. Our Lord! You are indeed full of kindness, Most Merciful.
items.secondaryText: وَٱلَّذِينَ جَآءُو مِنۢ بَعْدِهِمْ يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَا ٱغْفِرْ لَنَا وَلِإِخْوَٰنِنَا ٱلَّذِينَ سَبَقُونَا بِٱلْإِيمَٰنِ وَلَا تَجْعَلْ فِى قُلُوبِنَا غِلًّۭا لِّلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ رَبَّنَآ إِنَّكَ رَءُوفٌۭ رَّحِيمٌ

items.text: Have you (O Muhammad SAW) not observed the hypocrites who say to their friends among the people of the Scripture who disbelieve: "(By Allah) If you are expelled, we (too) indeed will go out with you, and we shall never obey any one against you, and if you are attacked (in fight), we shall indeed help you." But Allah is Witness, that they verily, are liars.
items.secondaryText: ۞ أَلَمْ تَرَ إِلَى ٱلَّذِينَ نَافَقُوا۟ يَقُولُونَ لِإِخْوَٰنِهِمُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِنْ أَهْلِ ٱلْكِتَٰبِ لَئِنْ أُخْرِجْتُمْ لَنَخْرُجَنَّ مَعَكُمْ وَلَا نُطِيعُ فِيكُمْ أَحَدًا أَبَدًۭا وَإِن قُوتِلْتُمْ لَنَنصُرَنَّكُمْ وَٱللَّهُ يَشْهَدُ إِنَّهُمْ لَكَٰذِبُونَ

items.text: Surely, if they (the Jews) are expelled, never will they (hypocrites) go out with them, and if they are attacked, they will never help them. And if they do help them, they (hypocrites) will turn their backs, so they will not be victorious.
items.secondaryText: لَئِنْ أُخْرِجُوا۟ لَا يَخْرُجُونَ مَعَهُمْ وَلَئِن قُوتِلُوا۟ لَا يَنصُرُونَهُمْ وَلَئِن نَّصَرُوهُمْ لَيُوَلُّنَّ ٱلْأَدْبَٰرَ ثُمَّ لَا يُنصَرُونَ

items.text: Verily, you (believers in the Oneness of Allah - Islamic Monotheism) are more awful as a fear in their (Jews of Bani An-Nadir) breasts than Allah. That is because they are a people who comprehend not (the Majesty and Power of Allah).
items.secondaryText: لَأَنتُمْ أَشَدُّ رَهْبَةًۭ فِى صُدُورِهِم مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمْ قَوْمٌۭ لَّا يَفْقَهُونَ

items.text: They fight not against you even together, except in fortified townships, or from behind walls. Their enmity among themselves is very great. You would think they were united, but their hearts are divided, that is because they are a people who understand not.
items.secondaryText: لَا يُقَٰتِلُونَكُمْ جَمِيعًا إِلَّا فِى قُرًۭى مُّحَصَّنَةٍ أَوْ مِن وَرَآءِ جُدُرٍۭ ۚ بَأْسُهُم بَيْنَهُمْ شَدِيدٌۭ ۚ تَحْسَبُهُمْ جَمِيعًۭا وَقُلُوبُهُمْ شَتَّىٰ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمْ قَوْمٌۭ لَّا يَعْقِلُونَ

items.text: They are like their immediate predecessors (the Jews of Bani Qainuqa', who suffered), they tasted the evil result of their conduct, and (in the Hereafter, there is) for them a painful torment;
items.secondaryText: كَمَثَلِ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ قَرِيبًۭا ۖ ذَاقُوا۟ وَبَالَ أَمْرِهِمْ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌۭ

items.text: (Their allies deceived them) like Shaitan (Satan), when he says to man: "Disbelieve in Allah." But when (man) disbelieves in Allah, Shaitan (Satan) says: "I am free of you, I fear Allah, the Lord of the 'Alamin (mankind, jinns and all that exists)!"
items.secondaryText: كَمَثَلِ ٱلشَّيْطَٰنِ إِذْ قَالَ لِلْإِنسَٰنِ ٱكْفُرْ فَلَمَّا كَفَرَ قَالَ إِنِّى بَرِىٓءٌۭ مِّنكَ إِنِّىٓ أَخَافُ ٱللَّهَ رَبَّ ٱلْعَٰلَمِينَ

items.text: So the end of both will be that they will be in the Fire, abiding therein. Such is the recompense of the Zalimun (i.e. polytheists, wrong-doers, disbelievers in Allah and in His Oneness, etc.).
items.secondaryText: فَكَانَ عَٰقِبَتَهُمَآ أَنَّهُمَا فِى ٱلنَّارِ خَٰلِدَيْنِ فِيهَا ۚ وَذَٰلِكَ جَزَٰٓؤُا۟ ٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ

items.text: O you who believe! Fear Allah and keep your duty to Him. And let every person look to what he has sent forth for the morrow, and fear Allah. Verily, Allah is All-Aware of what you do.
items.secondaryText: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَلْتَنظُرْ نَفْسٌۭ مَّا قَدَّمَتْ لِغَدٍۢ ۖ وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ خَبِيرٌۢ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ

items.text: And be not like those who forgot Allah (i.e. became disobedient to Allah) and He caused them to forget their ownselves, (let them to forget to do righteous deeds). Those are the Fasiqun (rebellious, disobedient to Allah).
items.secondaryText: وَلَا تَكُونُوا۟ كَٱلَّذِينَ نَسُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ فَأَنسَىٰهُمْ أَنفُسَهُمْ ۚ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْفَٰسِقُونَ

items.text: Not equal are the dwellers of the Fire and the dwellers of the Paradise. It is the dwellers of Paradise that will be successful.
items.secondaryText: لَا يَسْتَوِىٓ أَصْحَٰبُ ٱلنَّارِ وَأَصْحَٰبُ ٱلْجَنَّةِ ۚ أَصْحَٰبُ ٱلْجَنَّةِ هُمُ ٱلْفَآئِزُونَ

items.text: Had We sent down this Quran on a mountain, you would surely have seen it humbling itself and rending asunder by the fear of Allah. Such are the parables which We put forward to mankind that they may reflect.
items.secondaryText: لَوْ أَنزَلْنَا هَٰذَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ عَلَىٰ جَبَلٍۢ لَّرَأَيْتَهُۥ خَٰشِعًۭا مُّتَصَدِّعًۭا مِّنْ خَشْيَةِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ وَتِلْكَ ٱلْأَمْثَٰلُ نَضْرِبُهَا لِلنَّاسِ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَتَفَكَّرُونَ

items.text: He is Allah, than Whom there is La ilaha illa Huwa (none has the right to be worshipped but He) the All-Knower of the unseen and the seen (open). He is the Most Beneficent, the Most Merciful.
items.secondaryText: هُوَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِى لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۖ عَٰلِمُ ٱلْغَيْبِ وَٱلشَّهَٰدَةِ ۖ هُوَ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ

items.text: He is Allah than Whom there is La ilaha illa Huwa (none has the right to be worshipped but He) the King, the Holy, the One Free from all defects, the Giver of security, the Watcher over His creatures, the All-Mighty, the Compeller, the Supreme. Glory be to Allah! (High is He) above all that they associate as partners with Him.
items.secondaryText: هُوَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِى لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ٱلْمَلِكُ ٱلْقُدُّوسُ ٱلسَّلَٰمُ ٱلْمُؤْمِنُ ٱلْمُهَيْمِنُ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْجَبَّارُ ٱلْمُتَكَبِّرُ ۚ سُبْحَٰنَ ٱللَّهِ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ

items.text: He is Allah, the Creator, the Inventor of all things, the Bestower of forms. To Him belong the Best Names. All that is in the heavens and the earth glorify Him. And He is the All-Mighty, the All-Wise.
items.secondaryText: هُوَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْخَٰلِقُ ٱلْبَارِئُ ٱلْمُصَوِّرُ ۖ لَهُ ٱلْأَسْمَآءُ ٱلْحُسْنَىٰ ۚ يُسَبِّحُ لَهُۥ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ

items.text: O you who believe! Take not My enemies and your enemies (i.e. disbelievers and polytheists, etc.) as friends, showing affection towards them, while they have disbelieved in what has come to you of the truth (i.e. Islamic Monotheism, this Quran, and Muhammad SAW), and have driven out the Messenger (Muhammad SAW) and yourselves (from your homeland) because you believe in Allah your Lord! If you have come forth to strive in My Cause and to seek My Good Pleasure, (then take not these disbelievers and polytheists, etc., as your friends). You show friendship to them in secret, while I am All-Aware of what you conceal and what you reveal. And whosoever of you (Muslims) does that, then indeed he has gone (far) astray, (away) from the Straight Path.
items.secondaryText: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ لَا تَتَّخِذُوا۟ عَدُوِّى وَعَدُوَّكُمْ أَوْلِيَآءَ تُلْقُونَ إِلَيْهِم بِٱلْمَوَدَّةِ وَقَدْ كَفَرُوا۟ بِمَا جَآءَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْحَقِّ يُخْرِجُونَ ٱلرَّسُولَ وَإِيَّاكُمْ ۙ أَن تُؤْمِنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ رَبِّكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ خَرَجْتُمْ جِهَٰدًۭا فِى سَبِيلِى وَٱبْتِغَآءَ مَرْضَاتِى ۚ تُسِرُّونَ إِلَيْهِم بِٱلْمَوَدَّةِ وَأَنَا۠ أَعْلَمُ بِمَآ أَخْفَيْتُمْ وَمَآ أَعْلَنتُمْ ۚ وَمَن يَفْعَلْهُ مِنكُمْ فَقَدْ ضَلَّ سَوَآءَ ٱلسَّبِيلِ

items.text: Should they gain the upper hand over you, they would behave to you as enemies, and stretch forth their hands and their tongues against you with evil, and they desire that you should disbelieve.
items.secondaryText: إِن يَثْقَفُوكُمْ يَكُونُوا۟ لَكُمْ أَعْدَآءًۭ وَيَبْسُطُوٓا۟ إِلَيْكُمْ أَيْدِيَهُمْ وَأَلْسِنَتَهُم بِٱلسُّوٓءِ وَوَدُّوا۟ لَوْ تَكْفُرُونَ

items.text: Neither your relatives nor your children will benefit you on the Day of Resurrection (against Allah). He will judge between you. And Allah is the All-Seer of what you do.
items.secondaryText: لَن تَنفَعَكُمْ أَرْحَامُكُمْ وَلَآ أَوْلَٰدُكُمْ ۚ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَٰمَةِ يَفْصِلُ بَيْنَكُمْ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ بَصِيرٌۭ

items.text: Indeed there has been an excellent example for you in Ibrahim (Abraham) and those with him, when they said to their people: "Verily, we are free from you and whatever you worship besides Allah, we have rejected you, and there has started between us and you, hostility and hatred for ever, until you believe in Allah Alone," except the saying of Ibrahim (Abraham) to his father: "Verily, I will ask for forgiveness (from Allah) for you, but I have no power to do anything for you before Allah." Our Lord! In You (Alone) we put our trust, and to You (Alone) we turn in repentance, and to You (Alone) is (our) final Return,
items.secondaryText: قَدْ كَانَتْ لَكُمْ أُسْوَةٌ حَسَنَةٌۭ فِىٓ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ وَٱلَّذِينَ مَعَهُۥٓ إِذْ قَالُوا۟ لِقَوْمِهِمْ إِنَّا بُرَءَٰٓؤُا۟ مِنكُمْ وَمِمَّا تَعْبُدُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ كَفَرْنَا بِكُمْ وَبَدَا بَيْنَنَا وَبَيْنَكُمُ ٱلْعَدَٰوَةُ وَٱلْبَغْضَآءُ أَبَدًا حَتَّىٰ تُؤْمِنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ وَحْدَهُۥٓ إِلَّا قَوْلَ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ لِأَبِيهِ لَأَسْتَغْفِرَنَّ لَكَ وَمَآ أَمْلِكُ لَكَ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ مِن شَىْءٍۢ ۖ رَّبَّنَا عَلَيْكَ تَوَكَّلْنَا وَإِلَيْكَ أَنَبْنَا وَإِلَيْكَ ٱلْمَصِيرُ
