items.secondaryText: وَأَنَّهُۥ كَانَ يَقُولُ سَفِيهُنَا عَلَى ٱللَّهِ شَطَطًۭا

items.text: 'And verily, we thought that men and jinns would not utter a lie against Allah.
items.secondaryText: وَأَنَّا ظَنَنَّآ أَن لَّن تَقُولَ ٱلْإِنسُ وَٱلْجِنُّ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ كَذِبًۭا

items.text: 'And verily, there were men among mankind who took shelter with the masculine among the jinns, but they (jinns) increased them (mankind) in sin and disbelief.
items.secondaryText: وَأَنَّهُۥ كَانَ رِجَالٌۭ مِّنَ ٱلْإِنسِ يَعُوذُونَ بِرِجَالٍۢ مِّنَ ٱلْجِنِّ فَزَادُوهُمْ رَهَقًۭا

items.text: 'And they thought as you thought, that Allah will not send any Messenger (to mankind or jinns).
items.secondaryText: وَأَنَّهُمْ ظَنُّوا۟ كَمَا ظَنَنتُمْ أَن لَّن يَبْعَثَ ٱللَّهُ أَحَدًۭا

items.text: 'And we have sought to reach the heaven; but found it filled with stern guards and flaming fires.
items.secondaryText: وَأَنَّا لَمَسْنَا ٱلسَّمَآءَ فَوَجَدْنَٰهَا مُلِئَتْ حَرَسًۭا شَدِيدًۭا وَشُهُبًۭا

items.text: 'And verily, we used to sit there in stations, to (steal) a hearing, but any who listens now will find a flaming fire watching him in ambush.
items.secondaryText: وَأَنَّا كُنَّا نَقْعُدُ مِنْهَا مَقَٰعِدَ لِلسَّمْعِ ۖ فَمَن يَسْتَمِعِ ٱلْءَانَ يَجِدْ لَهُۥ شِهَابًۭا رَّصَدًۭا

items.text: 'And we know not whether evil is intended for those on earth, or whether their Lord intends for them a Right Path.
items.secondaryText: وَأَنَّا لَا نَدْرِىٓ أَشَرٌّ أُرِيدَ بِمَن فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ أَمْ أَرَادَ بِهِمْ رَبُّهُمْ رَشَدًۭا

items.text: 'There are among us some that are righteous, and some the contrary; we are groups each having a different way (religious sect, etc.).
items.secondaryText: وَأَنَّا مِنَّا ٱلصَّٰلِحُونَ وَمِنَّا دُونَ ذَٰلِكَ ۖ كُنَّا طَرَآئِقَ قِدَدًۭا

items.text: 'And we think that we cannot escape (from the punishment of) Allah in the earth, nor can we escape (from the punishment) by flight.
items.secondaryText: وَأَنَّا ظَنَنَّآ أَن لَّن نُّعْجِزَ ٱللَّهَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَن نُّعْجِزَهُۥ هَرَبًۭا

items.text: 'And indeed when we heard the Guidance (this Quran), we believed therein (Islamic Monotheism), and whosoever believes in his Lord shall have no fear, either of a decrease in the reward of his good deeds or an increase in punishment for his sins.
items.secondaryText: وَأَنَّا لَمَّا سَمِعْنَا ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ ءَامَنَّا بِهِۦ ۖ فَمَن يُؤْمِنۢ بِرَبِّهِۦ فَلَا يَخَافُ بَخْسًۭا وَلَا رَهَقًۭا

items.text: 'And of us some are Muslims (who have submitted to Allah, after listening to this Quran), and of us some are Al-Qasitun (disbelievers those who have deviated from the Right Path)'. And whosoever has embraced Islam (i.e. has become a Muslim by submitting to Allah), then such have sought the Right Path."
items.secondaryText: وَأَنَّا مِنَّا ٱلْمُسْلِمُونَ وَمِنَّا ٱلْقَٰسِطُونَ ۖ فَمَنْ أَسْلَمَ فَأُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ تَحَرَّوْا۟ رَشَدًۭا

items.text: And as for the Qasitun (disbelievers who deviated from the Right Path), they shall be firewood for Hell,
items.secondaryText: وَأَمَّا ٱلْقَٰسِطُونَ فَكَانُوا۟ لِجَهَنَّمَ حَطَبًۭا

items.text: If they (non-Muslims) had believed in Allah, and went on the Right Way (i.e. Islam) We should surely have bestowed on them water (rain) in abundance.
items.secondaryText: وَأَلَّوِ ٱسْتَقَٰمُوا۟ عَلَى ٱلطَّرِيقَةِ لَأَسْقَيْنَٰهُم مَّآءً غَدَقًۭا

items.text: That We might try them thereby. And whosoever turns away from the Reminder of his Lord (i.e. this Quran, and practice not its laws and orders), He will cause him to enter in a severe torment (i.e. Hell).
items.secondaryText: لِّنَفْتِنَهُمْ فِيهِ ۚ وَمَن يُعْرِضْ عَن ذِكْرِ رَبِّهِۦ يَسْلُكْهُ عَذَابًۭا صَعَدًۭا

items.text: And the mosques are for Allah (Alone), so invoke not anyone along with Allah.
items.secondaryText: وَأَنَّ ٱلْمَسَٰجِدَ لِلَّهِ فَلَا تَدْعُوا۟ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ أَحَدًۭا

items.text: (It has been revealed to me that) When the slave of Allah (Muhammad SAW) stood up invoking (his Lord Allah) in prayer to Him they (the jinns) just made round him a dense crowd as if sticking one over the other (in order to listen to the Prophet's recitation).
items.secondaryText: وَأَنَّهُۥ لَمَّا قَامَ عَبْدُ ٱللَّهِ يَدْعُوهُ كَادُوا۟ يَكُونُونَ عَلَيْهِ لِبَدًۭا

items.text: Say (O Muhammad SAW): "I invoke only my Lord (Allah Alone), and I associate none as partners along with Him."
items.secondaryText: قُلْ إِنَّمَآ أَدْعُوا۟ رَبِّى وَلَآ أُشْرِكُ بِهِۦٓ أَحَدًۭا

items.text: Say: "It is not in my power to cause you harm, or to bring you to the Right Path."
items.secondaryText: قُلْ إِنِّى لَآ أَمْلِكُ لَكُمْ ضَرًّۭا وَلَا رَشَدًۭا

items.text: Say (O Muhammad SAW): "None can protect me from Allah's punishment (if I were to disobey Him), nor should I find refuge except in Him.
items.secondaryText: قُلْ إِنِّى لَن يُجِيرَنِى مِنَ ٱللَّهِ أَحَدٌۭ وَلَنْ أَجِدَ مِن دُونِهِۦ مُلْتَحَدًا

items.text: "(Mine is) but conveyance (of the truth) from Allah and His Messages (of Islamic Monotheism), and whosoever disobeys Allah and His Messenger, then verily, for him is the Fire of Hell, he shall dwell therein forever."
items.secondaryText: إِلَّا بَلَٰغًۭا مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَرِسَٰلَٰتِهِۦ ۚ وَمَن يَعْصِ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ فَإِنَّ لَهُۥ نَارَ جَهَنَّمَ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أَبَدًا

items.text: Till, when they see that which they are promised, then they will know who it is that is weaker concerning helpers and less important concerning numbers.
items.secondaryText: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا رَأَوْا۟ مَا يُوعَدُونَ فَسَيَعْلَمُونَ مَنْ أَضْعَفُ نَاصِرًۭا وَأَقَلُّ عَدَدًۭا

items.text: Say (O Muhammad SAW): "I know not whether (the punishment) which you are promised is near or whether my Lord will appoint for it a distant term.
items.secondaryText: قُلْ إِنْ أَدْرِىٓ أَقَرِيبٌۭ مَّا تُوعَدُونَ أَمْ يَجْعَلُ لَهُۥ رَبِّىٓ أَمَدًا

items.text: "(He Alone) the All-Knower of the Gha'ib (unseen), and He reveals to none His Gha'ib (unseen)."
items.secondaryText: عَٰلِمُ ٱلْغَيْبِ فَلَا يُظْهِرُ عَلَىٰ غَيْبِهِۦٓ أَحَدًا

items.text: Except to a Messenger (from mankind) whom He has chosen (He informs him of unseen as much as He likes), and then He makes a band of watching guards (angels) to march before him and behind him.
items.secondaryText: إِلَّا مَنِ ٱرْتَضَىٰ مِن رَّسُولٍۢ فَإِنَّهُۥ يَسْلُكُ مِنۢ بَيْنِ يَدَيْهِ وَمِنْ خَلْفِهِۦ رَصَدًۭا

items.text: [He (Allah) protects them (the Messengers)], till He sees that they (the Messengers) have conveyed the Messages of their Lord (Allah). And He (Allah) surrounds all that which is with them, and He (Allah) keeps count of all things (i.e. He knows the exact number of everything).
items.secondaryText: لِّيَعْلَمَ أَن قَدْ أَبْلَغُوا۟ رِسَٰلَٰتِ رَبِّهِمْ وَأَحَاطَ بِمَا لَدَيْهِمْ وَأَحْصَىٰ كُلَّ شَىْءٍ عَدَدًۢا

items.text: O you wrapped in garments (i.e. Prophet Muhammad SAW)!
items.secondaryText: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْمُزَّمِّلُ

items.text: Stand (to pray) all night, except a little.
items.secondaryText: قُمِ ٱلَّيْلَ إِلَّا قَلِيلًۭا

items.text: Half of it, or a little less than that,
items.secondaryText: نِّصْفَهُۥٓ أَوِ ٱنقُصْ مِنْهُ قَلِيلًا

items.text: Or a little more; and recite the Quran (aloud) in a slow, (pleasant tone and) style.
items.secondaryText: أَوْ زِدْ عَلَيْهِ وَرَتِّلِ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ تَرْتِيلًا

items.text: Verily, We shall send down to you a weighty Word (i.e. obligations, legal laws, etc.).
items.secondaryText: إِنَّا سَنُلْقِى عَلَيْكَ قَوْلًۭا ثَقِيلًا

items.text: Verily, the rising by night (for Tahajjud prayer) is very hard and most potent and good for governing (the soul), and most suitable for (understanding) the Word (of Allah).
items.secondaryText: إِنَّ نَاشِئَةَ ٱلَّيْلِ هِىَ أَشَدُّ وَطْـًۭٔا وَأَقْوَمُ قِيلًا

items.text: Verily, there is for you by day prolonged occupation with ordinary duties,
items.secondaryText: إِنَّ لَكَ فِى ٱلنَّهَارِ سَبْحًۭا طَوِيلًۭا

items.text: And remember the Name of your Lord and devote yourself to Him with a complete devotion.
items.secondaryText: وَٱذْكُرِ ٱسْمَ رَبِّكَ وَتَبَتَّلْ إِلَيْهِ تَبْتِيلًۭا

items.text: (He Alone is) the Lord of the east and the west, La ilaha illa Huwa (none has the right to be worshipped but He). So take Him Alone as Wakil (Disposer of your affairs).
items.secondaryText: رَّبُّ ٱلْمَشْرِقِ وَٱلْمَغْرِبِ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ فَٱتَّخِذْهُ وَكِيلًۭا

items.text: And be patient (O Muhammad SAW) with what they say, and keep away from them in a good way.
items.secondaryText: وَٱصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَٱهْجُرْهُمْ هَجْرًۭا جَمِيلًۭا

items.text: And leave Me Alone to deal with the beliers (those who deny My Verses, etc.), and those who are in possession of good things of life. And give them respite for a little while.
items.secondaryText: وَذَرْنِى وَٱلْمُكَذِّبِينَ أُو۟لِى ٱلنَّعْمَةِ وَمَهِّلْهُمْ قَلِيلًا

items.text: Verily, with Us are fetters (to bind them), and a raging Fire.
items.secondaryText: إِنَّ لَدَيْنَآ أَنكَالًۭا وَجَحِيمًۭا

items.text: And a food that chokes, and a painful torment.
items.secondaryText: وَطَعَامًۭا ذَا غُصَّةٍۢ وَعَذَابًا أَلِيمًۭا

items.text: On the Day when the earth and the mountains will be in violent shake, and the mountains will be a heap of sand poured out and flowing down.
items.secondaryText: يَوْمَ تَرْجُفُ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَٱلْجِبَالُ وَكَانَتِ ٱلْجِبَالُ كَثِيبًۭا مَّهِيلًا

items.text: Verily, We have sent to you (O men) a Messenger (Muhammad SAW) to be a witness over you, as We did send a Messenger [Musa (Moses)] to Fir'aun (Pharaoh).
items.secondaryText: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَيْكُمْ رَسُولًۭا شَٰهِدًا عَلَيْكُمْ كَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ رَسُولًۭا

items.text: But Fir'aun (Pharaoh) disobeyed the Messenger [Musa (Moses)], so We seized him with a severe punishment.
items.secondaryText: فَعَصَىٰ فِرْعَوْنُ ٱلرَّسُولَ فَأَخَذْنَٰهُ أَخْذًۭا وَبِيلًۭا

items.text: Then how can you avoid the punishment, if you disbelieve, on a Day that will make the children grey-headed (i.e. the Day of Resurrection)?
items.secondaryText: فَكَيْفَ تَتَّقُونَ إِن كَفَرْتُمْ يَوْمًۭا يَجْعَلُ ٱلْوِلْدَٰنَ شِيبًا

items.text: Whereon the heaven will be cleft asunder? His Promise is certainly to be accomplished.
items.secondaryText: ٱلسَّمَآءُ مُنفَطِرٌۢ بِهِۦ ۚ كَانَ وَعْدُهُۥ مَفْعُولًا

items.text: Verily, this is an admonition, therefore whosoever will, let him take a Path to His Lord!
items.secondaryText: إِنَّ هَٰذِهِۦ تَذْكِرَةٌۭ ۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلًا

items.text: Verily, your Lord knows that you do stand (to pray at night) a little less than two-thirds of the night, or half the night, or a third of the night, and so do a party of those with you, And Allah measures the night and the day. He knows that you are unable to pray the whole night, so He has turned to you (in mercy). So, recite you of the Quran as much as may be easy for you. He knows that there will be some among you sick, others travelling through the land, seeking of Allah's Bounty; yet others fighting in Allah's Cause. So recite as much of the Quran as may be easy (for you), and perform As-Salat (Iqamat-as-Salat) and give Zakat, and lend to Allah a goodly loan, and whatever good you send before you for yourselves, (i.e. Nawafil non-obligatory acts of worship: prayers, charity, fasting, Hajj and 'Umrah, etc.), you will certainly find it with Allah, better and greater in reward. And seek Forgiveness of Allah. Verily, Allah is Oft-Forgiving, Most-Merciful.
items.secondaryText: ۞ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ يَعْلَمُ أَنَّكَ تَقُومُ أَدْنَىٰ مِن ثُلُثَىِ ٱلَّيْلِ وَنِصْفَهُۥ وَثُلُثَهُۥ وَطَآئِفَةٌۭ مِّنَ ٱلَّذِينَ مَعَكَ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ يُقَدِّرُ ٱلَّيْلَ وَٱلنَّهَارَ ۚ عَلِمَ أَن لَّن تُحْصُوهُ فَتَابَ عَلَيْكُمْ ۖ فَٱقْرَءُوا۟ مَا تَيَسَّرَ مِنَ ٱلْقُرْءَانِ ۚ عَلِمَ أَن سَيَكُونُ مِنكُم مَّرْضَىٰ ۙ وَءَاخَرُونَ يَضْرِبُونَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ يَبْتَغُونَ مِن فَضْلِ ٱللَّهِ ۙ وَءَاخَرُونَ يُقَٰتِلُونَ فِى سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ ۖ فَٱقْرَءُوا۟ مَا تَيَسَّرَ مِنْهُ ۚ وَأَقِيمُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَءَاتُوا۟ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَأَقْرِضُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ قَرْضًا حَسَنًۭا ۚ وَمَا تُقَدِّمُوا۟ لِأَنفُسِكُم مِّنْ خَيْرٍۢ تَجِدُوهُ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ هُوَ خَيْرًۭا وَأَعْظَمَ أَجْرًۭا ۚ وَٱسْتَغْفِرُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ ۖ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ غَفُورٌۭ رَّحِيمٌۢ

items.text: O you (Muhammad SAW) enveloped (in garments)!
items.secondaryText: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْمُدَّثِّرُ

items.text: Arise and warn!
items.secondaryText: قُمْ فَأَنذِرْ

items.text: And your Lord (Allah) magnify!
items.secondaryText: وَرَبَّكَ فَكَبِّرْ

items.text: And your garments purify!
items.secondaryText: وَثِيَابَكَ فَطَهِّرْ

items.text: And keep away from Ar-Rujz (the idols)!
items.secondaryText: وَٱلرُّجْزَ فَٱهْجُرْ

items.text: And give not a thing in order to have more (or consider not your deeds of Allah's obedience as a favour to Allah).
items.secondaryText: وَلَا تَمْنُن تَسْتَكْثِرُ

items.text: And be patient for the sake of your Lord (i.e. perform your duty to Allah)!
items.secondaryText: وَلِرَبِّكَ فَٱصْبِرْ

items.text: Then, when the Trumpet is sounded (i.e. its second blowing);
items.secondaryText: فَإِذَا نُقِرَ فِى ٱلنَّاقُورِ

items.text: Truly, that Day will be a Hard Day.
items.secondaryText: فَذَٰلِكَ يَوْمَئِذٍۢ يَوْمٌ عَسِيرٌ

items.text: Far from easy for the disbelievers.
items.secondaryText: عَلَى ٱلْكَٰفِرِينَ غَيْرُ يَسِيرٍۢ

items.text: Leave Me Alone (to deal) with whom I created Alone (without any means, i.e. Al-Walid bin Al-Mughirah Al-Makhzumi)!
items.secondaryText: ذَرْنِى وَمَنْ خَلَقْتُ وَحِيدًۭا

items.text: And then granted him resources in abundance.
items.secondaryText: وَجَعَلْتُ لَهُۥ مَالًۭا مَّمْدُودًۭا

items.text: And children to be by his side!
items.secondaryText: وَبَنِينَ شُهُودًۭا

items.text: And made life smooth and comfortable for him!
items.secondaryText: وَمَهَّدتُّ لَهُۥ تَمْهِيدًۭا

items.text: After all that he desires that I should give more;
items.secondaryText: ثُمَّ يَطْمَعُ أَنْ أَزِيدَ

items.text: Nay! Verily, he has been stubborn and opposing Our Ayat (proofs, evidences, verses, lessons, signs, revelations, etc.).
items.secondaryText: كَلَّآ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ لِءَايَٰتِنَا عَنِيدًۭا

items.text: I shall oblige him to (climb a slippery mountain in the Hell-fire called As-Sa'ud, or to) face a severe torment!
items.secondaryText: سَأُرْهِقُهُۥ صَعُودًا

items.text: Verily, he thought and plotted;
items.secondaryText: إِنَّهُۥ فَكَّرَ وَقَدَّرَ

items.text: So let him be cursed! How he plotted!
items.secondaryText: فَقُتِلَ كَيْفَ قَدَّرَ

items.text: And once more let him be cursed, how he plotted!
items.secondaryText: ثُمَّ قُتِلَ كَيْفَ قَدَّرَ

items.text: Then he thought;
items.secondaryText: ثُمَّ نَظَرَ

items.text: Then he frowned and he looked in a bad tempered way;
items.secondaryText: ثُمَّ عَبَسَ وَبَسَرَ

items.text: Then he turned back and was proud;
items.secondaryText: ثُمَّ أَدْبَرَ وَٱسْتَكْبَرَ

items.text: Then he said: "This is nothing but magic from that of old;
items.secondaryText: فَقَالَ إِنْ هَٰذَآ إِلَّا سِحْرٌۭ يُؤْثَرُ

items.text: "This is nothing but the word of a human being!"
items.secondaryText: إِنْ هَٰذَآ إِلَّا قَوْلُ ٱلْبَشَرِ

items.text: I will cast him into Hell-fire
items.secondaryText: سَأُصْلِيهِ سَقَرَ

items.text: And what will make you know exactly what Hell-fire is?
items.secondaryText: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا سَقَرُ

items.text: It spares not (any sinner), nor does it leave (anything unburnt)!
items.secondaryText: لَا تُبْقِى وَلَا تَذَرُ

items.text: Burning the skins!
items.secondaryText: لَوَّاحَةٌۭ لِّلْبَشَرِ

items.text: Over it are nineteen (angels as guardians and keepers of Hell).
items.secondaryText: عَلَيْهَا تِسْعَةَ عَشَرَ

items.text: And We have set none but angels as guardians of the Fire, and We have fixed their number (19) only as a trial for the disbelievers, in order that the people of the Scripture (Jews and Christians) may arrive at a certainty [that this Quran is the truth as it agrees with their Books i.e. their number (19) is written in the Taurat (Torah) and the Injeel (Gospel)] and the believers may increase in Faith (as this Quran is the truth) and that no doubts may be left for the people of the Scripture and the believers, and that those in whose hearts is a disease (of hypocrisy) and the disbelievers may say: "What Allah intends by this (curious) example?" Thus Allah leads astray whom He wills and guides whom He wills. And none can know the hosts of your Lord but He. And this (Hell) is nothing else than a (warning) reminder to mankind.
items.secondaryText: وَمَا جَعَلْنَآ أَصْحَٰبَ ٱلنَّارِ إِلَّا مَلَٰٓئِكَةًۭ ۙ وَمَا جَعَلْنَا عِدَّتَهُمْ إِلَّا فِتْنَةًۭ لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لِيَسْتَيْقِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْكِتَٰبَ وَيَزْدَادَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ إِيمَٰنًۭا ۙ وَلَا يَرْتَابَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْكِتَٰبَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ ۙ وَلِيَقُولَ ٱلَّذِينَ فِى قُلُوبِهِم مَّرَضٌۭ وَٱلْكَٰفِرُونَ مَاذَآ أَرَادَ ٱللَّهُ بِهَٰذَا مَثَلًۭا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يُضِلُّ ٱللَّهُ مَن يَشَآءُ وَيَهْدِى مَن يَشَآءُ ۚ وَمَا يَعْلَمُ جُنُودَ رَبِّكَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۚ وَمَا هِىَ إِلَّا ذِكْرَىٰ لِلْبَشَرِ

items.text: Nay, and by the moon,
items.secondaryText: كَلَّا وَٱلْقَمَرِ

items.text: And by the night when it withdraws,
items.secondaryText: وَٱلَّيْلِ إِذْ أَدْبَرَ

items.text: And by the dawn when it brightens,
items.secondaryText: وَٱلصُّبْحِ إِذَآ أَسْفَرَ

items.text: Verily, it (Hell, or their denial of the Prophet Muhammad SAW, or the Day of Resurrection) is but one of the greatest calamities.
items.secondaryText: إِنَّهَا لَإِحْدَى ٱلْكُبَرِ

items.text: A warning to mankind,
items.secondaryText: نَذِيرًۭا لِّلْبَشَرِ

items.text: To any of you that chooses to go forward (by working righteous deeds), or to remain behind (by commiting sins),
items.secondaryText: لِمَن شَآءَ مِنكُمْ أَن يَتَقَدَّمَ أَوْ يَتَأَخَّرَ

items.text: Every person is a pledge for what he has earned,
items.secondaryText: كُلُّ نَفْسٍۭ بِمَا كَسَبَتْ رَهِينَةٌ

items.text: Except those on the Right, (i.e. the pious true believers of Islamic Monotheism);
items.secondaryText: إِلَّآ أَصْحَٰبَ ٱلْيَمِينِ

items.text: In Gardens (Paradise) they will ask one another,
items.secondaryText: فِى جَنَّٰتٍۢ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ

items.text: About Al-Mujrimun (polytheists, criminals, disbelievers, etc.), (And they will say to them):
items.secondaryText: عَنِ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ

items.text: "What has caused you to enter Hell?"
items.secondaryText: مَا سَلَكَكُمْ فِى سَقَرَ

items.text: They will say: "We were not of those who used to offer their Salat (prayers)
items.secondaryText: قَالُوا۟ لَمْ نَكُ مِنَ ٱلْمُصَلِّينَ

items.text: "Nor we used to feed Al-Miskin (the poor);
items.secondaryText: وَلَمْ نَكُ نُطْعِمُ ٱلْمِسْكِينَ

items.text: "And we used to talk falsehood (all that which Allah hated) with vain talkers.
items.secondaryText: وَكُنَّا نَخُوضُ مَعَ ٱلْخَآئِضِينَ

items.text: "And we used to belie the Day of Recompense
items.secondaryText: وَكُنَّا نُكَذِّبُ بِيَوْمِ ٱلدِّينِ

items.text: "Until there came to us (the death) that is certain."
items.secondaryText: حَتَّىٰٓ أَتَىٰنَا ٱلْيَقِينُ

items.text: So no intercession of intercessors will be of any use to them.
items.secondaryText: فَمَا تَنفَعُهُمْ شَفَٰعَةُ ٱلشَّٰفِعِينَ

items.text: Then what is wrong with them (i.e. the disbelievers) that they turn away from (receiving) admonition?
items.secondaryText: فَمَا لَهُمْ عَنِ ٱلتَّذْكِرَةِ مُعْرِضِينَ

items.text: As if they were frightened (wild) donkeys.
items.secondaryText: كَأَنَّهُمْ حُمُرٌۭ مُّسْتَنفِرَةٌۭ

items.text: Fleeing from a hunter, or a lion, or a beast of prey.
items.secondaryText: فَرَّتْ مِن قَسْوَرَةٍۭ

items.text: Nay, everyone of them desires that he should be given pages spread out (coming from Allah with a writing that Islam is the right religion, and Muhammad SAW has come with the truth from Allah the Lord of the heavens and earth, etc.).
items.secondaryText: بَلْ يُرِيدُ كُلُّ ٱمْرِئٍۢ مِّنْهُمْ أَن يُؤْتَىٰ صُحُفًۭا مُّنَشَّرَةًۭ

items.text: Nay! But they fear not the Hereafter (from Allah's punishment).
items.secondaryText: كَلَّا ۖ بَل لَّا يَخَافُونَ ٱلْءَاخِرَةَ

items.text: Nay, verily, this (Quran) is an admonition,
items.secondaryText: كَلَّآ إِنَّهُۥ تَذْكِرَةٌۭ

items.text: So whosoever will (let him read it), and receive admonition (from it)!
items.secondaryText: فَمَن شَآءَ ذَكَرَهُۥ

items.text: And they will not receive admonition unless Allah wills; He (Allah) is the One, deserving that mankind should be afraid of, and should be dutiful to Him, and should not take any Ilah (God) along with Him, and He is the One Who forgives (sins).
items.secondaryText: وَمَا يَذْكُرُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ هُوَ أَهْلُ ٱلتَّقْوَىٰ وَأَهْلُ ٱلْمَغْفِرَةِ

items.text: I swear by the Day of Resurrection;
items.secondaryText: لَآ أُقْسِمُ بِيَوْمِ ٱلْقِيَٰمَةِ

items.text: And I swear by the self-reproaching person (a believer).
items.secondaryText: وَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِٱلنَّفْسِ ٱللَّوَّامَةِ

items.text: Does man (a disbeliever) think that We shall not assemble his bones?
items.secondaryText: أَيَحْسَبُ ٱلْإِنسَٰنُ أَلَّن نَّجْمَعَ عِظَامَهُۥ

items.text: Yes, We are Able to put together in perfect order the tips of his fingers.
items.secondaryText: بَلَىٰ قَٰدِرِينَ عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّسَوِّىَ بَنَانَهُۥ

items.text: Nay! (Man denies Resurrection and Reckoning. So) he desires to continue committing sins.
items.secondaryText: بَلْ يُرِيدُ ٱلْإِنسَٰنُ لِيَفْجُرَ أَمَامَهُۥ

items.text: He asks: "When will be this Day of Resurrection?"
items.secondaryText: يَسْـَٔلُ أَيَّانَ يَوْمُ ٱلْقِيَٰمَةِ

items.text: So, when the sight shall be dazed,
items.secondaryText: فَإِذَا بَرِقَ ٱلْبَصَرُ

items.text: And the moon will be eclipsed,
items.secondaryText: وَخَسَفَ ٱلْقَمَرُ

items.text: And the sun and moon will be joined together (by going one into the other or folded up or deprived of their light, etc.)
items.secondaryText: وَجُمِعَ ٱلشَّمْسُ وَٱلْقَمَرُ

items.text: On that Day man will say: "Where (is the refuge) to flee?"
items.secondaryText: يَقُولُ ٱلْإِنسَٰنُ يَوْمَئِذٍ أَيْنَ ٱلْمَفَرُّ

items.text: No! There is no refuge!
items.secondaryText: كَلَّا لَا وَزَرَ

items.text: Unto your Lord (Alone) will be the place of rest that Day.
items.secondaryText: إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ يَوْمَئِذٍ ٱلْمُسْتَقَرُّ

items.text: On that Day man will be informed of what he sent forward (of his evil or good deeds), and what he left behind (of his good or evil traditions).
items.secondaryText: يُنَبَّؤُا۟ ٱلْإِنسَٰنُ يَوْمَئِذٍۭ بِمَا قَدَّمَ وَأَخَّرَ

items.text: Nay! Man will be a witness against himself [as his body parts (skin, hands, legs, etc.) will speak about his deeds].
items.secondaryText: بَلِ ٱلْإِنسَٰنُ عَلَىٰ نَفْسِهِۦ بَصِيرَةٌۭ

items.text: Though he may put forth his excuses (to cover his evil deeds).
items.secondaryText: وَلَوْ أَلْقَىٰ مَعَاذِيرَهُۥ

items.text: Move not your tongue concerning (the Quran, O Muhammad SAW) to make haste therewith.
items.secondaryText: لَا تُحَرِّكْ بِهِۦ لِسَانَكَ لِتَعْجَلَ بِهِۦٓ

items.text: It is for Us to collect it and to give you (O Muhammad SAW) the ability to recite it (the Quran),
items.secondaryText: إِنَّ عَلَيْنَا جَمْعَهُۥ وَقُرْءَانَهُۥ

items.text: And when We have recited it to you [O Muhammad SAW through Jibrael (Gabriel)], then follow you its (the Quran's) recital.
items.secondaryText: فَإِذَا قَرَأْنَٰهُ فَٱتَّبِعْ قُرْءَانَهُۥ

items.text: Then it is for Us (Allah) to make it clear to you,
items.secondaryText: ثُمَّ إِنَّ عَلَيْنَا بَيَانَهُۥ

items.text: Not [as you think, that you (mankind) will not be resurrected and recompensed for your deeds], but (you men) love the present life of this world,
items.secondaryText: كَلَّا بَلْ تُحِبُّونَ ٱلْعَاجِلَةَ

items.text: And leave (neglect) the Hereafter.
items.secondaryText: وَتَذَرُونَ ٱلْءَاخِرَةَ

items.text: Some faces that Day shall be Nadirah (shining and radiant).
items.secondaryText: وُجُوهٌۭ يَوْمَئِذٍۢ نَّاضِرَةٌ

items.text: Looking at their Lord (Allah);
items.secondaryText: إِلَىٰ رَبِّهَا نَاظِرَةٌۭ

items.text: And some faces, that Day, will be Basirah (dark, gloomy, frowning, and sad),
items.secondaryText: وَوُجُوهٌۭ يَوْمَئِذٍۭ بَاسِرَةٌۭ

items.text: Thinking that some calamity was about to fall on them;
items.secondaryText: تَظُنُّ أَن يُفْعَلَ بِهَا فَاقِرَةٌۭ

items.text: Nay, when (the soul) reaches to the collar bone (i.e. up to the throat in its exit),
items.secondaryText: كَلَّآ إِذَا بَلَغَتِ ٱلتَّرَاقِىَ

items.text: And it will be said: "Who can cure him and save him from death?"
items.secondaryText: وَقِيلَ مَنْ ۜ رَاقٍۢ

items.text: And he (the dying person) will conclude that it was (the time) of departing (death);
items.secondaryText: وَظَنَّ أَنَّهُ ٱلْفِرَاقُ

items.text: And leg will be joined with another leg (shrouded)
items.secondaryText: وَٱلْتَفَّتِ ٱلسَّاقُ بِٱلسَّاقِ

items.text: The drive will be, on that Day, to your Lord (Allah)!
items.secondaryText: إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ يَوْمَئِذٍ ٱلْمَسَاقُ

items.text: So he (the disbeliever) neither believed (in this Quran, in the Message of Muhammad SAW) nor prayed!
items.secondaryText: فَلَا صَدَّقَ وَلَا صَلَّىٰ

items.text: But on the contrary, he belied (this Quran and the Message of Muhammad SAW) and turned away!
items.secondaryText: وَلَٰكِن كَذَّبَ وَتَوَلَّىٰ

items.text: Then he walked in full pride to his family admiring himself!
items.secondaryText: ثُمَّ ذَهَبَ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِۦ يَتَمَطَّىٰٓ

items.text: Woe to you [O man (disbeliever)]! And then (again) woe to you!
items.secondaryText: أَوْلَىٰ لَكَ فَأَوْلَىٰ

items.text: Again, woe to you [O man (disbeliever)]! And then (again) woe to you!
items.secondaryText: ثُمَّ أَوْلَىٰ لَكَ فَأَوْلَىٰٓ

items.text: Does man think that he will be left Suda [neglected without being punished or rewarded for the obligatory duties enjoined by his Lord (Allah) on him]?
items.secondaryText: أَيَحْسَبُ ٱلْإِنسَٰنُ أَن يُتْرَكَ سُدًى

items.text: Was he not a Nutfah (mixed male and female discharge of semen) poured forth?
items.secondaryText: أَلَمْ يَكُ نُطْفَةًۭ مِّن مَّنِىٍّۢ يُمْنَىٰ

items.text: Then he became an 'Alaqa (a clot); then (Allah) shaped and fashioned (him) in due proportion.
items.secondaryText: ثُمَّ كَانَ عَلَقَةًۭ فَخَلَقَ فَسَوَّىٰ

items.text: And made him in two sexes, male and female.
items.secondaryText: فَجَعَلَ مِنْهُ ٱلزَّوْجَيْنِ ٱلذَّكَرَ وَٱلْأُنثَىٰٓ

items.text: Is not He (Allah Who does that), Able to give life to the dead? (Yes! He is Able to do all things).
items.secondaryText: أَلَيْسَ ذَٰلِكَ بِقَٰدِرٍ عَلَىٰٓ أَن يُحْۦِىَ ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ

items.text: Has there not been over man a period of time, when he was nothing to be mentioned?
items.secondaryText: هَلْ أَتَىٰ عَلَى ٱلْإِنسَٰنِ حِينٌۭ مِّنَ ٱلدَّهْرِ لَمْ يَكُن شَيْـًۭٔا مَّذْكُورًا

items.text: Verily, We have created man from Nutfah drops of mixed semen (discharge of man and woman), in order to try him, so We made him hearer, seer.
items.secondaryText: إِنَّا خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَٰنَ مِن نُّطْفَةٍ أَمْشَاجٍۢ نَّبْتَلِيهِ فَجَعَلْنَٰهُ سَمِيعًۢا بَصِيرًا

items.text: Verily, We showed him the way, whether he be grateful or ungrateful.
items.secondaryText: إِنَّا هَدَيْنَٰهُ ٱلسَّبِيلَ إِمَّا شَاكِرًۭا وَإِمَّا كَفُورًا

items.text: Verily, We have prepared for the disbelievers iron chains, iron collars, and a blazing Fire.
items.secondaryText: إِنَّآ أَعْتَدْنَا لِلْكَٰفِرِينَ سَلَٰسِلَا۟ وَأَغْلَٰلًۭا وَسَعِيرًا

items.text: Verily, the Abrar (pious, who fear Allah and avoid evil), shall drink a cup (of wine) mixed with water from a spring in Paradise called Kafur.
items.secondaryText: إِنَّ ٱلْأَبْرَارَ يَشْرَبُونَ مِن كَأْسٍۢ كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا كَافُورًا

items.text: A spring wherefrom the slaves of Allah will drink, causing it to gush forth abundantly.
items.secondaryText: عَيْنًۭا يَشْرَبُ بِهَا عِبَادُ ٱللَّهِ يُفَجِّرُونَهَا تَفْجِيرًۭا

items.text: They (are those who) fulfill (their) vows, and they fear a Day whose evil will be wide-spreading.
items.secondaryText: يُوفُونَ بِٱلنَّذْرِ وَيَخَافُونَ يَوْمًۭا كَانَ شَرُّهُۥ مُسْتَطِيرًۭا

items.text: And they give food, inspite of their love for it (or for the love of Him), to Miskin (poor), the orphan, and the captive,
items.secondaryText: وَيُطْعِمُونَ ٱلطَّعَامَ عَلَىٰ حُبِّهِۦ مِسْكِينًۭا وَيَتِيمًۭا وَأَسِيرًا

items.text: (Saying): "We feed you seeking Allah's Countenance only. We wish for no reward, nor thanks from you.
items.secondaryText: إِنَّمَا نُطْعِمُكُمْ لِوَجْهِ ٱللَّهِ لَا نُرِيدُ مِنكُمْ جَزَآءًۭ وَلَا شُكُورًا

items.text: "Verily, We fear from our Lord a Day, hard and distressful, that will make the faces look horrible (from extreme dislikeness to it)."
items.secondaryText: إِنَّا نَخَافُ مِن رَّبِّنَا يَوْمًا عَبُوسًۭا قَمْطَرِيرًۭا

items.text: So Allah saved them from the evil of that Day, and gave them Nadratan (a light of beauty) and joy.
items.secondaryText: فَوَقَىٰهُمُ ٱللَّهُ شَرَّ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمِ وَلَقَّىٰهُمْ نَضْرَةًۭ وَسُرُورًۭا

items.text: And their recompense shall be Paradise, and silken garments, because they were patient.
items.secondaryText: وَجَزَىٰهُم بِمَا صَبَرُوا۟ جَنَّةًۭ وَحَرِيرًۭا

items.text: Reclining therein on raised thrones, they will see there neither the excessive heat of the sun, nor the excessive bitter cold, (as in Paradise there is no sun and no moon).
items.secondaryText: مُّتَّكِـِٔينَ فِيهَا عَلَى ٱلْأَرَآئِكِ ۖ لَا يَرَوْنَ فِيهَا شَمْسًۭا وَلَا زَمْهَرِيرًۭا

items.text: And the shade thereof is close upon them, and the bunches of fruit thereof will hang low within their reach.
items.secondaryText: وَدَانِيَةً عَلَيْهِمْ ظِلَٰلُهَا وَذُلِّلَتْ قُطُوفُهَا تَذْلِيلًۭا

items.text: And amongst them will be passed round vessels of silver and cups of crystal,
items.secondaryText: وَيُطَافُ عَلَيْهِم بِـَٔانِيَةٍۢ مِّن فِضَّةٍۢ وَأَكْوَابٍۢ كَانَتْ قَوَارِيرَا۠

items.text: Crystal-clear, made of silver. They will determine the measure thereof according to their wishes.
items.secondaryText: قَوَارِيرَا۟ مِن فِضَّةٍۢ قَدَّرُوهَا تَقْدِيرًۭا

items.text: And they will be given to drink there a cup (of wine) mixed with Zanjabil (ginger, etc.),
items.secondaryText: وَيُسْقَوْنَ فِيهَا كَأْسًۭا كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا زَنجَبِيلًا

items.text: A spring there, called Salsabil.
items.secondaryText: عَيْنًۭا فِيهَا تُسَمَّىٰ سَلْسَبِيلًۭا

items.text: And round about them will (serve) boys of everlasting youth. If you see them, you would think them scattered pearls.
items.secondaryText: ۞ وَيَطُوفُ عَلَيْهِمْ وِلْدَٰنٌۭ مُّخَلَّدُونَ إِذَا رَأَيْتَهُمْ حَسِبْتَهُمْ لُؤْلُؤًۭا مَّنثُورًۭا

items.text: And when you look there (in Paradise), you will see a delight (that cannot be imagined), and a great dominion.
items.secondaryText: وَإِذَا رَأَيْتَ ثَمَّ رَأَيْتَ نَعِيمًۭا وَمُلْكًۭا كَبِيرًا

items.text: Their garments will be of fine green silk, and gold embroidery. They will be adorned with bracelets of silver, and their Lord will give them a pure drink.
items.secondaryText: عَٰلِيَهُمْ ثِيَابُ سُندُسٍ خُضْرٌۭ وَإِسْتَبْرَقٌۭ ۖ وَحُلُّوٓا۟ أَسَاوِرَ مِن فِضَّةٍۢ وَسَقَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ شَرَابًۭا طَهُورًا

items.text: (And it will be said to them): "Verily, this is a reward for you, and your endeavour has been accepted."
items.secondaryText: إِنَّ هَٰذَا كَانَ لَكُمْ جَزَآءًۭ وَكَانَ سَعْيُكُم مَّشْكُورًا

items.text: Verily! It is We Who have sent down the Quran to you (O Muhammad SAW) by stages.
items.secondaryText: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نَزَّلْنَا عَلَيْكَ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ تَنزِيلًۭا

items.text: Therefore be patient (O Muhammad SAW) and submit to the Command of your Lord (Allah, by doing your duty to Him and by conveying His Message to mankind), and obey neither a sinner nor a disbeliever among them.
items.secondaryText: فَٱصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ وَلَا تُطِعْ مِنْهُمْ ءَاثِمًا أَوْ كَفُورًۭا

items.text: And remember the Name of your Lord every morning and afternoon [i.e. offering of the Morning (Fajr), Zuhr, and 'Asr prayers].
items.secondaryText: وَٱذْكُرِ ٱسْمَ رَبِّكَ بُكْرَةًۭ وَأَصِيلًۭا

items.text: And during night, prostrate yourself to Him (i.e. the offering of Maghrib and 'Isha' prayers), and glorify Him a long night through (i.e. Tahajjud prayer).
items.secondaryText: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيْلِ فَٱسْجُدْ لَهُۥ وَسَبِّحْهُ لَيْلًۭا طَوِيلًا

items.text: Verily! These (disbelievers) love the present life of this world, and put behind them a heavy Day (that will be hard).
items.secondaryText: إِنَّ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ يُحِبُّونَ ٱلْعَاجِلَةَ وَيَذَرُونَ وَرَآءَهُمْ يَوْمًۭا ثَقِيلًۭا

items.text: It is We Who created them, and We have made them of strong built. And when We will, We can replace them with others like them with a complete replacement.
items.secondaryText: نَّحْنُ خَلَقْنَٰهُمْ وَشَدَدْنَآ أَسْرَهُمْ ۖ وَإِذَا شِئْنَا بَدَّلْنَآ أَمْثَٰلَهُمْ تَبْدِيلًا

items.text: Verily! This (Verses of the Quran) is an admonition, so whosoever wills, let him take a Path to his Lord (Allah).
items.secondaryText: إِنَّ هَٰذِهِۦ تَذْكِرَةٌۭ ۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلًۭا

items.text: But you cannot will, unless Allah wills. Verily, Allah is Ever All-Knowing, All-Wise.
items.secondaryText: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ عَلِيمًا حَكِيمًۭا

items.text: He will admit to His Mercy whom He will and as for the Zalimun, (polytheists, wrong-doers, etc.) He has prepared a painful torment.
items.secondaryText: يُدْخِلُ مَن يَشَآءُ فِى رَحْمَتِهِۦ ۚ وَٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ أَعَدَّ لَهُمْ عَذَابًا أَلِيمًۢا

items.text: By the winds (or angels or the Messengers of Allah) sent forth one after another.
items.secondaryText: وَٱلْمُرْسَلَٰتِ عُرْفًۭا

items.text: And by the winds that blow violently,
items.secondaryText: فَٱلْعَٰصِفَٰتِ عَصْفًۭا

items.text: And by the winds that scatter clouds and rain;
items.secondaryText: وَٱلنَّٰشِرَٰتِ نَشْرًۭا

items.text: And by the Verses (of the Quran) that separate the right from the wrong.
items.secondaryText: فَٱلْفَٰرِقَٰتِ فَرْقًۭا

items.text: And by the angels that bring the revelations to the Messengers,
items.secondaryText: فَٱلْمُلْقِيَٰتِ ذِكْرًا

items.text: To cut off all excuses or to warn;
items.secondaryText: عُذْرًا أَوْ نُذْرًا

items.text: Surely, what you are promised must come to pass.
items.secondaryText: إِنَّمَا تُوعَدُونَ لَوَٰقِعٌۭ

items.text: Then when the stars lose their lights;
items.secondaryText: فَإِذَا ٱلنُّجُومُ طُمِسَتْ

items.text: And when the heaven is cleft asunder;
items.secondaryText: وَإِذَا ٱلسَّمَآءُ فُرِجَتْ

items.text: And when the mountains are blown away;
items.secondaryText: وَإِذَا ٱلْجِبَالُ نُسِفَتْ

items.text: And when the Messengers are gathered to their time appointed;
items.secondaryText: وَإِذَا ٱلرُّسُلُ أُقِّتَتْ

items.text: For what Day are these signs postponed?
items.secondaryText: لِأَىِّ يَوْمٍ أُجِّلَتْ

items.text: For the Day of sorting out (the men of Paradise from the men destined for Hell).
items.secondaryText: لِيَوْمِ ٱلْفَصْلِ

items.text: And what will explain to you what is the Day of sorting out?
items.secondaryText: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا يَوْمُ ٱلْفَصْلِ

items.text: Woe that Day to the deniers (of the Day of Resurrection)!
items.secondaryText: وَيْلٌۭ يَوْمَئِذٍۢ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ

items.text: Did We not destroy the ancients?
items.secondaryText: أَلَمْ نُهْلِكِ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ

items.text: So shall We make later generations to follow them.
items.secondaryText: ثُمَّ نُتْبِعُهُمُ ٱلْءَاخِرِينَ

items.text: Thus do We deal with the Mujrimun (polytheists, disbelievers, sinners, criminals, etc.)!
items.secondaryText: كَذَٰلِكَ نَفْعَلُ بِٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ

items.text: Woe that Day to the deniers (of the Day of Resurrection)!
items.secondaryText: وَيْلٌۭ يَوْمَئِذٍۢ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ

items.text: Did We not create you from a worthless water (semen, etc.)?
items.secondaryText: أَلَمْ نَخْلُقكُّم مِّن مَّآءٍۢ مَّهِينٍۢ

items.text: Then We placed it in a place of safety (womb),
items.secondaryText: فَجَعَلْنَٰهُ فِى قَرَارٍۢ مَّكِينٍ

items.text: For a known period (determined by gestation)?
items.secondaryText: إِلَىٰ قَدَرٍۢ مَّعْلُومٍۢ

items.text: So We did measure, and We are the Best to measure (the things).
items.secondaryText: فَقَدَرْنَا فَنِعْمَ ٱلْقَٰدِرُونَ

items.text: Woe that Day to the deniers (of the Day of Resurrection)!
items.secondaryText: وَيْلٌۭ يَوْمَئِذٍۢ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ

items.text: Have We not made the earth a receptacle?
items.secondaryText: أَلَمْ نَجْعَلِ ٱلْأَرْضَ كِفَاتًا

items.text: For the living and the dead.
items.secondaryText: أَحْيَآءًۭ وَأَمْوَٰتًۭا

items.text: And have placed therein firm, and tall mountains; and have given you to drink sweet water?
items.secondaryText: وَجَعَلْنَا فِيهَا رَوَٰسِىَ شَٰمِخَٰتٍۢ وَأَسْقَيْنَٰكُم مَّآءًۭ فُرَاتًۭا

items.text: Woe that Day to the deniers (of the Day of Resurrection)!
items.secondaryText: وَيْلٌۭ يَوْمَئِذٍۢ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ

items.text: (It will be said to the disbelievers): "Depart you to that which you used to deny!
items.secondaryText: ٱنطَلِقُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰ مَا كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ

items.text: "Depart you to a shadow (of Hell-fire smoke ascending) in three columns,
items.secondaryText: ٱنطَلِقُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰ ظِلٍّۢ ذِى ثَلَٰثِ شُعَبٍۢ

items.text: "Neither shading, nor of any use against the fierce flame of the Fire."
items.secondaryText: لَّا ظَلِيلٍۢ وَلَا يُغْنِى مِنَ ٱللَّهَبِ

items.text: Verily! It (Hell) throws sparks (huge) as Al-Qasr [a fort or a Qasr (huge log of wood)],
items.secondaryText: إِنَّهَا تَرْمِى بِشَرَرٍۢ كَٱلْقَصْرِ

items.text: As if they were Jimalatun Sufr (yellow camels or bundles of ropes)."
items.secondaryText: كَأَنَّهُۥ جِمَٰلَتٌۭ صُفْرٌۭ

items.text: Woe that Day to the deniers (of the Day of Resurrection)!
items.secondaryText: وَيْلٌۭ يَوْمَئِذٍۢ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ

items.text: That will be a Day when they shall not speak (during some part of it),
items.secondaryText: هَٰذَا يَوْمُ لَا يَنطِقُونَ

items.text: And they will not be permitted to put forth any excuse.
items.secondaryText: وَلَا يُؤْذَنُ لَهُمْ فَيَعْتَذِرُونَ

items.text: Woe that Day to the deniers (of the Day of Resurrection)!
items.secondaryText: وَيْلٌۭ يَوْمَئِذٍۢ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ

items.text: That will be a Day of Decision! We have brought you and the men of old together!
items.secondaryText: هَٰذَا يَوْمُ ٱلْفَصْلِ ۖ جَمَعْنَٰكُمْ وَٱلْأَوَّلِينَ

items.text: So if you have a plot, use it against Me (Allah)!
items.secondaryText: فَإِن كَانَ لَكُمْ كَيْدٌۭ فَكِيدُونِ

items.text: Woe that Day to the deniers (of the Day of Resurrection)!
items.secondaryText: وَيْلٌۭ يَوْمَئِذٍۢ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ

items.text: Verily, the Muttaqun (pious - see V. 2:2) shall be amidst shades and springs.
items.secondaryText: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى ظِلَٰلٍۢ وَعُيُونٍۢ

items.text: And fruits, such as they desire.
items.secondaryText: وَفَوَٰكِهَ مِمَّا يَشْتَهُونَ

items.text: "Eat and drink comfortably for that which you used to do.
items.secondaryText: كُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ هَنِيٓـًٔۢا بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ

items.text: Verily, thus We reward the Muhsinun (good-doers).
items.secondaryText: إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ

items.text: Woe that Day to the deniers (of the Day of Resurrection)!
items.secondaryText: وَيْلٌۭ يَوْمَئِذٍۢ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ

items.text: (O you disbelievers)! Eat and enjoy yourselves (in this worldly life) for a little while. Verily, you are the Mujrimun (polytheists, disbelievers, sinners, criminals, etc.).
items.secondaryText: كُلُوا۟ وَتَمَتَّعُوا۟ قَلِيلًا إِنَّكُم مُّجْرِمُونَ

items.text: Woe that Day to the deniers (of the Day of Resurrection)!
items.secondaryText: وَيْلٌۭ يَوْمَئِذٍۢ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ

items.text: And when it is said to them: "Bow down yourself (in prayer)!" They bow not down (offer not their prayers).
items.secondaryText: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمُ ٱرْكَعُوا۟ لَا يَرْكَعُونَ

items.text: Woe that Day to the deniers (of the Day of Resurrection)!
items.secondaryText: وَيْلٌۭ يَوْمَئِذٍۢ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ

items.text: Then in what statement after this (the Quran) will they believe?
items.secondaryText: فَبِأَىِّ حَدِيثٍۭ بَعْدَهُۥ يُؤْمِنُونَ

items.text: What are they asking (one another)?
items.secondaryText: عَمَّ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ

items.text: About the great news, (i.e. Islamic Monotheism, the Quran, which Prophet Muhammad (Peace be upon him) brought and the Day of Resurrection, etc.),
items.secondaryText: عَنِ ٱلنَّبَإِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ

items.text: About which they are in disagreement.
items.secondaryText: ٱلَّذِى هُمْ فِيهِ مُخْتَلِفُونَ

items.text: Nay, they will come to know!
items.secondaryText: كَلَّا سَيَعْلَمُونَ

items.text: Nay, again, they will come to know!
items.secondaryText: ثُمَّ كَلَّا سَيَعْلَمُونَ

items.text: Have We not made the earth as a bed,
items.secondaryText: أَلَمْ نَجْعَلِ ٱلْأَرْضَ مِهَٰدًۭا

items.text: And the mountains as pegs?
items.secondaryText: وَٱلْجِبَالَ أَوْتَادًۭا

items.text: And We have created you in pairs (male and female, tall and short, good and bad, etc.).
items.secondaryText: وَخَلَقْنَٰكُمْ أَزْوَٰجًۭا

items.text: And have made your sleep as a thing for rest.
items.secondaryText: وَجَعَلْنَا نَوْمَكُمْ سُبَاتًۭا

items.text: And have made the night as a covering (through its darkness),
items.secondaryText: وَجَعَلْنَا ٱلَّيْلَ لِبَاسًۭا

items.text: And have made the day for livelihood.
items.secondaryText: وَجَعَلْنَا ٱلنَّهَارَ مَعَاشًۭا

items.text: And We have built above you seven strong (heavens),
items.secondaryText: وَبَنَيْنَا فَوْقَكُمْ سَبْعًۭا شِدَادًۭا

items.text: And have made (therein) a shinning lamp (sun).
items.secondaryText: وَجَعَلْنَا سِرَاجًۭا وَهَّاجًۭا

items.text: And have sent down from the rainy clouds abundant water.
items.secondaryText: وَأَنزَلْنَا مِنَ ٱلْمُعْصِرَٰتِ مَآءًۭ ثَجَّاجًۭا

items.text: That We may produce therewith corn and vegetations,
items.secondaryText: لِّنُخْرِجَ بِهِۦ حَبًّۭا وَنَبَاتًۭا

items.text: And gardens of thick growth.
items.secondaryText: وَجَنَّٰتٍ أَلْفَافًا

items.text: Verily, the Day of Decision is a fixed time,
items.secondaryText: إِنَّ يَوْمَ ٱلْفَصْلِ كَانَ مِيقَٰتًۭا

items.text: The Day when the Trumpet will be blown, and you shall come forth in crowds (groups);
items.secondaryText: يَوْمَ يُنفَخُ فِى ٱلصُّورِ فَتَأْتُونَ أَفْوَاجًۭا

items.text: And the heaven shall be opened, and it will become as gates,
items.secondaryText: وَفُتِحَتِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ فَكَانَتْ أَبْوَٰبًۭا

items.text: And the mountains shall be moved away from their places and they will be as if they were a mirage.
items.secondaryText: وَسُيِّرَتِ ٱلْجِبَالُ فَكَانَتْ سَرَابًا

items.text: Truly, Hell is a place of ambush,
items.secondaryText: إِنَّ جَهَنَّمَ كَانَتْ مِرْصَادًۭا

items.text: A dwelling place for the Taghun (those who transgress the boundry limits set by Allah like polytheists, disbelievers in the Oneness of Allah, hyprocrites, sinners, criminals, etc.),
items.secondaryText: لِّلطَّٰغِينَ مَـَٔابًۭا

items.text: They will abide therein for ages,
items.secondaryText: لَّٰبِثِينَ فِيهَآ أَحْقَابًۭا

items.text: Nothing cool shall they taste therein, nor any drink.
items.secondaryText: لَّا يَذُوقُونَ فِيهَا بَرْدًۭا وَلَا شَرَابًا

items.text: Except boiling water, and dirty wound discharges.
items.secondaryText: إِلَّا حَمِيمًۭا وَغَسَّاقًۭا

items.text: An exact recompense (according to their evil crimes).
items.secondaryText: جَزَآءًۭ وِفَاقًا

items.text: For verily, they used not to look for a reckoning.
items.secondaryText: إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ لَا يَرْجُونَ حِسَابًۭا

items.text: But they belied Our Ayat (proofs, evidences, verses, lessons, signs, revelations, and that which Our Prophet (Peace be upon him) brought) completely.
items.secondaryText: وَكَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا كِذَّابًۭا

items.text: And all things We have recorded in a Book.
items.secondaryText: وَكُلَّ شَىْءٍ أَحْصَيْنَٰهُ كِتَٰبًۭا

items.text: So taste you (the results of your evil actions); no increase shall We give you, except in torment.
items.secondaryText: فَذُوقُوا۟ فَلَن نَّزِيدَكُمْ إِلَّا عَذَابًا

items.text: Verily, for the Muttaqun, there will be a success (Paradise);
items.secondaryText: إِنَّ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ مَفَازًا

items.text: Gardens and grapeyards;
items.secondaryText: حَدَآئِقَ وَأَعْنَٰبًۭا

items.text: And young full-breasted (mature) maidens of equal age;
items.secondaryText: وَكَوَاعِبَ أَتْرَابًۭا

items.text: And a full cup (of wine).
items.secondaryText: وَكَأْسًۭا دِهَاقًۭا

items.text: No Laghw (dirty, false, evil talk) shall they hear therein, nor lying;
items.secondaryText: لَّا يَسْمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغْوًۭا وَلَا كِذَّٰبًۭا

items.text: A reward from your Lord, an ample calculated gift (according to the best of their good deeds).
items.secondaryText: جَزَآءًۭ مِّن رَّبِّكَ عَطَآءً حِسَابًۭا

items.text: (From) the Lord of the heavens and the earth, and whatsoever is in between them, the Most Beneficent, none can dare to speak with Him (on the Day of Resurrection except after His Leave).
items.secondaryText: رَّبِّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ۖ لَا يَمْلِكُونَ مِنْهُ خِطَابًۭا

items.text: The Day that Ar-Ruh [Jibrael (Gabriel) or another angel] and the angels will stand forth in rows, none shall speak except him whom the Most Beneficent (Allah) allows, and he will speak what is right.
items.secondaryText: يَوْمَ يَقُومُ ٱلرُّوحُ وَٱلْمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ صَفًّۭا ۖ لَّا يَتَكَلَّمُونَ إِلَّا مَنْ أَذِنَ لَهُ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنُ وَقَالَ صَوَابًۭا

items.text: That is without doubt the True Day, so, whosoever wills, let him seek a place with (or a way to) His Lord (by obeying Him in this worldly life)!
items.secondaryText: ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمُ ٱلْحَقُّ ۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ مَـَٔابًا

items.text: Verily, We have warned you of a near torment, the Day when man will see that (the deeds) which his hands have sent forth, and the disbeliever will say: "Woe to me! Would that I were dust!"
items.secondaryText: إِنَّآ أَنذَرْنَٰكُمْ عَذَابًۭا قَرِيبًۭا يَوْمَ يَنظُرُ ٱلْمَرْءُ مَا قَدَّمَتْ يَدَاهُ وَيَقُولُ ٱلْكَافِرُ يَٰلَيْتَنِى كُنتُ تُرَٰبًۢا

items.text: By those (angels) who pull out (the souls of the disbelievers and the wicked) with great violence;
items.secondaryText: وَٱلنَّٰزِعَٰتِ غَرْقًۭا

items.text: By those (angels) who gently take out (the souls of the believers);
items.secondaryText: وَٱلنَّٰشِطَٰتِ نَشْطًۭا

items.text: And by those that swim along (i.e. angels or planets in their orbits, etc.).
items.secondaryText: وَٱلسَّٰبِحَٰتِ سَبْحًۭا

items.text: And by those that press forward as in a race (i.e. the angels or stars or the horses, etc.).
items.secondaryText: فَٱلسَّٰبِقَٰتِ سَبْقًۭا

items.text: And by those angels who arrange to do the Commands of their Lord, (so verily, you disbelievers will be called to account).
items.secondaryText: فَٱلْمُدَبِّرَٰتِ أَمْرًۭا

items.text: On the Day (when the first blowing of the Trumpet is blown), the earth and the mountains will shake violently (and everybody will die),
items.secondaryText: يَوْمَ تَرْجُفُ ٱلرَّاجِفَةُ

items.text: The second blowing of the Trumpet follows it (and everybody will be raised up),
items.secondaryText: تَتْبَعُهَا ٱلرَّادِفَةُ

items.text: (Some) hearts that Day will shake with fear and anxiety.
items.secondaryText: قُلُوبٌۭ يَوْمَئِذٍۢ وَاجِفَةٌ

items.text: Their eyes cast down.
items.secondaryText: أَبْصَٰرُهَا خَٰشِعَةٌۭ

items.text: They say: "Shall we indeed be returned to (our) former state of life?
items.secondaryText: يَقُولُونَ أَءِنَّا لَمَرْدُودُونَ فِى ٱلْحَافِرَةِ

items.text: "Even after we are crumbled bones?"
items.secondaryText: أَءِذَا كُنَّا عِظَٰمًۭا نَّخِرَةًۭ

items.text: They say: "It would in that case, be a return with loss!"
items.secondaryText: قَالُوا۟ تِلْكَ إِذًۭا كَرَّةٌ خَاسِرَةٌۭ

items.text: But only, it will be a single Zajrah [shout (i.e., the second blowing of the Trumpet)]. (See Verse 37:19).
items.secondaryText: فَإِنَّمَا هِىَ زَجْرَةٌۭ وَٰحِدَةٌۭ

items.text: When, behold, they find themselves over the earth alive after their death,
items.secondaryText: فَإِذَا هُم بِٱلسَّاهِرَةِ

items.text: Has there come to you the story of Musa (Moses)?
items.secondaryText: هَلْ أَتَىٰكَ حَدِيثُ مُوسَىٰٓ

items.text: When his Lord called him in the sacred valley of Tuwa,
items.secondaryText: إِذْ نَادَىٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ بِٱلْوَادِ ٱلْمُقَدَّسِ طُوًى

items.text: Go to Fir'aun (Pharaoh), verily, he has transgressed all bounds (in crimes, sins, polytheism, disbelief, etc.).
items.secondaryText: ٱذْهَبْ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ إِنَّهُۥ طَغَىٰ

items.text: And say to him: "Would you purify yourself (from the sin of disbelief by becoming a believer)",
items.secondaryText: فَقُلْ هَل لَّكَ إِلَىٰٓ أَن تَزَكَّىٰ

items.text: And that I guide you to your Lord, so you should fear Him?
items.secondaryText: وَأَهْدِيَكَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ فَتَخْشَىٰ

items.text: Then [Musa (Moses)] showed him the great sign (miracles).
items.secondaryText: فَأَرَىٰهُ ٱلْءَايَةَ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰ

items.text: But [Fir'aun (Pharaoh)] belied and disobeyed;
items.secondaryText: فَكَذَّبَ وَعَصَىٰ

items.text: Then he turned his back, striving hard (against Allah).
items.secondaryText: ثُمَّ أَدْبَرَ يَسْعَىٰ

items.text: Then he gathered his people and cried aloud,
items.secondaryText: فَحَشَرَ فَنَادَىٰ

items.text: Saying: "I am your lord, most high",
items.secondaryText: فَقَالَ أَنَا۠ رَبُّكُمُ ٱلْأَعْلَىٰ

items.text: So Allah, seized him with punishment for his last [i.e. his saying: "I am your lord, most high") (see Verse 79:24)] and first [(i.e. his saying, "O chiefs! I know not that you have a god other than I" (see Verse 28:38)] transgression.
items.secondaryText: فَأَخَذَهُ ٱللَّهُ نَكَالَ ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ وَٱلْأُولَىٰٓ

items.text: Verily, in this is an instructive admonition for whosoever fears Allah.
items.secondaryText: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَعِبْرَةًۭ لِّمَن يَخْشَىٰٓ

items.text: Are you more difficult to create, or is the heaven that He constructed?
items.secondaryText: ءَأَنتُمْ أَشَدُّ خَلْقًا أَمِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ ۚ بَنَىٰهَا

items.text: He raised its height, and He has equally ordered it,
items.secondaryText: رَفَعَ سَمْكَهَا فَسَوَّىٰهَا

items.text: Its night He covers with darkness, and its forenoon He brings out (with light).
items.secondaryText: وَأَغْطَشَ لَيْلَهَا وَأَخْرَجَ ضُحَىٰهَا

items.text: And after that He spread the earth;
items.secondaryText: وَٱلْأَرْضَ بَعْدَ ذَٰلِكَ دَحَىٰهَآ

items.text: And brought forth therefrom its water and its pasture;
items.secondaryText: أَخْرَجَ مِنْهَا مَآءَهَا وَمَرْعَىٰهَا

items.text: And the mountains He has fixed firmly;
items.secondaryText: وَٱلْجِبَالَ أَرْسَىٰهَا

items.text: (To be) a provision and benefit for you and your cattle.
items.secondaryText: مَتَٰعًۭا لَّكُمْ وَلِأَنْعَٰمِكُمْ

items.text: But when there comes the greatest catastrophe (i.e. the Day of Recompense, etc.),
items.secondaryText: فَإِذَا جَآءَتِ ٱلطَّآمَّةُ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰ

items.text: The Day when man shall remember what he strove for,
items.secondaryText: يَوْمَ يَتَذَكَّرُ ٱلْإِنسَٰنُ مَا سَعَىٰ

items.text: And Hell-fire shall be made apparent in full view for (every) one who sees,
items.secondaryText: وَبُرِّزَتِ ٱلْجَحِيمُ لِمَن يَرَىٰ

items.text: Then, for him who Tagha (transgressed all bounds, in disbelief, oppression and evil deeds of disobedience to Allah).
items.secondaryText: فَأَمَّا مَن طَغَىٰ

items.text: And preferred the life of this world (by following his evil desires and lusts),
items.secondaryText: وَءَاثَرَ ٱلْحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنْيَا

items.text: Verily, his abode will be Hell-fire;
items.secondaryText: فَإِنَّ ٱلْجَحِيمَ هِىَ ٱلْمَأْوَىٰ

items.text: But as for him who feared standing before his Lord, and restrained himself from impure evil desires, and lusts.
items.secondaryText: وَأَمَّا مَنْ خَافَ مَقَامَ رَبِّهِۦ وَنَهَى ٱلنَّفْسَ عَنِ ٱلْهَوَىٰ

items.text: Verily, Paradise will be his abode.
items.secondaryText: فَإِنَّ ٱلْجَنَّةَ هِىَ ٱلْمَأْوَىٰ

items.text: They ask you (O Muhammad (Peace be upon him)) about the Hour, - when will be its appointed time?
items.secondaryText: يَسْـَٔلُونَكَ عَنِ ٱلسَّاعَةِ أَيَّانَ مُرْسَىٰهَا

items.text: You have no knowledge to say anything about it,
items.secondaryText: فِيمَ أَنتَ مِن ذِكْرَىٰهَآ

items.text: To your Lord belongs (the knowledge of) the term thereof?
items.secondaryText: إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ مُنتَهَىٰهَآ

items.text: You (O Muhammad (Peace be upon him)) are only a warner for those who fear it,
items.secondaryText: إِنَّمَآ أَنتَ مُنذِرُ مَن يَخْشَىٰهَا

items.text: The Day they see it, (it will be) as if they had not tarried (in this world) except an afternoon or a morning.
items.secondaryText: كَأَنَّهُمْ يَوْمَ يَرَوْنَهَا لَمْ يَلْبَثُوٓا۟ إِلَّا عَشِيَّةً أَوْ ضُحَىٰهَا

items.text: (The Prophet (Peace be upon him)) frowned and turned away,
items.secondaryText: عَبَسَ وَتَوَلَّىٰٓ

items.text: Because there came to him the blind man (i.e. 'Abdullah bin Umm-Maktum, who came to the Prophet (Peace be upon him) while he was preaching to one or some of the Quraish chiefs).
items.secondaryText: أَن جَآءَهُ ٱلْأَعْمَىٰ

items.text: But what could tell you that per chance he might become pure (from sins)?
items.secondaryText: وَمَا يُدْرِيكَ لَعَلَّهُۥ يَزَّكَّىٰٓ

items.text: Or that he might receive admonition, and that the admonition might profit him?
items.secondaryText: أَوْ يَذَّكَّرُ فَتَنفَعَهُ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰٓ

items.text: As for him who thinks himself self-sufficient,
items.secondaryText: أَمَّا مَنِ ٱسْتَغْنَىٰ

items.text: To him you attend;
items.secondaryText: فَأَنتَ لَهُۥ تَصَدَّىٰ

items.text: What does it matter to you if he will not become pure (from disbelief, you are only a Messenger, your duty is to convey the Message of Allah).
items.secondaryText: وَمَا عَلَيْكَ أَلَّا يَزَّكَّىٰ

items.text: But as to him who came to you running.
items.secondaryText: وَأَمَّا مَن جَآءَكَ يَسْعَىٰ

items.text: And is afraid (of Allah and His Punishment),
items.secondaryText: وَهُوَ يَخْشَىٰ

items.text: Of him you are neglectful and divert your attention to another,
items.secondaryText: فَأَنتَ عَنْهُ تَلَهَّىٰ

items.text: Nay, (do not do like this), indeed it (these Verses of this Quran) are an admonition,
items.secondaryText: كَلَّآ إِنَّهَا تَذْكِرَةٌۭ

items.text: So whoever wills, let him pay attention to it.
items.secondaryText: فَمَن شَآءَ ذَكَرَهُۥ

items.text: (It is) in Records held (greatly) in honour (Al-Lauh Al-Mahfuz).
items.secondaryText: فِى صُحُفٍۢ مُّكَرَّمَةٍۢ

items.text: Exalted (in dignity), purified,
items.secondaryText: مَّرْفُوعَةٍۢ مُّطَهَّرَةٍۭ

items.text: In the hands of scribes (angels).
items.secondaryText: بِأَيْدِى سَفَرَةٍۢ

items.text: Honourable and obedient.
items.secondaryText: كِرَامٍۭ بَرَرَةٍۢ

items.text: Be cursed (the disbelieving) man! How ungrateful he is!
items.secondaryText: قُتِلَ ٱلْإِنسَٰنُ مَآ أَكْفَرَهُۥ

items.text: From what thing did He create him?
items.secondaryText: مِنْ أَىِّ شَىْءٍ خَلَقَهُۥ

items.text: From Nutfah (male and female semen drops) He created him, and then set him in due proportion;
items.secondaryText: مِن نُّطْفَةٍ خَلَقَهُۥ فَقَدَّرَهُۥ

items.text: Then He makes the Path easy for him;
items.secondaryText: ثُمَّ ٱلسَّبِيلَ يَسَّرَهُۥ

items.text: Then He causes him to die, and puts him in his grave;
items.secondaryText: ثُمَّ أَمَاتَهُۥ فَأَقْبَرَهُۥ

items.text: Then, when it is His Will, He will resurrect him (again).
items.secondaryText: ثُمَّ إِذَا شَآءَ أَنشَرَهُۥ

items.text: Nay, but (man) has not done what He commanded him.
items.secondaryText: كَلَّا لَمَّا يَقْضِ مَآ أَمَرَهُۥ

items.text: Then let man look at his food,
items.secondaryText: فَلْيَنظُرِ ٱلْإِنسَٰنُ إِلَىٰ طَعَامِهِۦٓ

items.text: That We pour forth water in abundance,
items.secondaryText: أَنَّا صَبَبْنَا ٱلْمَآءَ صَبًّۭا

items.text: And We split the earth in clefts,
items.secondaryText: ثُمَّ شَقَقْنَا ٱلْأَرْضَ شَقًّۭا

items.text: And We cause therein the grain to grow,
items.secondaryText: فَأَنۢبَتْنَا فِيهَا حَبًّۭا

items.text: And grapes and clover plants (i.e. green fodder for the cattle),
items.secondaryText: وَعِنَبًۭا وَقَضْبًۭا

items.text: And olives and date-palms,
items.secondaryText: وَزَيْتُونًۭا وَنَخْلًۭا

items.text: And gardens, dense with many trees,
items.secondaryText: وَحَدَآئِقَ غُلْبًۭا

items.text: And fruits and Abba (herbage, etc.),
items.secondaryText: وَفَٰكِهَةًۭ وَأَبًّۭا

items.text: (To be) a provision and benefit for you and your cattle.
items.secondaryText: مَّتَٰعًۭا لَّكُمْ وَلِأَنْعَٰمِكُمْ

items.text: Then, when there comes As-Sakhkhah (the Day of Resurrection's second blowing of Trumpet),
items.secondaryText: فَإِذَا جَآءَتِ ٱلصَّآخَّةُ

items.text: That Day shall a man flee from his brother,
items.secondaryText: يَوْمَ يَفِرُّ ٱلْمَرْءُ مِنْ أَخِيهِ

items.text: And from his mother and his father,
items.secondaryText: وَأُمِّهِۦ وَأَبِيهِ

items.text: And from his wife and his children.
items.secondaryText: وَصَٰحِبَتِهِۦ وَبَنِيهِ

items.text: Everyman, that Day, will have enough to make him careless of others.
items.secondaryText: لِكُلِّ ٱمْرِئٍۢ مِّنْهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍۢ شَأْنٌۭ يُغْنِيهِ

items.text: Some faces that Day, will be bright (true believers of Islamic Monotheism).
items.secondaryText: وُجُوهٌۭ يَوْمَئِذٍۢ مُّسْفِرَةٌۭ

items.text: Laughing, rejoicing at good news (of Paradise).
items.secondaryText: ضَاحِكَةٌۭ مُّسْتَبْشِرَةٌۭ

items.text: And other faces, that Day, will be dust-stained;
items.secondaryText: وَوُجُوهٌۭ يَوْمَئِذٍ عَلَيْهَا غَبَرَةٌۭ

items.text: Darkness will cover them,
items.secondaryText: تَرْهَقُهَا قَتَرَةٌ

items.text: Such will be the Kafarah (disbelievers in Allah, in His Oneness, and in His Messenger Muhammad (Peace be upon him), etc.), the Fajarah (wicked evil doers).
items.secondaryText: أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْكَفَرَةُ ٱلْفَجَرَةُ

items.text: When the sun Kuwwirat (wound round and lost its light and is overthrown).
items.secondaryText: إِذَا ٱلشَّمْسُ كُوِّرَتْ

items.text: And when the stars shall fall;
items.secondaryText: وَإِذَا ٱلنُّجُومُ ٱنكَدَرَتْ

items.text: And when the mountains shall made to pass away;
items.secondaryText: وَإِذَا ٱلْجِبَالُ سُيِّرَتْ

items.text: And when the pregnant she-camels shall be neglected;
items.secondaryText: وَإِذَا ٱلْعِشَارُ عُطِّلَتْ

items.text: And when the wild beasts shall be gathered together;
items.secondaryText: وَإِذَا ٱلْوُحُوشُ حُشِرَتْ

items.text: And when the seas shall become as blazing Fire or shall overflow;
items.secondaryText: وَإِذَا ٱلْبِحَارُ سُجِّرَتْ

items.text: And when the souls shall be joined with their bodies;
items.secondaryText: وَإِذَا ٱلنُّفُوسُ زُوِّجَتْ

items.text: And when the female (infant) buried alive (as the pagan Arabs used to do) shall be questioned.
items.secondaryText: وَإِذَا ٱلْمَوْءُۥدَةُ سُئِلَتْ

items.text: For what sin she was killed?
items.secondaryText: بِأَىِّ ذَنۢبٍۢ قُتِلَتْ

items.text: And when the written pages of deeds (good and bad) of every person shall be laid open;
items.secondaryText: وَإِذَا ٱلصُّحُفُ نُشِرَتْ

items.text: And when the heaven shall be stripped off and taken away from its place;
items.secondaryText: وَإِذَا ٱلسَّمَآءُ كُشِطَتْ

items.text: And when Hell-fire shall be kindled to fierce ablaze.
items.secondaryText: وَإِذَا ٱلْجَحِيمُ سُعِّرَتْ

items.text: And when Paradise shall be brought near,
items.secondaryText: وَإِذَا ٱلْجَنَّةُ أُزْلِفَتْ

items.text: (Then) every person will know what he has brought (of good and evil).
items.secondaryText: عَلِمَتْ نَفْسٌۭ مَّآ أَحْضَرَتْ

items.text: So verily, I swear by the planets that recede (i.e. disappear during the day and appear during the night).
items.secondaryText: فَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِٱلْخُنَّسِ

items.text: And by the planets that move swiftly and hide themselves,
items.secondaryText: ٱلْجَوَارِ ٱلْكُنَّسِ

items.text: And by the night as it departs;
items.secondaryText: وَٱلَّيْلِ إِذَا عَسْعَسَ

items.text: And by the dawn as it brightens;
items.secondaryText: وَٱلصُّبْحِ إِذَا تَنَفَّسَ

items.text: Verily, this is the Word (this Quran brought by) a most honourable messenger [Jibrael (Gabriel), from Allah to the Prophet Muhammad (Peace be upon him)].
items.secondaryText: إِنَّهُۥ لَقَوْلُ رَسُولٍۢ كَرِيمٍۢ

items.text: Owner of power, and high rank with (Allah) the Lord of the Throne,
items.secondaryText: ذِى قُوَّةٍ عِندَ ذِى ٱلْعَرْشِ مَكِينٍۢ

items.text: Obeyed (by the angels), trustworthy there (in the heavens).
items.secondaryText: مُّطَاعٍۢ ثَمَّ أَمِينٍۢ

items.text: And (O people) your companion (Muhammad (Peace be upon him)) is not a madman;
items.secondaryText: وَمَا صَاحِبُكُم بِمَجْنُونٍۢ

items.text: And indeed he (Muhammad (Peace be upon him)) saw him [Jibrael (Gabriel)] in the clear horizon (towards the east).
items.secondaryText: وَلَقَدْ رَءَاهُ بِٱلْأُفُقِ ٱلْمُبِينِ

items.text: And he (Muhammad (Peace be upon him)) withholds not a knowledge of the unseen.
items.secondaryText: وَمَا هُوَ عَلَى ٱلْغَيْبِ بِضَنِينٍۢ

items.text: And it (the Quran) is not the word of the outcast Shaitan (Satan).
items.secondaryText: وَمَا هُوَ بِقَوْلِ شَيْطَٰنٍۢ رَّجِيمٍۢ

items.text: Then where are you going?
items.secondaryText: فَأَيْنَ تَذْهَبُونَ

items.text: Verily, this (the Quran) is no less than a Reminder to (all) the 'Alamin (mankind and jinns).
items.secondaryText: إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكْرٌۭ لِّلْعَٰلَمِينَ

items.text: To whomsoever among you who wills to walk straight,
items.secondaryText: لِمَن شَآءَ مِنكُمْ أَن يَسْتَقِيمَ

items.text: And you will not, unless (it be) that Allah wills, the Lord of the 'Alamin (mankind, jinns and all that exists).
items.secondaryText: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ رَبُّ ٱلْعَٰلَمِينَ

items.text: When the heaven is cleft asunder.
items.secondaryText: إِذَا ٱلسَّمَآءُ ٱنفَطَرَتْ

items.text: And when the stars have fallen and scattered;
items.secondaryText: وَإِذَا ٱلْكَوَاكِبُ ٱنتَثَرَتْ

items.text: And when the seas are burst forth (got dried up);
items.secondaryText: وَإِذَا ٱلْبِحَارُ فُجِّرَتْ

items.text: And when the graves are turned upside down (and they bring out their contents)
items.secondaryText: وَإِذَا ٱلْقُبُورُ بُعْثِرَتْ

items.text: (Then) a person will know what he has sent forward and (what he has) left behind (of good or bad deeds).
items.secondaryText: عَلِمَتْ نَفْسٌۭ مَّا قَدَّمَتْ وَأَخَّرَتْ

items.text: O man! What has made you careless concerning your Lord, the Most Generous?
items.secondaryText: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْإِنسَٰنُ مَا غَرَّكَ بِرَبِّكَ ٱلْكَرِيمِ

items.text: Who created you, fashioned you perfectly, and gave you due proportion;
items.secondaryText: ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَكَ فَسَوَّىٰكَ فَعَدَلَكَ

items.text: In whatever form He willed, He put you together.
items.secondaryText: فِىٓ أَىِّ صُورَةٍۢ مَّا شَآءَ رَكَّبَكَ

items.text: Nay! But you deny the Recompense (reward for good deeds and punishment for evil deeds).
items.secondaryText: كَلَّا بَلْ تُكَذِّبُونَ بِٱلدِّينِ

items.text: But verily, over you (are appointed angels in charge of mankind) to watch you.
items.secondaryText: وَإِنَّ عَلَيْكُمْ لَحَٰفِظِينَ

items.text: Kiraman (honourable) Katibin writing down (your deeds).
items.secondaryText: كِرَامًۭا كَٰتِبِينَ

items.text: They know all that you do.
items.secondaryText: يَعْلَمُونَ مَا تَفْعَلُونَ

items.text: Verily, the Abrar (pious and righteous) will be in delight (Paradise);
items.secondaryText: إِنَّ ٱلْأَبْرَارَ لَفِى نَعِيمٍۢ

items.text: And verily, the Fujjar (the wicked, disbelievers, sinners and evil-doers) will be in the blazing Fire (Hell),
items.secondaryText: وَإِنَّ ٱلْفُجَّارَ لَفِى جَحِيمٍۢ

items.text: In which they will enter, and taste its burning flame on the Day of Recompense,
items.secondaryText: يَصْلَوْنَهَا يَوْمَ ٱلدِّينِ

items.text: And they (Al-Fujjar) will not be absent therefrom (i.e. will not go out from the Hell).
items.secondaryText: وَمَا هُمْ عَنْهَا بِغَآئِبِينَ

items.text: And what will make you know what the Day of Recompense is?
items.secondaryText: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا يَوْمُ ٱلدِّينِ

items.text: Again, what will make you know what the Day of Recompense is?
items.secondaryText: ثُمَّ مَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا يَوْمُ ٱلدِّينِ

items.text: (It will be) the Day when no person shall have power (to do) anything for another, and the Decision, that Day, will be (wholly) with Allah.
items.secondaryText: يَوْمَ لَا تَمْلِكُ نَفْسٌۭ لِّنَفْسٍۢ شَيْـًۭٔا ۖ وَٱلْأَمْرُ يَوْمَئِذٍۢ لِّلَّهِ

items.text: Woe to Al-Mutaffifin [those who give less in measure and weight (decrease the rights of others)],
items.secondaryText: وَيْلٌۭ لِّلْمُطَفِّفِينَ

items.text: Those who, when they have to receive by measure from men, demand full measure,
items.secondaryText: ٱلَّذِينَ إِذَا ٱكْتَالُوا۟ عَلَى ٱلنَّاسِ يَسْتَوْفُونَ

items.text: And when they have to give by measure or weight to men, give less than due.
items.secondaryText: وَإِذَا كَالُوهُمْ أَو وَّزَنُوهُمْ يُخْسِرُونَ

items.text: Think they not that they will be resurrected (for reckoning),
items.secondaryText: أَلَا يَظُنُّ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ أَنَّهُم مَّبْعُوثُونَ

items.text: On a Great Day,
items.secondaryText: لِيَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍۢ

items.text: The Day when (all) mankind will stand before the Lord of the 'Alamin (mankind, jinns and all that exists)?
items.secondaryText: يَوْمَ يَقُومُ ٱلنَّاسُ لِرَبِّ ٱلْعَٰلَمِينَ

items.text: Nay! Truly, the Record (writing of the deeds) of the Fujjar (disbelievers, sinners, evil-doers and wicked) is (preserved) in Sijjin.
items.secondaryText: كَلَّآ إِنَّ كِتَٰبَ ٱلْفُجَّارِ لَفِى سِجِّينٍۢ

items.text: And what will make you know what Sijjin is?
items.secondaryText: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا سِجِّينٌۭ

items.text: A Register inscribed.
items.secondaryText: كِتَٰبٌۭ مَّرْقُومٌۭ

items.text: Woe, that Day, to those who deny [(Allah, His Angels, His Books, His Messengers, the Day of Resurrection, and Al-Qadar (Divine Preordainments)].
items.secondaryText: وَيْلٌۭ يَوْمَئِذٍۢ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ

items.text: Those who deny the Day of Recompense.
items.secondaryText: ٱلَّذِينَ يُكَذِّبُونَ بِيَوْمِ ٱلدِّينِ

items.text: And none can deny it except every transgressor beyond bounds, (in disbelief, oppression and disobedience of Allah, the sinner!)
items.secondaryText: وَمَا يُكَذِّبُ بِهِۦٓ إِلَّا كُلُّ مُعْتَدٍ أَثِيمٍ

items.text: When Our Verses (of the Quran) are recited to him he says: "Tales of the ancients!"
items.secondaryText: إِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِ ءَايَٰتُنَا قَالَ أَسَٰطِيرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ

items.text: Nay! But on their hearts is the Ran (covering of sins and evil deeds) which they used to earn.
items.secondaryText: كَلَّا ۖ بَلْ ۜ رَانَ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِم مَّا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ

items.text: Nay! Surely, they (evil-doers) will be veiled from seeing their Lord that Day.
items.secondaryText: كَلَّآ إِنَّهُمْ عَن رَّبِّهِمْ يَوْمَئِذٍۢ لَّمَحْجُوبُونَ

items.text: Then, verily they will indeed enter and taste the burning flame of Hell.
items.secondaryText: ثُمَّ إِنَّهُمْ لَصَالُوا۟ ٱلْجَحِيمِ

items.text: Then, it will be said to them: "This is what you used to deny!"
items.secondaryText: ثُمَّ يُقَالُ هَٰذَا ٱلَّذِى كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ

items.text: Nay! Verily, the Record (writing of the deeds) of Al-Abrar (the pious who fear Allah and avoid evil), is (preserved) in 'Illiyyun.
items.secondaryText: كَلَّآ إِنَّ كِتَٰبَ ٱلْأَبْرَارِ لَفِى عِلِّيِّينَ

items.text: And what will make you know what 'Illiyyun is?
items.secondaryText: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا عِلِّيُّونَ

items.text: A Register inscribed.
items.secondaryText: كِتَٰبٌۭ مَّرْقُومٌۭ

items.text: To which bear witness those nearest (to Allah, i.e. the angels).
items.secondaryText: يَشْهَدُهُ ٱلْمُقَرَّبُونَ

items.text: Verily, Al-Abrar (the pious who fear Allah and avoid evil) will be in delight (Paradise).
items.secondaryText: إِنَّ ٱلْأَبْرَارَ لَفِى نَعِيمٍ

items.text: On thrones, looking (at all things).
items.secondaryText: عَلَى ٱلْأَرَآئِكِ يَنظُرُونَ

items.text: You will recognise in their faces the brightness of delight.
items.secondaryText: تَعْرِفُ فِى وُجُوهِهِمْ نَضْرَةَ ٱلنَّعِيمِ

items.text: They will be given to drink pure sealed wine.
items.secondaryText: يُسْقَوْنَ مِن رَّحِيقٍۢ مَّخْتُومٍ

items.text: The last thereof (that wine) will be the smell of musk, and for this let (all) those strive who want to strive (i.e. hasten earnestly to the obedience of Allah).
items.secondaryText: خِتَٰمُهُۥ مِسْكٌۭ ۚ وَفِى ذَٰلِكَ فَلْيَتَنَافَسِ ٱلْمُتَنَٰفِسُونَ

items.text: It (that wine) will be mixed with Tasnim.
items.secondaryText: وَمِزَاجُهُۥ مِن تَسْنِيمٍ

items.text: A spring whereof drink those nearest to Allah.
items.secondaryText: عَيْنًۭا يَشْرَبُ بِهَا ٱلْمُقَرَّبُونَ

items.text: Verily! (During the worldly life) those who committed crimes used to laugh at those who believed.
items.secondaryText: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ أَجْرَمُوا۟ كَانُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ يَضْحَكُونَ

items.text: And whenever they passed by them, used to wink one to another (in mockery);
items.secondaryText: وَإِذَا مَرُّوا۟ بِهِمْ يَتَغَامَزُونَ

items.text: And when they returned to their own people, they would return jesting;
items.secondaryText: وَإِذَا ٱنقَلَبُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِمُ ٱنقَلَبُوا۟ فَكِهِينَ

items.text: And when they saw them, they said: "Verily! These have indeed gone astray!"
items.secondaryText: وَإِذَا رَأَوْهُمْ قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ لَضَآلُّونَ

items.text: But they (disbelievers, sinners) had not been sent as watchers over them (the believers).
items.secondaryText: وَمَآ أُرْسِلُوا۟ عَلَيْهِمْ حَٰفِظِينَ

items.text: But this Day (the Day of Resurrection) those who believe will laugh at the disbelievers
items.secondaryText: فَٱلْيَوْمَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلْكُفَّارِ يَضْحَكُونَ

items.text: On (high) thrones, looking (at all things).
items.secondaryText: عَلَى ٱلْأَرَآئِكِ يَنظُرُونَ

items.text: Are not the disbelievers paid (fully) for what they used to do?
items.secondaryText: هَلْ ثُوِّبَ ٱلْكُفَّارُ مَا كَانُوا۟ يَفْعَلُونَ

items.text: When the heaven is split asunder,
items.secondaryText: إِذَا ٱلسَّمَآءُ ٱنشَقَّتْ

items.text: And listens and obeys its Lord, and it must do so;
items.secondaryText: وَأَذِنَتْ لِرَبِّهَا وَحُقَّتْ

items.text: And when the earth is stretched forth,
items.secondaryText: وَإِذَا ٱلْأَرْضُ مُدَّتْ

items.text: And has cast out all that was in it and became empty,
items.secondaryText: وَأَلْقَتْ مَا فِيهَا وَتَخَلَّتْ

items.text: And listens and obeys its Lord, and it must do so;
items.secondaryText: وَأَذِنَتْ لِرَبِّهَا وَحُقَّتْ

items.text: O man! Verily, you are returning towards your Lord with your deeds and actions (good or bad), a sure returning, so you will meet (i.e. the results of your deeds which you did).
items.secondaryText: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْإِنسَٰنُ إِنَّكَ كَادِحٌ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ كَدْحًۭا فَمُلَٰقِيهِ

items.text: Then, as for him who will be given his Record in his right hand,
items.secondaryText: فَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَٰبَهُۥ بِيَمِينِهِۦ

items.text: He surely will receive an easy reckoning,
items.secondaryText: فَسَوْفَ يُحَاسَبُ حِسَابًۭا يَسِيرًۭا

items.text: And will return to his family in joy!
items.secondaryText: وَيَنقَلِبُ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِۦ مَسْرُورًۭا

items.text: But whosoever is given his Record behind his back,
items.secondaryText: وَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَٰبَهُۥ وَرَآءَ ظَهْرِهِۦ

items.text: He will invoke (his) destruction,
items.secondaryText: فَسَوْفَ يَدْعُوا۟ ثُبُورًۭا

items.text: And shall enter a blazing Fire, and made to taste its burning.
items.secondaryText: وَيَصْلَىٰ سَعِيرًا

items.text: Verily, he was among his people in joy!
items.secondaryText: إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ فِىٓ أَهْلِهِۦ مَسْرُورًا

items.text: Verily, he thought that he would never come back (to Us)!
items.secondaryText: إِنَّهُۥ ظَنَّ أَن لَّن يَحُورَ

items.text: Yes! Verily, his Lord has been ever beholding him!
items.secondaryText: بَلَىٰٓ إِنَّ رَبَّهُۥ كَانَ بِهِۦ بَصِيرًۭا

items.text: So I swear by the afterglow of sunset;
items.secondaryText: فَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِٱلشَّفَقِ

items.text: And by the night and whatever it gathers in its darkness;
items.secondaryText: وَٱلَّيْلِ وَمَا وَسَقَ

items.text: And by the moon when it is at the full,
items.secondaryText: وَٱلْقَمَرِ إِذَا ٱتَّسَقَ

items.text: You shall certainly travel from stage to stage (in this life and in the Hereafter).
items.secondaryText: لَتَرْكَبُنَّ طَبَقًا عَن طَبَقٍۢ

items.text: What is the matter with them, that they believe not?
items.secondaryText: فَمَا لَهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ

items.text: And when the Quran is recited to them, they fall not prostrate,
items.secondaryText: وَإِذَا قُرِئَ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلْقُرْءَانُ لَا يَسْجُدُونَ ۩

items.text: Nay, (on the contrary), those who disbelieve, belie (Prophet Muhammad (Peace be upon him) and whatever he brought, i.e. this Quran and Islamic Monotheism, etc.).
items.secondaryText: بَلِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ يُكَذِّبُونَ

items.text: And Allah knows best what they gather (of good and bad deeds),
items.secondaryText: وَٱللَّهُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا يُوعُونَ

items.text: So announce to them a painful torment.
items.secondaryText: فَبَشِّرْهُم بِعَذَابٍ أَلِيمٍ

items.text: Save those who believe and do righteous good deeds, for them is a reward that will never come to an end (i.e. Paradise).
items.secondaryText: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ لَهُمْ أَجْرٌ غَيْرُ مَمْنُونٍۭ

items.text: By the heaven, holding the big stars.
items.secondaryText: وَٱلسَّمَآءِ ذَاتِ ٱلْبُرُوجِ

items.text: And by the Promised Day (i.e. the Day of Resurrection);
items.secondaryText: وَٱلْيَوْمِ ٱلْمَوْعُودِ

items.text: And by the witnessing day (i.e. Friday), and by the witnessed day [i.e. the day of 'Arafat (Hajj) the ninth of Dhul-Hijjah];
items.secondaryText: وَشَاهِدٍۢ وَمَشْهُودٍۢ

items.text: Cursed were the people of the ditch (the story of the Boy and the King).
items.secondaryText: قُتِلَ أَصْحَٰبُ ٱلْأُخْدُودِ

items.text: Fire supplied (abundantly) with fuel,
items.secondaryText: ٱلنَّارِ ذَاتِ ٱلْوَقُودِ

items.text: When they sat by it (fire),
items.secondaryText: إِذْ هُمْ عَلَيْهَا قُعُودٌۭ

items.text: And they witnessed what they were doing against the believers (i.e. burning them).
items.secondaryText: وَهُمْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَفْعَلُونَ بِٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ شُهُودٌۭ

items.text: They had nothing against them, except that they believed in Allah, the All-Mighty, Worthy of all Praise!
items.secondaryText: وَمَا نَقَمُوا۟ مِنْهُمْ إِلَّآ أَن يُؤْمِنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْحَمِيدِ

items.text: Who, to Whom belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth! And Allah is Witness over everything.
items.secondaryText: ٱلَّذِى لَهُۥ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍۢ شَهِيدٌ

items.text: Verily, those who put into trial the believing men and believing women (by torturing them and burning them), and then do not turn in repentance, (to Allah), will have the torment of Hell, and they will have the punishment of the burning Fire.
items.secondaryText: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ فَتَنُوا۟ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنَٰتِ ثُمَّ لَمْ يَتُوبُوا۟ فَلَهُمْ عَذَابُ جَهَنَّمَ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابُ ٱلْحَرِيقِ

items.text: Verily, those who believe and do righteous good deeds, for them will be Gardens under which rivers flow (Paradise). That is the great success.
items.secondaryText: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ لَهُمْ جَنَّٰتٌۭ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَٰرُ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْكَبِيرُ

items.text: Verily, (O Muhammad (Peace be upon him)) the Grip (Punishment) of your Lord is severe.
items.secondaryText: إِنَّ بَطْشَ رَبِّكَ لَشَدِيدٌ

items.text: Verily, He it is Who begins (punishment) and repeats (punishment in the Hereafter) (or originates the creation of everything, and then repeats it on the Day of Resurrection).
items.secondaryText: إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ يُبْدِئُ وَيُعِيدُ

items.text: And He is Oft-Forgiving, full of love (towards the pious who are real true believers of Islamic Monotheism),
items.secondaryText: وَهُوَ ٱلْغَفُورُ ٱلْوَدُودُ

items.text: Owner of the throne, the Glorious
items.secondaryText: ذُو ٱلْعَرْشِ ٱلْمَجِيدُ

items.text: He does what He intends (or wills).
items.secondaryText: فَعَّالٌۭ لِّمَا يُرِيدُ

items.text: Has the story reached you of the hosts,
items.secondaryText: هَلْ أَتَىٰكَ حَدِيثُ ٱلْجُنُودِ

items.text: Of Fir'aun (Pharaoh) and Thamud?
items.secondaryText: فِرْعَوْنَ وَثَمُودَ

items.text: Nay! The disbelievers (persisted) in denying (Prophet Muhammad (Peace be upon him) and his Message of Islamic Monotheism).
items.secondaryText: بَلِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ فِى تَكْذِيبٍۢ

items.text: And Allah encompasses them from behind! (i.e. all their deeds are within His Knowledge, and He will requite them for their deeds).
items.secondaryText: وَٱللَّهُ مِن وَرَآئِهِم مُّحِيطٌۢ

items.text: Nay! This is a Glorious Quran,
items.secondaryText: بَلْ هُوَ قُرْءَانٌۭ مَّجِيدٌۭ

items.text: (Inscribed) in Al-Lauh Al-Mahfuz (The Preserved Tablet)!
items.secondaryText: فِى لَوْحٍۢ مَّحْفُوظٍۭ

items.text: By the heaven, and At-Tariq (the night-comer, i.e. the bright star);
items.secondaryText: وَٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلطَّارِقِ

items.text: And what will make you to know what At-Tariq (night-comer) is?
items.secondaryText: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا ٱلطَّارِقُ

items.text: (It is) the star of piercing brightness;
items.secondaryText: ٱلنَّجْمُ ٱلثَّاقِبُ

items.text: There is no human being but has a protector over him (or her) (i.e. angels incharge of each human being guarding him, writing his good and bad deeds, etc.)
items.secondaryText: إِن كُلُّ نَفْسٍۢ لَّمَّا عَلَيْهَا حَافِظٌۭ

items.text: So let man see from what he is created!
items.secondaryText: فَلْيَنظُرِ ٱلْإِنسَٰنُ مِمَّ خُلِقَ

items.text: He is created from a water gushing forth.
items.secondaryText: خُلِقَ مِن مَّآءٍۢ دَافِقٍۢ

items.text: Proceeding from between the back-bone and the ribs,
items.secondaryText: يَخْرُجُ مِنۢ بَيْنِ ٱلصُّلْبِ وَٱلتَّرَآئِبِ

items.text: Verily, (Allah) is Able to bring him back (to life)!
items.secondaryText: إِنَّهُۥ عَلَىٰ رَجْعِهِۦ لَقَادِرٌۭ

items.text: The Day when all the secrets (deeds, prayers, fasting, etc.) will be examined (as to their truth).
items.secondaryText: يَوْمَ تُبْلَى ٱلسَّرَآئِرُ

items.text: Then will (man) have no power, nor any helper.
items.secondaryText: فَمَا لَهُۥ مِن قُوَّةٍۢ وَلَا نَاصِرٍۢ

items.text: By the sky (having rain clouds) which gives rain, again and again.
items.secondaryText: وَٱلسَّمَآءِ ذَاتِ ٱلرَّجْعِ

items.text: And the earth which splits (with the growth of trees and plants),
items.secondaryText: وَٱلْأَرْضِ ذَاتِ ٱلصَّدْعِ

items.text: Verily! This (the Quran) is the Word that separates (the truth from falsehood, and commands strict legal laws for mankind to cut the roots of evil).
items.secondaryText: إِنَّهُۥ لَقَوْلٌۭ فَصْلٌۭ

items.text: And it is not a thing for amusement.
items.secondaryText: وَمَا هُوَ بِٱلْهَزْلِ

items.text: Verily, they are but plotting a plot (against you O Muhammad (Peace be upon him)).
items.secondaryText: إِنَّهُمْ يَكِيدُونَ كَيْدًۭا

items.text: And I (too) am planning a plan.
items.secondaryText: وَأَكِيدُ كَيْدًۭا

items.text: So give a respite to the disbelievers. Deal you gently with them for a while.
items.secondaryText: فَمَهِّلِ ٱلْكَٰفِرِينَ أَمْهِلْهُمْ رُوَيْدًۢا

items.text: Glorify the Name of your Lord, the Most High,
items.secondaryText: سَبِّحِ ٱسْمَ رَبِّكَ ٱلْأَعْلَى

items.text: Who has created (everything), and then proportioned it;
items.secondaryText: ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ فَسَوَّىٰ

items.text: And Who has measured (preordainments for each and everything even to be blessed or wretched); then guided (i.e. showed mankind the right as well as wrong paths, and guided the animals to pasture);
items.secondaryText: وَٱلَّذِى قَدَّرَ فَهَدَىٰ

items.text: And Who brings out the pasturage,
items.secondaryText: وَٱلَّذِىٓ أَخْرَجَ ٱلْمَرْعَىٰ

items.text: And then makes it dark stubble.
items.secondaryText: فَجَعَلَهُۥ غُثَآءً أَحْوَىٰ

items.text: We shall make you to recite (the Quran), so you (O Muhammad (Peace be upon him)) shall not forget (it),
items.secondaryText: سَنُقْرِئُكَ فَلَا تَنسَىٰٓ
